name: Voter Action Project
subject: The cost of voter suppression
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
@ariberman.bsky.social: SCOTUS decision killing what’s left of Voting Rights Act could cost Dems 19 House seats, eliminate every majority-minority district in South, eviscerate 14th/15th Amendments & fulfill John Roberts 40-year crusade against country’s most important civil rights law [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=110125_2&amount=25]
The impact shows how partisan this all is, Team. A complete dismantling of the Voting Rights Act -- a key civil rights law -- would only harm one political party and return parts of the country to a suppressive era we left behind sixty years ago.
During this month’s oral arguments in Louisiana v. Callais , at least five conservative justices seemed ready to handicap the VRA so that it will no longer stop white majorities from locking racial minorities out of elected office through racial gerrymandering.
The consequences are simple to understand and grave for voter participation. The harder we make it to vote, the more politicians make voter participation feel worthless, the less people actually take part. Needless to say, the less people who participate, the less our democracy and our government looks like the people it's supposed to represent.
Team: We have to spread the word about this case and the consequences of dismantling the Voting Rights Act. Step up with $25 or whatever you can today and help us defend the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=110125_2&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=110125_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=110125_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=110125_2&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=110125_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=110125_2&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=110125_2&amount=35]
At issue in the case is Section 2 of the VRA, which requires that racial minorities have an equal opportunity to meaningfully participate in the electoral process. This provision has been used to strike down districting schemes and maps that prevented Black voters and other racial minorities from electing their preferred representatives. Since 1965, Section 2 has given people of color a seat at the table, from school boards to the halls of Congress. It appears this 60-year era is coming to an end.
We've said it before and will say it again, but it's been clear long before the MAGA movement that Chief Justice Roberts has seen the removal of the VRA as one of his top goals for his time on the Court. It appears he may be on the cusp of succeeding.
Striking down the last remnants of the Voting Rights Act is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year. Gutting Section 2 would take us backwards in time and allow racial gerrymandering to be a standard practice, silencing more voters. Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity.
We simply can't afford to go backwards like this. Will you chip in with $25 or more to help us fight back against these partisan efforts to silence voters? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=110125_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=110125_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=110125_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=I0ptuhYsscrLeKkiWuSe7zKaxWJcnQtUYEvOOudHj3ZkVlbzhzz6vdyKLVndj4LlfGMDTx%2BBHfkq1BAHYH9ri4fKT7KZbnEbzf3ISJxmHjoyE2zQrc8fKxwGzI7wqKpmjqqoJJl91QQNEhZ4VRmBJFJcKpFPTvGPL96frFZKp4%2BUuRJn6LsR%2BxyVj7YuuqIpEvLH2L09zyH192TCtVtvGsjqpycyvHcYrL2fJwR%2Br7la8kUB12EcFl%2B18YyW2DtsgLt8z9ACX41CLQ2yqc4lYX008DU9cejwRovwuWL7STunv9MGc%2F0nY3VF94UG0PD92p8YN1zqN%2BRZbajz96vaE9hRY%2BhSAYlqh6hztiyp3ZaCM6688ylUZmrASRuujUR0g4G71OjZZ48VxqX8SZK9RnZdNMZicPA2NnF3z%2FnSshA%3D .

clean_body: | | | This is Devarjaye “DJ” Daniel – one of President Trump’s most trusted bodyguards. Will you help get my dad Theodis elected to U.S. Congress? You may have heard our story before. When I was 6 years old I started seizing up. Brain cancer. My dad rushed me to the hospital and they told me they needed to do surgery that night. They even said I had 5 months left to live. I’m 13 years old now. And as God is my witness, I’m going to keep on going until my gas tank runs out. You never know when God is going to call you home. That’s something you don’t usually hear from a terminally ill child. But my dad told me to always lean on Jesus when times get rough... And Jesus tells me to always honor and support my father. So that’s exactly what I’m doing today. My dad Theodis is running forCongress as a Republican. I don’t understand all of it, but he tells me that the politicians we elect are corrupted by money and almost never good listeners. I can assure you my dad isn’t like that. He never gave up on me – even after 13 brain surgeries, expensive hospital bills, and tons of stress. And the worst part is, now that he’s running for Congress, I see these crazy people ripping up his yard signs and saying all of these nasty things about him. I really don’t appreciate that. My dad is a good man. An honest man. And I wouldn’t be alive today if it weren’t for him. The same goes for President Trump. Now that my dad is running for Congress,I’m asking you to be there for him the same way he has always been there for me. We don’t come from a lot of money or anything like that. But we do love this country, and we want to serve the people well. I’m honored to be sworn in as an honorary member of over 900 law enforcement agencies. I couldn’t believe it when President Trump let me join****theSecret Service too. That’s over 901 agencies now. I hope I get to 1,000 soon. But more than that, I really hope to see my dad go to Washington D.C. and help President Trump turn this country around. That would make me a very proud son. After all, I’ve seen the way some of these people treat our police officers. I’ve seen how violence has taken over our streets. I’ve seen how mean and rude many of these Democrat politicians are to folks like you. They refused to stand for me, Laken Riley, and Jocelyn Nungaray when President Trump told our stories in front of Congress. That idiot woman Jasmine Crockett even bullied me for my brain surgery scars! I’m just a 13 year old kid for crying out loud! That said, it would mean the world to me if you joined “Team Daniel for Congress” today. My dad is a fighter. I think I inherited those genes from him. He will NEVER give up on you... The same way he NEVER gave up on me. Will you please support my dad’s campaign for Congress by rushing over $5 or more? God Bless America, Devarjaye “DJ” Daniel Honorary U.S. Secret Service Agent Son of Theodis Daniel for Congress. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: re: Final poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
I hope you'll have my back again today.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118479674/579910354/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-11-01_5&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU5NDMzMjctODViNy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=E8zvTi48yVmR-PbxJeDZ3t032r0CA9kNweMw27Q_f38=)
Christopher Newport University released their final poll of our race for Governor.
In September, they claimed we were ahead by 12 points. Now, they found that Winsome Earle-Sears has closed the gap and trails by just seven points.
Peter, I'll put it plainly: **This election will be close.**
We are doing absolutely everything in our power to reach undecided voters here in Virginia, to share my agenda for Virginia families, stand up to Trump's attacks, and win the biggest election of 2025.
_But this work is hard, it's expensive — and it can only continue with your support._
[_**Will you contribute a small amount to help us win big on Tuesday? Whether it's $10, $25, or more, every donation goes toward ads, organizers, and other investments that we know to be persuasive.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118479675/579910355/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-11-01_5&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU5NDMzMjctODViNy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=E8zvTi48yVmR-PbxJeDZ3t032r0CA9kNweMw27Q_f38=)

clean_body: I hope you'll have my back again today. = Christopher Newport University released their final poll of our race for Governor. In September, they claimed we were ahead by 12 points. Now, they found that Winsome Earle-Sears has closed the gap and trails by just seven points. Peter, I'll put it plainly: This election will be close. We are doing absolutely everything in our power to reach undecided voters here in Virginia, to share my agenda for Virginia families, stand up to Trump's attacks, and win the biggest election of 2025. But this work is hard, it's expensive — and it can only continue with your support. = = = = = = = It's a point of pride that so many of you have invested in my campaign. I hope you'll have my back again today. Thank you so much, Abigail By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is virtually tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
[ **DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=bf9ef36add49431893ee4ee36f44a39a&_e=htGceoDnfVzvBLPj9Wq_Fl06LP085C9ZhK7CfxUlLnmKMOsFLviWFpOVXpaqXT-J1zLlnpq8WXjdO0Js0Mdgd4oJD6hXGt9FNXggtCxywsxHr6fbrgd56V3BZCA1jKtPML-oI6Y_NGLgAtv02Dma5uK9bVLe6nbtiiJCWYcutSnfMLf3438RoVWBUWomfc8eEJrGIOCyaz8xgxhIJH9MOzF9O7OkDEJgQy4YnPGMiputLi117ep3bnucnda4hk36Kykf9r8KOlpDrn9Bx1bgc8Ox5PrW6Pt08jLDxuKGlcJLodH7BVDFMPu1Q269oKPPT7q7quZq1z8lPsuFlV5kKa50HJN9Yagdauv8nUjc8H2Dh3jtMFvno0sxVBMexQrjBA4prwubcp4YHtGxMJrE_5JRGC8NZhDQFe4LEfbUcDqpElTv2NwnKsInk60kTNhG9n8OxoF7r1McplBQAvMG9nlP0Sla4NQYWI96uQMwqA7dLDCLHdiPrdJFWeg9rkK9VGhxZNTWcb8HyS-jDIafE6ufUA5exrA8M6fc2ddcpSp9h0bbCmP0worOOzdyXuU0ooaGRVz8vwrspdQKWlaFf-vPw5jfTxNQDzNEJODXAwyzIEuMuF2t4SCdPsGKmdIg4lC1jZFXCeGLkUPU_2dp3nxqequjeXoaI7TXBNVSYub523AHJ8UvYxL9hMgyNtknIpPayqCoKngla1OdOjAZEJP0PKSmv-Ubo26U0mHt6ym8iYqc43Ws34f-N-D8y1vcCD8laB8UEUU40JhVyMMRH8PkiayxMbwIrYZ5iaiCQpW8VUvvbnWPh7H6PYSd-iPYf24t_xIL6EENz5E7Eo8wi3AExmAo0AMOfqSvLWgdTlYSknC-kVqXTPbwjR5w31olO2kzr0twzuEL_szXd7rvn40pt_KEGwdp--Of1ZMRznX9-Y4qKlRLMOpTGQJ8V8FyD8kUGw6aRNu2awW3omIsyA%3D%3D)

Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. clean_body: I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea.| | | | I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. | | | | My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is virtually tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Fellow American, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!" If you can't afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, "please keep me and my team in your prayers and add your endorsement today:" I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward, Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Join us for another edition of our Loneliness to Light Series: The Pet Connection: PetAdoption Event, where we bring the community together to share connection, love, and companionship. Discover your new best friend and learn how pets can help combat loneliness.

📅 Thursday, November 13, 2025
🕓 4–6 PM
📍 Peninsula Humane Society & SPCA
1450 Rollins Rd, Burlingame, CA 94010

Meet adoptable pets, connect with neighbors, and take part in creating a stronger, more connected community.

[RSVP](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=9ebcc283fc&e=c0babbc643)[ on Eventbrite ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=8ef6ceacc9&e=c0babbc643)or contact 650-363-4572 / mrichardson@smcgov.org.

In Friendship,

David Canepa

Friend – What an incredible weekend! I had the absolute joy of **knocking doors with Delegate Michelle Maldonado, Delegate Josh Thomas, and members of Virginia’s vibrant Nepali community** — and I’m more energized than ever for this final stretch. We met so many neighbors who are fired up about this election — people who believe in protecting our rights, uplifting working families, and building a Virginia that welcomes everyone. The energy on the ground is electric. But with just days left until Election Day, we need to turn that energy into action. Every conversation, every door, every donation matters right now. MAGA extremists are flooding the airwaves with last-minute attacks. But we’re fighting back with people power — the kind that can’t be bought or silenced. If you’ve been waiting for the moment to step up — this is it. Let’s finish strong, together. clean_body: | | | Friend – What an incredible weekend! I had the absolute joy of knocking doors with Delegate Michelle Maldonado, Delegate Josh Thomas, and members of Virginia’s vibrant Nepali community — and I’m more energized than ever for this final stretch. We met so many neighbors who are fired up about this election — people who believe in protecting our rights, uplifting working families, and building a Virginia that welcomes everyone. The energy on the ground is electric. But with just days left until Election Day, we need to turn that energy into action. Every conversation, every door, every donation matters right now. MAGA extremists are flooding the airwaves with last-minute attacks. But we’re fighting back with people power — the kind that can’t be bought or silenced. If you’ve been waiting for the moment to step up — this is it. Let’s finish strong, together. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** I’m so proud to stand alongside incredible community leaders who know what’s at stake — and I’m even prouder to have supporters like you who make this movement possible. Let’s keep knocking, calling, giving, and showing up for Virginia. Let’s bring this home. — Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Winsome
subject: This is my final email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
clean_body: Better a few hours too soon than a minute too late. Voting is already underway... | | | | | | Patriot - This is my final message to you before time expires. Knowing that, will you please read every word carefully? Thanks for opening this email! I wouldn't be reaching out like this if my situation weren't truly dire. Let me explain my predicament: FIRST, while I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars! THEN, a Soros-backed, liberal group gave my Democrat opponent $500K all in one go! My Democrat opponent has continued to OUTRAISE me by MILLIONS of dollars. NOW, the polls are TIED. But I cannot win with this crippling cash disadvantage. I'm in a serious bind here. I'm asking you as a Christian, a Marine, and a mother: My Democrat opponent has Leftist billionaires like George Soros and Hollywood liberals backing her, but I'm 100% relying on you! I can't thank you enough for reading this message all the way through. You are truly a key part of my team! Together, we will close this fundraising gap and beat my liberal opponent in November! Thanks again and may God bless you! -Winsome Earle-Sears . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: If you can not condemn murder you can not be Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze67r7kmreqa333quefavkdi0c1ofkcq3apja940_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge8oj7c1h2bs)Friend - I can't believe I have to send you this message. But after my recent debate with Abigail Spanberger, I must say it:
If you can't condemn murder, you can't be Governor.
When I confronted my opponent about her ticket-mate Jay Jones' vile calls for violence against a political opponent and his family, she cowered in silence. Not once, not twice, but four times she refused to demand Jones' removal from the ticket.
This is not leadership - it's a slimy political game.
Spanberger's mealy-mouthed answers were nothing but a pathetic attempt to cover her own tracks. When I pressed her to take a real stand, she crumbled.
That's not just a failure of leadership - it's a betrayal of every American who expects their leaders to stand up for what's right. Abigail Spanberger has proven she is wholly unfit for office!
As we used to say in the Marines, "not fit to move to the next rank."
We CANNOT let unhinged radicals like Jay Jones and Abigail Spanberger win in November.
So here's my call to action: [PLEASE donate anything you can to help me and my team beat my Democrat opponent and send a powerful message to these hate-filled liberals!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkeba7i9h5u2rnqv0t4ecr9f47u7bt5n2g96mpn8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge8oj7c1h2bs)[DONATE $100 >>

Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That 's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znve8lnc43indlt0gr18u7nreh1e79sgbnk10q2o_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge8oj7c1h2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.[LEND A HAND

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Millions of families are already watching
body:
You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zigpec6uk6q52fobicsuh7g8cl9re3fnqlsj89ao_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge8oj4s5h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr8hjhfco3t477rka02h4m8ha39u14vpdmv9vdj8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge8oj4s5h2bs) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zok485l1up2vjghlpi06683k0n08k6ihatcsjkmo_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge8oj4s5h2bs)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvjlrl430nff35h8miqc89mkplbki6g5vp3kkcf0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge8oj4s5h2bs)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zucuhafrbbjc9ghcvucfdkcig3iofmshuahjvd68_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge8oj4s5h2bs)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zovn96fbbtc724uqpfq0hevkd0b9jskjl0jotd2g_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge8oj4s5h2bs), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: His words are now our mission
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgnkavovdts8c68a1ndq144om61q3311msh0fg48_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge8oj0sth2bs)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zq0jkkimhtjkr42aju47076tmq343ldsvd0flbb8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge8oj0sth2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8qga59pgl9gmmkjka1d43n9h4pf8mldsglqoqi0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge8oj0sth2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. [**Make your gift to join Turning Point USA today, and we'll send you your FREE copy of ****_How We Win_**** today.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmh3kj1l7bk2jvcgstrpvesitil9licenf5nhdoo_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge8oj0sth2bs)

---
Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies. Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. **For Charlie,** **The Turning Point USA Team**
---

"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**

This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**

I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: How the recent presidential election reflects a shift from Ireland's Catholic founding fathers
body:
An Irish soldier holds the a copy of the 1916 Proclamation of the Irish Republic outside the General Post Office, the scene of the 1916 Easter Rising, in Dublin on March 27, 2016 as part of a program of commemorative events to mark the 100th anniversary of the Easter Rising. / Credit: Charles McQuillan/Getty Images Dublin, Ireland, Nov 1, 2025 / 06:08 am (CNA). The election of left-wing Catherine Connolly last week as Ireland’s 10th president was marked by low voter turnout, a narrow field of candidates, and an unprecedented number of 213,738 spoiled ballots, representing 12.9% of votes cast. | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/PPL-G66C55wyenejUsvLgQ)

The election of left-wing Catherine Connolly last week as Ireland’s 10th president was marked by low voter turnout, a narrow field of candidates, and an unprecedented number of 213,738 spoiled ballots, representing 12.9% of votes cast.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsv292r2667m0hk8u8ifg4b38d7f8ekoq51npl58_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu3msbs6sdjqq276k8if9nujict5n9ocbnjsogig_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72cdh2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztto8tgf3clhchb3tc9rnrlklljsrf7ejaql2e88_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72cdh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zknggi5jq4b38fqfn4e3vslsaumbqonsk8ncdo0g_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72cdh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z99bjuuqkai2tri7r7iv8t2hi2uk3s6feh5jkarg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72cdh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6hqtal32p5tc859cl5st0d5dn4fufs8ic6062n8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72cdh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4hajg5li70di43n577hk3t6u9rg6f7plkd5fr9g_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72cdh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zif1mle3i2e0ebdke2pk0pei3qfgh732mnq37pvg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72cdh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5dnb4tvbrijac1s15gcdetmgmbpvi28p8c60md8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72cdh2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Help me bring Antifa to justice
body:
I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs

| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zojm4ga70qhonrobp48ngf4h9268h7q5nhfuvik8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72c1h2bs)
---
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs.And unless we do something to stop them today, I won’t be the last. **[I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me bring Antifa and its members who assaulted me to justice.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcfrmqj080jqmbpgm8srfm9j92qu77okekdbqt3o_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72c1h2bs) ****I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before.I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their “protest.”As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety.The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks.I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on.**People like you needed to know what was happening.** But I didn't go unnoticed for long.Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush."F*** you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!"**Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles.** Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects.I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger.The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn’t have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you.That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law.Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. [**Will you donate $35 or more to help me hold Antifa accountable?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3tm735mrcu504gt4rludks3sbgf6ulnumtu8am0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72c1h2bs) This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury.Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day.I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved.Wrong.To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing.**No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned.** It's not much of a surprise, though.Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime.So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment.Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice.[**That's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my efforts to hold Antifa and its members accountable.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbvhcgshltm1t95sqe48tkvm2se1pinf0gp2bq30_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72c1h2bs) We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family.Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order.By any means necessary.**_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem._** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE.It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful.**For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors!As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences.**So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty.**

[**You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6rh3hm29kvd1h65g26fe0dbgbtnhoil4ui31hjg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72c1h2bs) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger.This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't.This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe.And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver.By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to help me get justice from Antifa?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1mlgpkacic6mov18f4km1tkununeik7rqqaooo8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72c1h2bs) **Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, **these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America** , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3fgnq5mbpijd413aiml3k751njunjt058d7g9c0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o72c1h2bs)
---
**Andy Ngo**
---
|
---
| | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- **they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. clean_body: I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs | | | | My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs.And unless we do something to stop them today, I won’t be the last. I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019. This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before.I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their “protest.”As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety.The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks.I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on.People like you needed to know what was happening. But I didn't go unnoticed for long.Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush."F* you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!"Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles. Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects.I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger.The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn’t have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you.That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law.Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury.Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day.I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved.Wrong.To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing.No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned. It's not much of a surprise, though.Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime.So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment.Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice. We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family.Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order.By any means necessary.Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE.It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful.For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free. Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors!As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences.So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger.This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't.This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe.And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver.By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. | | Sincerely, | | Andy Ngo | | | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrejgkj7ssjfthq0mgs349aj2jvugrf7amm758eo_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o75c3h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4bg4fu628qdrgufbutha3lh9dajl55dto31ji3o_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o75c3h2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbt2qta3t1sd1j11llth2foi4qma1lug4drj3e88_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge2o75c3h2bs)
---

body:

Early voting is happening NOW, Friend!

We've worked so hard building up to this moment and now, votes are being cast for Governor of Virginia!
I can't thank you enough for your support all throughout this journey. But believe me, this is just the beginning. We have the momentum and the message to win this race and build a brighter future for our Commonwealth, but we MUST capitalize NOW.

subject: His words are now our mission
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zss4k0ldh72qlpio87ic3f2fsv78bopis8s7iuhg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge1ob4cjh2bs)

Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztf6361p3r8t28k10truoum7j9hnqcjgnvhr8ano_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c1ge1ob4cjh2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. name: Team Downing
subject: China is taking over the USA one farm at a time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
It’s time to draw a line in the sand. Please read:

Peter,
Whether you want to admit it or not, the Chinese Communist Party is quietly taking over America one farm at a time.
China already owns land in **27 states** , including properties alarmingly close to U.S. military bases. **
* **Our ****farmers are being undercut.**
* **Our food supply is at risk.**
* **The CCP is expanding its footprint on American soil.**

** We’re not just facing a serious economic threat. This is a full-blown national security crisis.
**It’s time to draw the line.**
President Trump’s Cabinet, including Treasury Secretary Bessent, is working overtime to rein in the abuse China has inflicted on the United States for far too long. But that’s not enough.
We need grassroots support to stop this takeover. That means citizens like YOU stepping up and demanding real action to thwart China’s takeover efforts.
[Peter, we’re begging you to add your name RIGHT NOW and support a federal ban on China buying U.S. farmland:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwMl8xVC1aQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDIzMjUtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDJfMVQtWkIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQyMzI1LTI4OTkifQ/J0lF5WeSVool_C8vMC_ffg) [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwMl8xVC1aQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDIzMjUtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDJfMVQtWkIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQyMzI1LTI4OTkifQ/jLODDpNtTRYnSQ3swf0Dkw) [ BAN CHINA FROM BUYING OUR LAND
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwMl8xVC1aQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDIzMjUtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDJfMVQtWkIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQyMzI1LTI4OTkifQ/eXb5Jswj7azCbkMO1gR9yw) [ SIGN THE PETITION TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwMl8xVC1aQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDIzMjUtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDJfMVQtWkIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQyMzI1LTI4OTkifQ/DVSiNpSYqtJ9Kz3Dx2H7Mw) Remember, Peter: **No Farms = No Food. No Action = No Freedom.**

subject: While the coffee is still brewing ☕
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XFcwG31TTurp4APkQZn559-huVw6gG030cwfZtRrY65ENztXXSCeUam8S0mZYp1VRjgcDpBha4weOSrhSPK4wFTqvBqE13NHNJYmweoXsmSZ2OtTA2R6HbH9PZnVjh6ABcRtveAwYSsjIxZxJWzPvXywN7SYk8y_-2wR7Cgoumvp-0QsGWIb-IibwrjA8K_pyn2ZuZVkiPudvRky9Q9xaAChjQCbfYaJ&c=2G-aEU_dufaRed-ujb-ulHiU8Rfg7CBJ4bWKkRhh18lUZgMNwc0goA==&ch=KwhARIS_eE6rI6H7K_gmkM14YaHAnRfngEPLcM9dQc6k7saYO3OBdA==)
---
| Peter,
We're huddled together this morning in Pennsylvania, waiting for the coffee to finish warming up. The air is cold, the wind is biting, and in just a few minutes we'll pour a cup, lace up our shoes, and head out the door.
Because we don't have the luxury of waiting. We've been out here for months, talking to voters about the unbelievable importance of this race. About how abortion rights, fair maps, and even the 2028 presidential election could be decided by the outcome of this single state Supreme Court retention vote.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XFcwG31TTurp4APkQZn559-huVw6gG030cwfZtRrY65ENztXXSCeUam8S0mZYp1VRjgcDpBha4weOSrhSPK4wFTqvBqE13NHNJYmweoXsmSZ2OtTA2R6HbH9PZnVjh6ABcRtveAwYSsjIxZxJWzPvXywN7SYk8y_-2wR7Cgoumvp-0QsGWIb-IibwrjA8K_pyn2ZuZVkiPudvRky9Q9xaHp3rxEBru1S&c=2G-aEU_dufaRed-ujb-ulHiU8Rfg7CBJ4bWKkRhh18lUZgMNwc0goA==&ch=KwhARIS_eE6rI6H7K_gmkM14YaHAnRfngEPLcM9dQc6k7saYO3OBdA==)
---
Most voters don't even know it's happening -- until we knock on their door. And every conversation we have could be the difference between MAGA flipping the court or Democrats holding the line.
But here's the truth: how many doors we knock today, tomorrow, and every day until November 4th depends entirely on grassroots donors like you. [So while our coffee is still warming up, we're asking: will you rush a donation of $25, $50, or even $10 to help us expand our efforts in these final few days?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XFcwG31TTurp4APkQZn559-huVw6gG030cwfZtRrY65ENztXXSCeUam8S0mZYp1ViI5BDcqT1C3RvSAiXXzznhfj-lk2UKRAtmIYB1mhIcIB7geErn314SiSbv-2cO0i58PiRZD2ZHoC0SSYJsLGkYjlcTz04tsjdXv5GQGs2fJKjDrKPW3-3GxCSgot6YiCv8VxCEy8GCm3HPTxPwBpKZqyeu5XuE-uWY2HV5AtK1tfUAghF-GhAw==&c=2G-aEU_dufaRed-ujb-ulHiU8Rfg7CBJ4bWKkRhh18lUZgMNwc0goA==&ch=KwhARIS_eE6rI6H7K_gmkM14YaHAnRfngEPLcM9dQc6k7saYO3OBdA==)

subject: Facing a real Christmas crunch
body:
It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention.

| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention. Because **BRAVE Books** is facing a real Christmas crunch. And as one of our best supporters in our mission to instill conservative values in children using high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment... **[...I thought you'd want to be one of the first to know what's going on.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGOozAMhp8m3FIlDgQ4cGiHMttDV6tqxR5RcNw2WghVEtjXXzGaeYC52b8-W_rsP9fhatzk_OOnmanBzQ0hDneDzj9MIDPhM7iYZhMxrB4HEFBwKbmAnZOZbdBqBRk1stQgKgm5zJ5NVdRU1eNYalkYUWIJBm1eoKXa3EfQmWv2TVIKkFIIpQ5aiBIsyrqGqjJCslysL2sSxQMuPlLYTHIbOe-XvVr8AZc5m5pnSq_I1JFBx6CLhGugg_Fkl7QTDLoxmI34uCx_I4OORtSERc5LVY48LyviFZLithr1nTTBnYCpbk3zEJc1IDHVntp3fjv3DPQez2TdOjPVnq-fCZr5ZdzDM9V-Wsnh1L4Pp9uxPw_Xy-8fH-3t3A-_jvytv3zNLT6RT0y1b_2Ffx0kC419_XPT5KIuWS4es3HTh236_n-2Bv4HAAD__0r4mWQ) ** **Friend, BRAVE Books** has introduced _Mouse in the House_ as a Christian alternative to that other secular "Christmas" game where parents hide a stuffed elf around the house to "spy" on the children to make sure they behave well to earn Santa's gifts. My friends at**BRAVE Books** knew families deserved something better to teach the true meaning of Christmas. So, they created _Mouse in the House_ to help parents emphasize the joy of _giving_ more than _getting_ in this most blessed season. And boy, did parents respond. The first year it was introduced,___Mouse in the House_ sold out in THREE HOURS! Friend, I know it's only November, but this year we don't want to turn any families away because of unexpectedly high demand.

Thank you, Brave Books!!!" -- Jenae K. _ _" I love the Godly service ideas!" - Susan _ _" I love the Mouse in the House. The giving nature of the story reflects the theme of the Christmas season." - Kat F._

clean_body: It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention. | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention. Because BRAVE Books is facing a real Christmas crunch. And as one of our best supporters in our mission to instill conservative values in children using high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment... Friend, BRAVE Books has introduced Mouse in the House as a Christian alternative to that other secular "Christmas" game where parents hide a stuffed elf around the house to "spy" on the children to make sure they behave well to earn Santa's gifts. My friends atBRAVE Books knew families deserved something better to teach the true meaning of Christmas. So, they created Mouse in the House to help parents emphasize the joy of giving more than getting in this most blessed season. And boy, did parents respond. The first year it was introduced,Mouse in the House sold out in THREE HOURS! Friend, I know it's only November, but this year we don't want to turn any families away because of unexpectedly high demand. | | | BRAVE Books is ramping up production big-time and fast. Friend, you're one of our best supporters and I'm so grateful. | | BRAVE Books is ramping up production big-time and fast. Friend, you're one of our best supporters and I'm so grateful. | | You understand that BRAVE Books is fighting to restore our culture because we can't just give up and let the radicals erase America's Judeo-Christian values. >>> Your support has already helped get "See You at the Library" kits to thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens who gathered at over 201 libraries in 46 states (including the Library of Congress!) to take back our libraries. Together, we countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. >>> Your last gift helped us finish filming TWO whole seasons of our historic TV show "Iggy and Mr. Kirk." This is the very first television show funded by everyday Americans to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. "Iggy and Mr. Kirk" is our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" that uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great. >>> And now you are the difference between success and failure with our "More Mouse in the House!" campaign. Just look at what parents have already said about our Mouse in the House Christmas bundle that comes with a beautiful book and adorable stuffed mouse: " So thankful for a thoughtful new Christmas tradition for our children. The story is sweet, the explanation of Christmas is poignant, and the mouse is so adorable. Thank you, Brave Books!!!" -- Jenae K. " I love the Godly service ideas!" - Susan " I love the Mouse in the House. The giving nature of the story reflects the theme of the Christmas season." - Kat F. Friend, parents are hungry for Godly content that helps them counter the wicked culture. And your support helps BRAVE Books supply it. Your gift helps BRAVE Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools. Friend, nothing we accomplish is possible without you. And that's why as a thank you for being such a faithful and faith-filled friend, when you contribute $100 or more to our "More Mouse in the House!" campaign... ...we will send one out to you absolutely free. You can keep the Mouse in the House Christmas bundle for your family, you can gift it to someone you love... ...or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. BRAVE Books is working round the clock to get enough Mouse in the House Christmas bundles produced and all the orders filled in time. Friend, THANK YOU for helping. And as a thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own Mouse in the House for your family! name: Patriot Cigars
subject: NEW PATRIOT PACK with ACCESSORIES
body:
** NEW PATRIOT PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
INCLUDES: TRAVEL CASE, CUTTER & CIGARS!

The Patriot Pack — Smoke for the Bold and the Free

Stand tall and light up freedom with The Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company — a powerful lineup built for true American patriots. Featuring The “Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case, the Old Glory Cigar Cutter, and three powerhouse blends — TNT, MOAB, and Sidewinder — this set is your all-American arsenal of premium, hand-rolled cigars. Crafted for quality. Fueled by liberty. Made for those who never back down.
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=a9c4fa4fbb&e=fbf55fa623

**
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Patriot Pack
A Bold Salute to Liberty
------------------------------------------------------------

Raise your colors high — the Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company is the ultimate tribute to freedom, made for those who stand proud. This isn’t just a cigar set; it’s a declaration, a statement, and a smoke-filled salute to the red, white, and blue.

** Included Inside the Patriot Pack
------------------------------------------------------------

**
“The Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case
------------------------------------------------------------

Carry your cigars in patriotic style. This rugged yet elegant case is crafted in premium printed leather with the pledge of allegiance, built to safeguard your Patriot Cigars while projecting staunch American pride. Designed for travel, with room for three cigars up to a 60-ring size and a secure closure, it’s more than storage—it’s armor for your freedom smoke.

** Old Glory Cigar Cutter
------------------------------------------------------------

No patriot’s toolkit is complete without a sharp edge. The Old Glory Cigar Cutter is a dual-blade instrument worthy of the name. It slices clean and precise, honoring the flag with every snip (and making sure your draw is perfect).
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Finest Blends Under the Flag
------------------------------------------------------------

** TNT
------------------------------------------------------------

Explosive in flavor and bold in character, TNT is a powerhouse medium to full blend that commands your attention. From first light to the last ember, it burns with authority.

** MOAB (Mother of All Bombs)
------------------------------------------------------------

MOAB delivers a full-bodied punch, a maduro cigar that lives up to its name. Deep, rich, and intense — this is not for the faint of heart but for the true patriot who demands maximum firepower in flavor.

** Sidewinder
------------------------------------------------------------

Sleek, swift, and sly — the Sidewinder rounds out the pack with a medium blend that strikes with finesse. Balanced, bold, and full of character, it’s the curveball every patriotic smoker needs.

The Patriot Pack doesn’t stop there, you’ll also get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.
------------------------------------------------------------

** Why the Patriot Pack Matters
------------------------------------------------------------

This is not merely a sampler or gift set. The Patriot Pack is your on-demand arsenal of American spirit and premium craftsmanship. It’s a perfect companion for travel, a striking gift for fellow flag-bearers, or your own daily reminder that freedom is worth celebrating — one premium puff at a time.

Light up The Patriot Pack. Puff with pride. And let the smoke carry your pledge to liberty.

** Uncompromising Quality, Made for Patriots
------------------------------------------------------------

At Patriot Cigar Company, every cigar is handcrafted in Estelí, Nicaragua, using premium-aged tobacco (aged a minimum of three years). Our blends were born from the desire to bring together the love of premium smokes and the love of our country, forging a brand built on passion and pride.

** NEW PREMIUM
8 CIGAR SAMPLER PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
USE PROMO CODE: EAGLE FOR 20% OFF CIGARS
Experience true American freedom with 8 bold, premium cigars—including the gold-wrapped MOGUL and exclusive Operation Never Tell—only available in the Patriot Cigar Company Premium Sampler Pack.

Cigars Included

1xMOAB
1xTNT
1xMARK48
1xHellfire
1xSidewinder
1xSidewinder Maduro
1x24K Gold Wrapped Mogul
1xLimited Release Unbanded Operation Never Tell

https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=625b8d8f81&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=eac3595233&e=fbf55fa623

For the true American cigar patriot, this is the ultimate way to experience the full power, pride, and craftsmanship behind Patriot Cigar Company. The Premium Sampler Pack delivers 8 premium cigars that represent the heart and soul of our lineup—crafted for those who believe in freedom, hard work, and savoring every damn moment.

You’ll receive all 6 flagship blends that built our reputation for bold flavor and uncompromising quality, plus two standouts that make this sampler truly elite: the 24Kt Gold-Wrapped MOGUL, a cigar that radiates luxury and dominance with every draw, and the Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to this pack, and once these are gone, they’re gone.

The Premium Sampler Pack doesn’t stop there. Alongside your 8 cigars, you’ll get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.

8 Cigars. 1 Mission. 100% Patriot.
Light up, lean back, and let freedom burn.
NEW CIGAR LIMITED RELEASE
"OPERATION NEVER TELL"

The Unbanded Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to the Premium Sampler Pack available at MYPATRIOTCIGARS.COM (https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=0297fd2c22&e=fbf55fa623) , and once these are gone, they’re gone.

Don't miss this cigar!

NEW CIGAR ACCESSORIES!
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=5c63abd92e&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=868d735e7d&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=fe7a5598bc&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=688cfd2671&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=5068ca1bdf&e=fbf55fa623

** FREE Shipping On Orders Over $100.00
------------------------------------------------------------

[See the homerun here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OqzAQxfGngS7IM5iPFC7SpMttb2mBPYbJGoxsK17efsW-wrZHR7_i__-lXxN73pd_00Yqu6B3KslTzhS1DXahmArvlj-8L1vYv-hMkTQK7G4AN4HaTuxPLfWjtsoRIbU1KRh6FCPIO9Srap25t2RgnAaAmWZD8yxxvJu-70aQc83q8gAEAgjZicb2DtCA7OUwDl1nKinIcg6xeQfe80rOn-FDsTFhq71acz5S1T4qfFb4LKU0LnynI8Scrse1TdmsFT7dZm7tOfgDtvZNnT1WiXVU9ijsPad-qKRYton9r5z_GOSj8CcAAP__bH11Rg).

# Sunday, November 2, 2025

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1795 and 1865, [two U.S. presidents were born](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFygzAQRU8DnRntIoFTqHBD57QpNQpa0DpC8kgyDLfPOFdI96v_3ryvu7lbDhzXT7uRrksykY4SqFbKxiW3Ui4HR8c7x3VL8YfOksmgQHUBuAg0znI4jTS31umFCKlvScM4oLiC_IDWaxjV0M8SRO9ASHFF2-OASIPtQSmpWtbvPwCBAEIq0blhAZxBDnK8jkrNjRTkuKbcPRLH6mkJZ9opd3Pa2qB9rc_S9LcGpwanlVJe6fh-FX85PFfy6VWos3n2vFPp1rQ3OHkuNeWzwal6Ls6-19vAxEfpfN1Cm7V7HhwCl2FspFg3y-EPWP_Zadf4GwAA__8nrHza): James Polk, the 11th president, in Mecklenburg County, North Carolina, and Warren G. Harding, the 29th president, in Blooming Grove, Ohio. Today's _Whatever Happened To_ item highlights the Slip 'N Slide. Once a staple of summer fun, these water tarps fell out of favor as they became associated with spinal injuries in adults. [See below for the full story](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAQRk-DOyKYgEkKijTusu2WFoHBZoPBAuLIt1-xe4S_-aqneaP3-zk_TYghLb_Mhrr5PCf81oitYZlddguW-g3JhSOkZcvpjWctOAMDSTmnDGZnQjxnMT8Gpz0i4HVAzdUI7MbFnQ-rvtmX5FII40EgIKLyzKFUd6ukAiGGoPs9zhlwzoRkFzd6DpaLUaibktISwdCFlsvlTw6prejjmQ8sF5u3Ieq1tb2S64PARGBqK8bs26fuprSzIwSmLiAwsT5X9p-iNYY99XVIU24UD0z0ZUrBXoR2Ay3Zviu1-RMdrS3v9FMJTEPRbv-GGEMdFRFs2UyI_75pP4x4aPgbAAD__yZghr8). If you've ever wondered how you could make a real difference in someone's darkest moment, today's sponsor, [Convoy of Hope](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuunDAQxvGnMR3IYy7mFC5WQXSbNqVl8ACT-IKMF8TbRxttnuC085P-Gn2_nvppyFFYfxqPKi9RB7wOhzlj0jbaFdNxUbB0Ulh9DH_wPhJqwUVbApRcaGvI3brRj8KqBVFgXaAC2QneQ_MFxaZ60y9i7qxpl6mbJonSfrWAPQDIdoK-IPXuAXABwJuWV7ZbQMzQdI3sZdvOrOFoKcdU_Y4U8oaLu-OJqZqjL5zact4PVj-YGJkY5xjOeMdliztWMa1MjFfyb6vHV_b6iK80I6uHT4SJ7n32aOnlWT1YWikbVxr7kdn43dAaWD38eDxLziXv4b_FkDFkVg9X8sFkisG4Iim7X-QcHZ1kDV-9Iffv1_zNiU8l_gYAAP__UAKR6Q), is turning compassion into action when it's needed most.
