| | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ ...** **[Scoop: Ted Cruz's Phone Records Targeted By Jack Smith: ](https://trk.email.tedcruz._Xd7NeYoRxQ)**"Sen. Ted Cruz's phone records were subpoenaed as part of then-special counsel Jack Smith's investigations into then-former President Trump, Axios has learned. Why it matters: Congressional Republicans have demanded investigations over the news that former President Biden's Justice Department obtained and reviewed some lawmakers' call logs. Cruz's phone records were ultimately not analyzed as part of Smith's Jan. 6 Capitol attack investigation because AT&T did not comply with the subpoena, according to a source directly familiar with the situation.." **[US Sen. Ted Cruz Calls For Impeachment Of Federal Judge Who Ordered Artic Frost Gag Order:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-QhFEChhRYGYg)** "A lawmaker is calling to impeach a federal judge who allowed the FBI to spy on conservative groups and lawmakers during the Biden administration. U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz said that Judge James Boasberg, a federal judge in Washington, D.C., signed a gag order that prevented AT&T from telling the senator about a subpoena of his phone records. The FBI targeted: The FBI targeted the following Members of Congress: Sen. Lindsey Graham, R-S.C., Sen. Bill Hagerty ,R-Tenn., Sen. Josh Hawley, R-Mo., Sen. Dan..." **[SCOOP: Former Homeland Security Secretary Backs Ted Cruz's Stop FUNDERs Act To Prosecute Funders Of Political Violence:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-99eGrkI0deZbhh8crw)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.) **"Sen. Ted Cruz (R., Texas) scored yet another major endorsement in his fight to pass legislation designed to dismantle the web of far-left NGOs that is seemingly ever-present behind the funding of anti-American rallies across the country. Cruz's Stop FUNDERs Act, which would help law enforcement dismantle this network, has already been endorsed by FBI Director Kash Patel and by Tysen Duva, nominee for Assistant Attorney General For The Criminal Division, among other law enforcement officials. Now, Cruz can add former Secretary of Homeland Security Chad..." **[Ted Cruz Issues Grim Warning To New Yorkers If Mamdani Is Elected:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-xo_SXB5xen6mCJIuA)** "Senator Ted Cruz (R-TX) issued a dire warning to New Yorkers ahead of the imminent mayoral election, saying that things were likely to get much worse if they elect self-described democratic socialist assemblyman Zohran Mamdani to fill the office. Cruz, during the most recent episode of "Verdict," told cohost Ben Ferguson that he could foresee several different potential outcomes that might result from Mamdani's election -- and none of them were good for the people of the Big Apple. "Look, Comrade Mamdani is apparently the future of the Democrat Party. The Democrat..." **['The Church Is Asleep Right Now': Ted Cruz Calls On Christians To Confront Right-Wing Antisemitism:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** "Sen. Ted Cruz used his keynote address at a major gathering for Christian supporters of Israel this week to warn of "a growing cancer" of antisemitism on the right, which he said church leaders are failing to address. "I'm here to tell you, in the last six months, I have seen antisemitism rising on the right in a way I have never seen in my entire life," Cruz said, speaking on Sunday at a megachurch in San Antonio, led by John Hagee, the founder of Christians United for Israel, which claims to have more than 10 million members..." **[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-g)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._ceTv373GiW0tOw)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._9axrS7bPI0wanf-XN-TAQ)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._QPw1Qw8j5Q)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._ETQhkZkX4Q)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-LmKF9OfpBt1XLgLA)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._BMpCsf1E1a7t4D-93w)[Send Ted Cruz Support Right Now>>](https://trk.email.tedcruz._Niqc4-T5uEkyJMbm2aw)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-ZqVtDOHXg)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-1l95YyyzhyQ)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-qnXtH1vjvg)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._EURb4z7EsNvvw)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-vlkLBsfJCHUmeaA)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-m8G6TBtsF7Z6Q)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)**

"Senator Ted Cruz (R-TX) issued a dire warning to New Yorkers ahead of the imminent mayoral election, saying that things were likely to get much worse if they elect self-described democratic socialist assemblyman Zohran Mamdani to fill the office. Cruz, during the most recent episode of "Verdict," told cohost Ben Ferguson that he could foresee several different potential outcomes that might result from Mamdani's election -- and none of them were good for the people of the Big Apple. "Look, Comrade Mamdani is apparently the future of the Democrat Party. The Democrat..." "Sen. Ted Cruz used his keynote address at a major gathering for Christian supporters of Israel this week to warn of "a growing cancer" of antisemitism on the right, which he said church leaders are failing to address. "I'm here to tell you, in the last six months, I have seen antisemitism rising on the right in a way I have never seen in my entire life," Cruz said, speaking on Sunday at a megachurch in San Antonio, led by John Hagee, the founder of Christians United for Israel, which claims to have more than 10 million members..." | Verdict w/ Ted Cruz ... | Message From Ted Cruz: It had to be done... We invoked the "Nuclear Option." Democrats have been holding President Trump's nominees hostage. I REFUSE to let the Democrats play games with our country. \- Team Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. |

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: Skyrocketing prices are crushing retirees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
Democrats have treated Minnesota like their personal fiefdom - but with your help, we can put those days behind us. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a9696e12b6f54b049d2e1aacddcbbff9&_e=w9CUoq1SRh6xDt34vQ6NSSAhPzzAo94eEypeaSbOTMyGEzsaVTHb5Xozm5_fCFGHL14cr9vEsg-g6QNZkZvQTs1jAUWQWKTWaEBIK3NaJappPIWFvDkU54kYW6Ya18y9PTOtMITJmiQV8830IYqJ4gQ8M0y_8myx7Ye7wwPWrw6kxgr4hzRCb6EO90e9CQK3UN7Z_rFPOijeBo63MgU5nL6KJG5twBUtwqd1GKwRds4Q9zuYzzG2PY5XTQNtNSSdXp9W1hcpe0UDGmV2rkmr0lICpcw-zTtvxEmFz-WgBiG6Qj4vHJG6ceWbiNKRdZXr5DH3P_qB_Ew8QYOy9dQZwGPoFHcn9EaGWDVN3xvAE996D613OfP4qSTc7xigVmxx6sNxFDRsgJicOGa9cVWJPjTqHuwypORIhz_yLOvZeIBymo9WgLhDRfV9xBg6YZaWr5wwPBM7MB_D1SfulnemDOZxm2NlidMaYStcQ7brDV9oB3Xpw90V1F8zW1PgUiAsv8c0_GxnKSnwc6UMOL-E9XKryUUZjznn9ggEJQfHUWlboKvX76zT_0_d6fyuLfv0WE8BY7HYlCHJtOmxSLOc-kbgMq_ZqhmNLsV5Q_ZVUL4GrBsnYdjx6a1INaiahFfraYgt8dRAXuPCvuH0K3a9lppwwdFuP64yDI20pyv69jiI-0uKqP_jfp-TIKRjENuZFY7rO2cS3jhS_vjORUW1F7oEQsByRy0gAgVuxaSijx9pc_MHpB9scDLIAeBneQgoOETVF1DE_ZKBXU9WLKvMG6e-MZgQ4MqRiKE6uF_BTRwoHUr77OGbyisV7EPEjMem)

---
Peter,

Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda.

Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back.

I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. **I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos.**

Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans.

_**Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe.

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN →**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a9696e12b6f54b049d2e1aacddcbbff9&_e=w9CUoq1SRh6xDt34vQ6NSSAhPzzAo94eEypeaSbOTMyGEzsaVTHb5Xozm5_fCFGHL14cr9vEsg-g6QNZkZvQTs1jAUWQWKTWaEBIK3NaJappPIWFvDkU54kYW6Ya18y9PTOtMITJmiQV8830IYqJ4gQ8M0y_8myx7Ye7wwPWrw6kxgr4hzRCb6EO90e9CQK3UN7Z_rFPOijeBo63MgU5nL6KJG5twBUtwqd1GKwRds4Q9zuYzzG2PY5XTQNtNSSdXp9W1hcpe0UDGmV2rkmr0lICpcw-zTtvxEmFz-WgBiG_hqF-1oaSlap86do_WsDezUfq8UeTGEbG9ln1Xv-2fVG4ShkPRd0N8AQNn4-DHaWT3lo-Bfxe62MvrxYRmu4k1SBkEPWmPvFG32E161mHaPcGrqBAA8rfxEhBuHGDjmndQ8g03NL0-HqQ4jzy-3fGgYL_6qkbiJdij8A9F_jiWJevo3l0yyRKgs1JfUpAsu4-gK0Ki8GF8odbIT1p3qgambGbq7tykmCUAEYrO2GwZx3F17V9RqyOLCSY4qoKtEvCwcYPA3eP8sBZCmwGashSEVL7b7yC_DbsdatyTOpAXOkN-Ln3yPSd4MZpnBVfKsk6hZjfLqCd3D6Z7UDwCM6beJVyUFfPEARl3doiuO8tPWXGwNBjhzpL1gqvovWNbujRYVvwbLS3QAw-aPBAEdbJnqhjUoeFgkE-pFpOORQM4yx3-iEcByANz4Qjxs6ILtQzvE6_tNYIVwtOnQwJR9-Br5LpVnhRrnbTJWwpGHjkEucfsuPYB_PxMB1711DDv2a21UMCzJskJ12fb4tktLkc)
**_ _[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a9696e12b6f54b049d2e1aacddcbbff9&_e=w9CUoq1SRh6xDt34vQ6NSSAhPzzAo94eEypeaSbOTMyGEzsaVTHb5Xozm5_fCFGHL14cr9vEsg-g6QNZkZvQTs1jAUWQWKTWaEBIK3NaJappPIWFvDkU54kYW6Ya18y9PTOtMITJmiQV8830IYqJ4gQ8M0y_8myx7Ye7wwPWrw6kxgr4hzRCb6EO90e9CQK3UN7Z_rFPOijeBo63MgU5nL6KJG5twBUtwqd1GKwRds4Q9zuYzzG2PY5XTQNtNSSdXp9W1hcpe0UDGmV2rkmr0lICpcw-zTtvxEmFz-WgBiGae0CZ7IcUjtcTu2js8yTp9VAGzLTbZwn2AiAmpOVgYuvdFZYyAMHQWiXFNzerQBfLpBrbrYa23tGoNy5w1fNlXYQ09y-bGzAVPSH6IVI92hfjM2kzdgZcDyRVDfyGZajYdecrOKmkDc2Hvx6BL2cH3Zy9aG-O2o6VcLax3znMhXYjZMmp25P82Zb7sBxf3PYTOiU_Zm3FfG6Gho_w1GWUpvGJql7SelG3fXM18AOGOtvT1W9zKUosfUsORk__TDfgLZVrqygAJb7P6ZUbYshvMLrfejv6d9BIT6e6SeaF7IEjj4VlOQL7G4KaJVo728FXoBAfoSvAPZ6BoGtUdVLKANFEMy-5yZP9LA8BHq04G0xXAXB0izGlv1Zgu8qJXy1GeSAx8TFe5z_cKAfNsrXENhcQskwe33KyyFSUP6TchV2gcyV0403T3fWkJt1M24SweeACPEqSeQbkd8R1lxu5-kQBrsioPwbU_N6SoUhfbbNzeAHCX7ECfUNIt-ipuXrWSq2__44CELnYufHGY5Bj)_
**Here’s the spark:** Recent polls from their own side show a generic Republican trailing by just two points. **With United States Senator Tina Smith retiring, this seat is open for the first time in decades.** Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential race since Nixon in ’72, but the tide’s turning—Trump’s legacy is firing up folks like you, retired patriots who’ve built lives on hard work and faith. We can flip this seat, secure the Republican Senate majority, and give President Trump the muscle to drain the swamp for good.

**I’m running to cut taxes, back our police, secure the border, and defend the values you’ve spent your life upholding—family, faith, and freedom.**

We’re the underdogs, no question. **Minnesota’s been blue since the days of dial-up internet.** But I’ve led missions through worse odds—high-stakes ops where one mistake meant everything.

clean_body: Democrats have treated Minnesota like their personal fiefdom - but with your help, we can put those days behind us. | Peter, Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda. Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back. I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos. Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans. Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe. Here’s the spark: Recent polls from their own side show a generic Republican trailing by just two points. With United States Senator Tina Smith retiring, this seat is open for the first time in decades. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential race since Nixon in ’72, but the tide’s turning—Trump’s legacy is firing up folks like you, retired patriots who’ve built lives on hard work and faith. We can flip this seat, secure the Republican Senate majority, and give President Trump the muscle to drain the swamp for good. I’m running to cut taxes, back our police, secure the border, and defend the values you’ve spent your life upholding—family, faith, and freedom. We’re the underdogs, no question. Minnesota’s been blue since the days of dial-up internet. But I’ve led missions through worse odds—high-stakes ops where one mistake meant everything. Our last fundraising push got us halfway to our goal, but with Q4 filings looming and Flanagan raking in cash from coastal elites, You—retired vets, churchgoers, grandparents who’ve paid your dues—can fuel the ads, the door-knockers, the momentum to shock the system. - You’ve got a choice. Delete this and let Democrats keep choking our future. Or stand with a battle-hardened SEAL ready to fight—not with noise, but with the quiet professionalism that wins wars. Help me make it real. Because we built this country on sacrifice and resolve, and we’re not done fighting. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Because of them, we are tied in the polls and ahead of our projections in New Jersey, and this race is 100% winnable.
Right now, my grassroots team is on the ground chasing mail-in ballots and preparing to launch our massive get out the vote program to **FLIP New Jersey** **from Blue to RED** this November, and we’re having great success.
[SPONSOR A BALLOT CHASER](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=888d1fcf75e34d129a36978d76ba30fc&_e=1BFsAFatqjwfaD_rx5LDYIUom5d9hhWgCAKIUh9g9djLnIFjU_ekwSPNKw80b2nVs1p7X94vYa2pLX63RcMRhH017U4IEak861kIzWQLBOO8n34ERc2Zln-cQ5lagv9WA6fRWizJemrQ6HFOEK5fSq9xKs7O9UFJsd0kgHcQNbKNa2GxQeht6nv5J6RGx_WBKAGGn7eQRs3Q1aA_u0s51mwE6iWcn8a6WzxtsY_--XjSUz1Dul-9c4XxEJ3jIHCagnBiWtVt-tcy6oXCiK2rgLw9L8we1yoGJvRcnjwQydj_TNrP8UsJBIJ5FItry825J0moFnLdwHfp-GauFy8oDluKiiHdq4y8vimoUTwGcYDKxz7f5vn__D2xwrjHhmFWVps4KEndM8KjtNyyc_KKd6GioS8Eclx9y6np5ujJ91MKEKbK2Oo-WzAmpepsh-nLDUtcnk14pK3Teggcn1acGGyPhVhdVHgN9Hfc3M_vaH-JrrcqEccQKdLzNFTVpFld3YxxB_BbHAylVUHGZJoye_Ry4HYueACt3vuii0M_tHnTsijhxuJBtiX7Jv8d-fo4A601QjzSmDBvGCE-JlpM8vvZgXWfhUa0k6HRbX4RAfV1-bSEs-tba6K2wN0P3T4zSzMhi30x7m-urW5HvE1QEeAUP6kuhdD8tuSCY-VMGNDFugMN9WUOfZG7B9_58fsr)
**Republicans are returning their mail in ballots at a higher rate than Democrats.** This is phenomenal news, but it’s not all good... Democrat voters have requested almost 3 TIMES as many mail-in ballots as Republicans, and they still have more votes “in the bank” than we do.
Just like in Pennsylvania in 2024 for President Trump, this year in New Jersey **_we need to hit our magic number of mail-in and early in person Republican votes cast before election day_** so we can turn out the rest of our voters and win a decisive victory on Election Day.

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Hold Antifa Accountable
body:
I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs

| |
---
| |
---
[](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkcGq2zAURL9G3slIV7IcL7xI4jib5rW8wutSXEnXicC2gqyk9O9LIP2Abg8zA4f5dbEXjHNcrx-4UO-dzZu9pTngWuKE6H16rAXdTBYENFxKLuCVkVXofUegna6ol60B0SkhdHXrO9lhQ86LCdpJ74zRwTlEMqFpCQRUsX9tSSlAatnIpjZa78C1DoTWASfBtKAQS8q1T-tG-YklPsnlhMHjVuqVSjX3t1LuG1N7BiODEVcKqdRzdJTLH09roVynfGUwqsa4HXTEOx8mro1QfNcGxbtm0thN2LRhYmp8lMVu6ZE9MTUchjP_PH0xMC-8UIiPhanhdHkTj8sd43VlanjJiFYJexjO9jjuv9n9x_n7T_t5-rI_9vx4eFeKZ2o4HoD_s69yH-6_4zzHzbRMi-uCca59WqryX088e_gbAAD__9r-jlc)
---
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs. And unless we do something to stop them today, I won't be the last. **[I'm asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me bring Antifa and its members who assaulted me to justice.](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkcGq2zAURL9G3slIV7IcL7xI4jib5rW8wutSXEnXicC2gqyk9O9LIP2Abg8zA4f5dbEXjHNcrx-4UO-dzZu9pTngWuKE6H16rAXdTBYENFxKLuCVkVXofUegna6ol60B0SkhdHXrO9lhQ86LCdpJ74zRwTlEMqFpCQRUsX9tSSlAatnIpjZa78C1DoTWASfBtKAQS8q1T-tG-YklPsnlhMHjVuqVSjX3t1LuG1N7BiODEVcKqdRzdJTLH09roVynfGUwqsa4HXTEOx8mro1QfNcGxbtm0thN2LRhYmp8lMVu6ZE9MTUchjP_PH0xMC-8UIiPhanhdHkTj8sd43VlanjJiFYJexjO9jjuv9n9x_n7T_t5-rI_9vx4eFeKZ2o4HoD_s69yH-6_4zzHzbRMi-uCca59WqryX088e_gbAAD__9r-jlc) ** **I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before. I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their "protest." As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety. The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks. I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on. **People like you needed to know what was happening.** But I didn't go unnoticed for long. Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush. "F*** you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!" **Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles.** Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects. I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn't have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you. That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law. Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. [**Will you donate $35 or more to help me hold Antifa accountable?**](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkcGq2zAURL9G3slIV7IcL7xI4jib5rW8wutSXEnXicC2gqyk9O9LIP2Abg8zA4f5dbEXjHNcrx-4UO-dzZu9pTngWuKE6H16rAXdTBYENFxKLuCVkVXofUegna6ol60B0SkhdHXrO9lhQ86LCdpJ74zRwTlEMqFpCQRUsX9tSSlAatnIpjZa78C1DoTWASfBtKAQS8q1T-tG-YklPsnlhMHjVuqVSjX3t1LuG1N7BiODEVcKqdRzdJTLH09roVynfGUwqsa4HXTEOx8mro1QfNcGxbtm0thN2LRhYmp8lMVu6ZE9MTUchjP_PH0xMC-8UIiPhanhdHkTj8sd43VlanjJiFYJexjO9jjuv9n9x_n7T_t5-rI_9vx4eFeKZ2o4HoD_s69yH-6_4zzHzbRMi-uCca59WqryX088e_gbAAD__9r-jlc) This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day. I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing. **No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned.** It's not much of a surprise, though. Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That's why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages - but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime. So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment. Unfortunately it's going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice. [**That's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my efforts to hold Antifa and its members accountable.**](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkcGq2zAURL9G3slIV7IcL7xI4jib5rW8wutSXEnXicC2gqyk9O9LIP2Abg8zA4f5dbEXjHNcrx-4UO-dzZu9pTngWuKE6H16rAXdTBYENFxKLuCVkVXofUegna6ol60B0SkhdHXrO9lhQ86LCdpJ74zRwTlEMqFpCQRUsX9tSSlAatnIpjZa78C1DoTWASfBtKAQS8q1T-tG-YklPsnlhMHjVuqVSjX3t1LuG1N7BiODEVcKqdRzdJTLH09roVynfGUwqsa4HXTEOx8mro1QfNcGxbtm0thN2LRhYmp8lMVu6ZE9MTUchjP_PH0xMC-8UIiPhanhdHkTj8sd43VlanjJiFYJexjO9jjuv9n9x_n7T_t5-rI_9vx4eFeKZ2o4HoD_s69yH-6_4zzHzbRMi-uCca59WqryX088e_gbAAD__9r-jlc) We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse - open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order. By any means necessary. **_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem._** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They're doing it now against ICE. It's a sick strategy, but very smart - because so far, they've been successful. **For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences. **So now I'm taking justice into my own hands - with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty.**

[**You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.**](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkcGq2zAURL9G3slIV7IcL7xI4jib5rW8wutSXEnXicC2gqyk9O9LIP2Abg8zA4f5dbEXjHNcrx-4UO-dzZu9pTngWuKE6H16rAXdTBYENFxKLuCVkVXofUegna6ol60B0SkhdHXrO9lhQ86LCdpJ74zRwTlEMqFpCQRUsX9tSSlAatnIpjZa78C1DoTWASfBtKAQS8q1T-tG-YklPsnlhMHjVuqVSjX3t1LuG1N7BiODEVcKqdRzdJTLH09roVynfGUwqsa4HXTEOx8mro1QfNcGxbtm0thN2LRhYmp8lMVu6ZE9MTUchjP_PH0xMC-8UIiPhanhdHkTj8sd43VlanjJiFYJexjO9jjuv9n9x_n7T_t5-rI_9vx4eFeKZ2o4HoD_s69yH-6_4zzHzbRMi-uCca59WqryX088e_gbAAD__9r-jlc) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to help me get justice from Antifa?](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkcGq2zAURL9G3slIV7IcL7xI4jib5rW8wutSXEnXicC2gqyk9O9LIP2Abg8zA4f5dbEXjHNcrx-4UO-dzZu9pTngWuKE6H16rAXdTBYENFxKLuCVkVXofUegna6ol60B0SkhdHXrO9lhQ86LCdpJ74zRwTlEMqFpCQRUsX9tSSlAatnIpjZa78C1DoTWASfBtKAQS8q1T-tG-YklPsnlhMHjVuqVSjX3t1LuG1N7BiODEVcKqdRzdJTLH09roVynfGUwqsa4HXTEOx8mro1QfNcGxbtm0thN2LRhYmp8lMVu6ZE9MTUchjP_PH0xMC-8UIiPhanhdHkTj8sd43VlanjJiFYJexjO9jjuv9n9x_n7T_t5-rI_9vx4eFeKZ2o4HoD_s69yH-6_4zzHzbRMi-uCca59WqryX088e_gbAAD__9r-jlc) ** Please don't wait - if we don't fight back and win now, **these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America** , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support.
---

clean_body: I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs | | | | My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs. And unless we do something to stop them today, I won't be the last. I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019. This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before. I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their "protest." As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety. The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks. I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on. People like you needed to know what was happening. But I didn't go unnoticed for long. Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush. "F* you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!" Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles. Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects. I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn't have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you. That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law. Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day. I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing. No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned. It's not much of a surprise, though. Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That's why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages - but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime. So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment. Unfortunately it's going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice. We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse - open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order. By any means necessary. Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They're doing it now against ICE. It's a sick strategy, but very smart - because so far, they've been successful. For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free. Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences. So now I'm taking justice into my own hands - with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. Please don't wait - if we don't fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. | | Sincerely, | | Andy Ngo | | | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. body:
Please read my letter.
| **_A LETTER FROM THE DESK OF REP. JIM JORDAN_**
---
Peter,
---
Over the last month, Democrats have picked up two seats in special elections.
---
**Republicans are now just _ONE_ _SEAT_ over the threshold to declare a majority in the House. **
---
_That means we have almost NO ROOM for error anymore..._
---
_In the midterms, we need to not just DEFEND every single Republican seat, but we need to take the offensive to FLIP Democrat seats as well!_
---
Look – I’ll be honest with you: Our Republican House majority is the KEY to passing President Trump’s America First agenda.
---
If we lose it, the Democrats will be able to sabotage everything we’re trying to do, and they won’t stop there...
---
These radicals will attempt to IMPEACH President Trump and bring our country straight back to the days of the failed Biden-Harris agenda.
---
**Given how critical the House Majority is, I’m making you a solemn promise...**
---
I’m going to do EVERYTHING in my power to help Republicans DEFEND our razor-thin majority so we can continue Making America Great Again!
---
_...But I’m humble enough to know this isn’t a battle I can win on my own._
---
That’s why I’m asking you, Peter:
---
_**Will you stand with me and House GOP Leadership Chair Elise Stefanik today by pledging a grassroots contribution to help DEFEND President Trump’s House majority?**_
---

Republicans are now just ONE SEAT over the threshold to declare a majority in the House. That means we have almost NO ROOM for error anymore... In the midterms, we need to not just DEFEND every single Republican seat, but we need to take the offensive to FLIP Democrat seats as well! Look – I’ll be honest with you: Our Republican House majority is the KEY to passing President Trump’s America First agenda. If we lose it, the Democrats will be able to sabotage everything we’re trying to do, and they won’t stop there... These radicals will attempt to IMPEACH President Trump and bring our country straight back to the days of the failed Biden-Harris agenda. Given how critical the House Majority is, I’m making you a solemn promise... I’m going to do EVERYTHING in my power to help Republicans DEFEND our razor-thin majority so we can continue Making America Great Again! ...But I’m humble enough to know this isn’t a battle I can win on my own. That’s why I’m asking you, Peter: Will you stand with me and House GOP Leadership Chair Elise Stefanik today by pledging a grassroots contribution to help DEFEND President Trump’s House majority? Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

The Freedom Caucus Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization that engages in research, training, and educational activities that advance understandings of freedom and liberty in our constitutional republic. The Foundation is a charitable organization run by an independent board and is neither controlled nor operated by any elected official, politician, or political organization. No government funds are used for this mission, and we greatly thank our valued donors who support our educational efforts. All references to elected officials are purely as special guests and thought leaders for policy and should not be viewed as an endorsement by the Foundation. To advance its educational mission, the Foundation plans to work annually in cooperation and conjunction with elected officials to speak on legislation and policy matters.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Counter the Left’s secular interpretation of this most blessed season
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1287248/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvQWtZSFhTWGh3bQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMDI/LbmNsWjFOdFBsMw/qP2hpZHM9bmNxNjFoeHBFVXBHMHJscw/gaQdpGg/s2n89d7c92a)
| |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention. Because **BRAVE Books** is facing a real Christmas crunch. And as one of our best supporters in our mission to instill conservative values in children using high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment... **[...I thought you’d want to be one of the first to know what’s going on.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) ** **Fellow Conservative, BRAVE Books** has introduced _Mouse in the House_ as a Christian alternative to that other secular “Christmas” game where parents hide a stuffed elf around the house to “spy” on the children to make sure they behave well to earn Santa’s gifts. My friends at**BRAVE Books** knew families deserved something better to teach the true meaning of Christmas. So, they created _Mouse in the House_ to help parents emphasize the joy of _giving_ more than _getting_ in this most blessed season. And boy, did parents respond. The first year it was introduced,___Mouse in the House_ sold out in THREE HOURS! Fellow Conservative, I know it’s only November, but this year we don’t want to turn any families away because of unexpectedly high demand.
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| **BRAVE Books** is ramping up production big-time and fast. **[And today I’m hoping you’ll contribute to our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign by rushing back your one-time gift in the next 24 hours.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Friend, you’re one of our best supporters and I’m so grateful.
---
| | **BRAVE Books** is ramping up production big-time and fast. [And today I’m hoping you’ll contribute to our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign by rushing back your one-time gift in the next 24 hours. ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Fellow Conservative, you’re one of our best supporters and I’m so grateful.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | You understand that **BRAVE Books** is fighting to restore our culture because we can’t just give up and let the radicals erase America’s Judeo-Christian values. >>> Your support has already helped get “See You at the Library” kits to thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens who gathered at over 201 libraries in 46 states (including the Library of Congress!) to take back our libraries. Together, we countered the Left’s radical and ungodly “Drag Queen Story Hours” and filled children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. >>> Your last gift helped us finish filming TWO whole seasons of our historic TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk.” This is the very first television show funded by everyday Americans to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” is our modern day “Mr. Rogers’ Neighborhood” that uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great. >>> And now you are the difference between success and failure with our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign. Just look at what parents have already said about our _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle that comes with a beautiful book and adorable stuffed mouse:
---
_“So thankful for a thoughtful new Christmas tradition for our children. The story is sweet, the explanation of Christmas is poignant, and the mouse is so adorable. Thank you, Brave Books!!!” — Jenae K._ _“I love the Godly service ideas!” – Susan_ _“I love the Mouse in the House. The giving nature of the story reflects the theme of the Christmas season.” – Kat F._
---
**Fellow Conservative, parents are hungry for Godly content that helps them counter the wicked culture.** **And your support helps BRAVE Books supply it.** **[Your gift of $35, $50 or even $100 not only helps fund our “ _More Mouse in the House_ _!_ ” campaign... ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Your gift helps **BRAVE Books** complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools. Fellow Conservative, nothing we accomplish is possible without you. And that’s why as a thank you for being such a faithful and faith-filled friend, when you contribute $100 or more to our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign... ...we will send one out to you absolutely free. You can keep the _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle for your family, you can gift it to someone you love... ...or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn’t have a Christian role model in their life. [**Friend, what’s most important is that you rush back your best gift of $35, $50, or even $100 in the next 24 hours.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) **BRAVE Books** is working round the clock to get enough _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundles produced and all the orders filled in time. Fellow Conservative, THANK YOU for helping. **BRAVE Books** would have no chance of beating Hollywood, giant left-leaning publishers, and big government-funded libraries and schools without you. Thank you for taking a minute to help with our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign. You’re bringing the true meaning of Christmas to families all across America. Thank you and may God bless you and God bless America,
---
| | Sincerely,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
P.S. Fellow Conservative, it’s only November and we’re already in a Christmas crunch! Families are clamoring for our _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle to counter the Left’s secular interpretation of this most blessed season. [**Your donation of $35, $50, or even $100 helps us fill all our Mouse in the House orders in time to help parents teach giving not getting this Christmas.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) And as a thank you for your gift of $100 or more we’ll send you your very own _Mouse in the House_ for your family! Thank you! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
|
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**Brave Books** 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite C Conroe, TX 77301
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---|---|---
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1287248/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMDI/LbmNsWjFOdFBsMw/qP2hpZHM9bmNxNjFoeHBFVXBHMHJscw/gaQdpGg/s3s2fb304e3)

name: VoteVets
subject: We’re going to be fighting uphill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
America needs to hear from Veterans and Military Families if we’re going to avoid another needless war. And for that to happen, VoteVets needs to raise a significant amount of resources to have the maximum impact possible.
#
Peter,
Today, we are respectfully asking you to donate to VoteVets. If that’s all you need to hear, use this link: [**https://act.votevets.org/go/Stop-The-DOW**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov25.xqPykj&refcode=em251102-1-120&t=1&akid=34741%2E3013755%2EHyrz3T)
But if you’d like to hear why that donation is so important, please, let us explain.
The primary reason for this request is that Donald Trump and his Department of Forever War are trying to kick off a new one with Venezuela.
In the fight against that war, the voices of Veterans are going to be pivotal.
Right now, we’re mobilizing to stop it from happening. Pressure across all fronts.
If Trump begins that war without ever coming to Congress for permission, he will be in blatant violation of the Constitution. We’ll be working every angle to ensure Trump faces consequences for those actions. And across the country, you will see a massive upswell of Veterans of the last Forever Wars speaking out against Trump and his new Forever War.
VoteVets is one of the most important organizations in the country on each of these fronts. America needs to hear from Veterans and Military Families if we’re going to avoid another needless war. And for that to happen, VoteVets needs to raise a significant amount of resources.
That’s why we’re asking you to chip in. And if you’ve heard enough, please:
[**Make a donation to VoteVets. Anything helps, and it all adds up fast.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov25.xqPykj&refcode=em251102-1-120&t=2&akid=34741%2E3013755%2EHyrz3T)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| | **[Rush $50 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2928?c0=vv-pac-em-nov25.Y7xT3D&refcode=em251102-1-120&t=23&akid=34741%2E3013755%2EHyrz3T)**

Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

clean_body: It's not! You can register AT the polls on Tuesday.| | | Friend, Think it's too late to register to vote? It's not! If you are not yet registered to vote you can register at the polls and cast your provisional ballot at your assigned location on Election Day this coming Tuesday. 👉 Already registered? Great!** Find your polling location below and VOTE this Tuesday. Even better — bring your eligible unregistered loved ones with you: • Adult children and relatives who haven't registered yet • Neighbors who thought they had missed the deadline• Anyone eligible to vote who wants to defend our Commonwealth They can register to vote for Jason Miyares directly at their assigned polling location! | | | | | | | | | | Don't let anyone miss their chance to keep Virginia safe and re-elect the Attorney General who has delivered real results for all of our families. Let's bring everyone to the polls on Tuesday, Lauren, Team Miyares** | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Sitting ducks
subject: MAGA unveils Manhattan Project to kill Dem party
body:
If ever there was a moment we needed a rallying moment from every Democrat everywhere, this is it
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cJwZ4KQCdrHGbYimLi1TjM0jj1nrdQKMOlmC7IUMfVMk9EVPEaWnVyDF2c9lOgowoTIefki4-P-gUOYOa_s87ZUs-xlY5hIsqO7GR8POuER6-eKnhuVd7SEt9_3cfPwPnhsHcY-w_EhUhEvUUKLsqY8cLuJaqrBH-mQTHTrhjP7lc6huXa07qyYkZ2SG7MHpOdqi0StW6CT8xXDB6QzSK4cLZvVa-qrwYonSH05rMUy_VMAauvxGSA==&c=i6o3gP_aCiWAA9-cPev8KGVFO2QJk-KRrE4zOu01kiyWqrGJV3nHNg==&ch=YiePvjBgG-JR8svA8bXSIieF2ePwno7GVi07XpAbbj2Mm5hMYeDcJA==)
---
| Peter,
This is an all hands on deck emergency.
Earlier this Fall, MAGA-aligned groups unleashed, "Project Doorstrike", a Manhattan project-esque secret weapon giving them an unprecedented edge in their blitzkrieg push to win the obscure but critically important 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court reelection.
This little known race will determine whether or not Democrats retain their 3-vote majority on the Supreme Court Race. Losing this majority means that MAGA will ensure that Democrats never win Pennsylvania's 19 electoral college votes again, and the GOP is laser focused on winning this:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cJwZ4KQCdrHGbYimLi1TjM0jj1nrdQKMOlmC7IUMfVMk9EVPEaWnVyDF2c9lOgowoTIefki4-P-gUOYOa_s87ZUs-xlY5hIsqO7GR8POuER6-eKnhuVd7SEt9_3cfPwPnhsHcY-w_EhUhEvUUKLsqY8cLuJaqrBH-mQTHTrhjP7lc6huXa07qyYkZ2SG7MHpOdqi0StW6CT8xXDB6QzSK4cLZvVa-qrwQn9L8GnynLrteYV1yqG-Qw==&c=i6o3gP_aCiWAA9-cPev8KGVFO2QJk-KRrE4zOu01kiyWqrGJV3nHNg==&ch=YiePvjBgG-JR8svA8bXSIieF2ePwno7GVi07XpAbbj2Mm5hMYeDcJA==)
---
| Screengrab of "Project Doorstrike" memo from the Republican State Leadership Committee's website, revealing their plan to unseat 3 Democratic justices in PA's Supreme Court election this November.
---
| | | | Project Doorstrike has blanketed PA with canvassers, GOP voter registration drives, and a GOTV turnout machine that can swamp Dems and flip three Democratic-held state supreme court seats in one fell swoop.
Republicans know they are weak during Midterm and off-year elections and they know that the next opportunity that voters have to hit back is the Pennsylvania Supreme Court election this November 4th, now less than 48 hours away and they are leaving nothing to chance.
We won big in Wisconsin this year - but only because of massive media attention, huge spending from the national Dem party, and the support of millions of grassroots donors from across the country.
There is no similar effort now. We are forced to take on "Project Doorstrike" with only a portion of the resources MAGA has--and with three Dem justices up for retention, the stakes are 3x as high as Wisconsin's race.
We are being overrun and unless we can counter Project Doorstrike this is going to kill the Democratic party by ensuring that we never win a Presidential election again.
[Defend Our Courts is on the verge of something big, but we can't save these judges without everyone pitching in and doing what they can to help. We have only 48 hours left to mount a counteroffensive to beat MAGA's Project Doorstrike. Can you rush a contribution right now to stop Project Doorstrike before it's too late?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cJwZ4KQCdrHGbYimLi1TjM0jj1nrdQKMOlmC7IUMfVMk9EVPEaWnVyDF2c9lOgowoTIefki4-P-gUOYOa_s87ZUs-xlY5hIsqO7GR8POuER6-eKnhuVd7SEt9_3cfPwPnhsHcY-w_EhUhEvUUKLsqY8cLuJaqrBH-mQTHTrhjP7lc6huXa07qyYkZ2SG7MHpOdqi0StW6CT8xXDB6QzSK4cLZvVa-qrwgsUd9b3EI3Fj2RTak3HFdw==&c=i6o3gP_aCiWAA9-cPev8KGVFO2QJk-KRrE4zOu01kiyWqrGJV3nHNg==&ch=YiePvjBgG-JR8svA8bXSIieF2ePwno7GVi07XpAbbj2Mm5hMYeDcJA==)

name: Sitting ducks
subject: MAGA unveils Manhattan Project to kill Dem party
body:
If ever there was a moment we needed a rallying moment from every Democrat everywhere, this is it
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pMgAGfEqcYIy7_45Jl7PCNR5y3SoGvk8kjgiaZ4ALVYQIpGJPN4VmNJVegIGCe1EXx0NelIkuEhKq6jcgkLMxoupssUlMP_yMPYtPvujOsCGye90rQ0JEF6JFMhLEKNOi65WuQD635lC2JIm7qKTO_C5tRf4C-Pccbwr0n1ProhF0oY8Bk9sAre6E6PSSpKpffO9MpYwv1ntE2bg-cnuj7T_eb5w92CSE8yAPiuhbEufFur_Z7ERtg==&c=d7OYyoWbYvDU-Eikn4ZtVzceHWNjCk8st_0HFezYH3Q3cQcnLU3jDg==&ch=j3wsaJIRTrZsjmB-sKDptXCkU45DQyT8GueHaO5poFmV38wOJr3mYw==)
---
| Peter,
This is an all hands on deck emergency.
Earlier this Fall, MAGA-aligned groups unleashed, "Project Doorstrike", a Manhattan project-esque secret weapon giving them an unprecedented edge in their blitzkrieg push to win the obscure but critically important 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court reelection.
This little known race will determine whether or not Democrats retain their 3-vote majority on the Supreme Court Race. Losing this majority means that MAGA will ensure that Democrats never win Pennsylvania's 19 electoral college votes again, and the GOP is laser focused on winning this:

| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pMgAGfEqcYIy7_45Jl7PCNR5y3SoGvk8kjgiaZ4ALVYQIpGJPN4VmNJVegIGCe1EXx0NelIkuEhKq6jcgkLMxoupssUlMP_yMPYtPvujOsCGye90rQ0JEF6JFMhLEKNOi65WuQD635lC2JIm7qKTO_C5tRf4C-Pccbwr0n1ProhF0oY8Bk9sAre6E6PSSpKpffO9MpYwv1ntE2bg-cnuj7T_eb5w92CSKs7yEZzgo-GR3j8Sbz5NOQ==&c=d7OYyoWbYvDU-Eikn4ZtVzceHWNjCk8st_0HFezYH3Q3cQcnLU3jDg==&ch=j3wsaJIRTrZsjmB-sKDptXCkU45DQyT8GueHaO5poFmV38wOJr3mYw==)

| Screengrab of "Project Doorstrike" memo from the Republican State Leadership Committee's website, revealing their plan to unseat 3 Democratic justices in PA's Supreme Court election this November.
---
| | | | Project Doorstrike has blanketed PA with canvassers, GOP voter registration drives, and a GOTV turnout machine that can swamp Dems and flip three Democratic-held state supreme court seats in one fell swoop.
Republicans know they are weak during Midterm and off-year elections and they know that the next opportunity that voters have to hit back is the Pennsylvania Supreme Court election this November 4th, now less than 48 hours away and they are leaving nothing to chance.
We won big in Wisconsin this year - but only because of massive media attention, huge spending from the national Dem party, and the support of millions of grassroots donors from across the country.
There is no similar effort now. We are forced to take on "Project Doorstrike" with only a portion of the resources MAGA has--and with three Dem justices up for retention, the stakes are 3x as high as Wisconsin's race.
We are being overrun and unless we can counter Project Doorstrike this is going to kill the Democratic party by ensuring that we never win a Presidential election again.
[Defend Our Courts is on the verge of something big, but we can't save these judges without everyone pitching in and doing what they can to help. We have only 48 hours left to mount a counteroffensive to beat MAGA's Project Doorstrike. Can you rush a contribution right now to stop Project Doorstrike before it's too late?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pMgAGfEqcYIy7_45Jl7PCNR5y3SoGvk8kjgiaZ4ALVYQIpGJPN4VmNJVegIGCe1EXx0NelIkuEhKq6jcgkLMxoupssUlMP_yMPYtPvujOsCGye90rQ0JEF6JFMhLEKNOi65WuQD635lC2JIm7qKTO_C5tRf4C-Pccbwr0n1ProhF0oY8Bk9sAre6E6PSSpKpffO9MpYwv1ntE2bg-cnuj7T_eb5w92CSzUcX2TSDtS_ArvK84mpyrQ==&c=d7OYyoWbYvDU-Eikn4ZtVzceHWNjCk8st_0HFezYH3Q3cQcnLU3jDg==&ch=j3wsaJIRTrZsjmB-sKDptXCkU45DQyT8GueHaO5poFmV38wOJr3mYw==)

Because of them, we are tied in the polls and ahead of our projections in New Jersey, and this race is 100% winnable.
Right now, my grassroots team is on the ground chasing mail-in ballots and preparing to launch our massive get out the vote program to **FLIP New Jersey** **from Blue to RED** this November, and we’re having great success.
[SPONSOR A BALLOT CHASER](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=687ca4f6ed8644fe91307d52b6f162ec&_e=ji90ZL0l5_T6G3vuchzYDrxLcUEr2ifz1a6Btjbai3HE2RmEkEV-S6CHk-RFXkKgkqaAaShlO-Hhyfh-ajPYk1DhbLWhjewBMd-3W3EAphhIQnKBP1WXj8SyIyPUz6kQhEL08GJxo9k4V4jUZQwkNF0g7K-Nsj4F3jvqr2O-l8zu-uehKDdjvBVhlQiVLEe-PVkwjwn6m73pmwa-xqURlk_mEKPvGRPDkPdupSgEolcnwdnZXzd1z0DoYFlLbCp1QffVr1w2fIjASmJZusWkaDyoCUhNrNcYiHxMz55Mo93Ou8muU-qcREc9ezuJJON0vf9q30p-n9TT92-GuElbVZ2YieZtppdi6zHEWm-CZIeBOPPJRgiGwh01Tn74pu-2UpHiiUpsseF-pEERgiznrM4h3gredPCs3T6-H5TtS3dW2_ZjKJfI5MJYzVOF-6Vkq4-7hQfJB6G-4Ip5adPr8HB1meV9AFt01V3g8WT-BulT6VrRAfEHFHmvm-DtIlC74ZzXweALvxhPtfMxZykgO7fYsjmVZr_4oMTaIj3X-tqTs3zkvV7GhAxAbLi0OpOlIWZobfC1q0a_cbTe12SwbNlt89lasllxGfslHbY2ElOU8823OZ-LHX9krardIcQPLfpiuph6lG_PbK_d2_gU2r0UQJ0w4pQFj3JLSRElbkIbD-ON_T_rxd7KgbHDti9i)
**Republicans are returning their mail in ballots at a higher rate than Democrats.** This is phenomenal news, but it’s not all good... Democrat voters have requested almost 3 TIMES as many mail-in ballots as Republicans, and they still have more votes “in the bank” than we do.
Just like in Pennsylvania in 2024 for President Trump, this year in New Jersey **_we need to hit our magic number of mail-in and early in person Republican votes cast before election day_** so we can turn out the rest of our voters and win a decisive victory on Election Day.
We truly don’t have a moment to waste... in-person Early Voting begins on October 25th, mail-in voting ends on October 28th, and Election Day is November 4th.

clean_body: We have just 2 days left to chase ballots | | | | | Peter, before I get into the latest from New Jersey, I want to who have stepped up to fund a voter registration staffer or ballot chaser this year. Because of them, we are tied in the polls and ahead of our projections in New Jersey, and this race is 100% winnable. Right now, my grassroots team is on the ground chasing mail-in ballots and preparing to launch our massive get out the vote program to FLIP New Jersey from Blue to RED this November, and we’re having great success. Republicans are returning their mail in ballots at a higher rate than Democrats. This is phenomenal news, but it’s not all good... Democrat voters have requested almost 3 TIMES as many mail-in ballots as Republicans, and they still have more votes “in the bank” than we do. Just like in Pennsylvania in 2024 for President Trump, this year in New Jersey we need to hit our magic number of mail-in and early in person Republican votes cast before election day so we can turn out the rest of our voters and win a decisive victory on Election Day. We truly don’t have a moment to waste... in-person Early Voting begins on October 25th, mail-in voting ends on October 28th, and Election Day is November 4th. Peter, the momentum is on our side, and the early returns are looking very good, but we have a lot of work to do in the next few weeks if we’re going to flip the Garden State red. We need your help to make the difference. By sponsoring an Early Vote Action staffer, you’re fueling the grassroots work to flip New Jersey RED in 2025. . In Liberty, Scott Presler | | | | | Paid for by Early Vote Action New Jersey Inc. 111 Town Square Place, Suite 1201, Jersey City, NJ 07310. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. |

subject: Investigation into Donald Trump?? (FINALLY!!)

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23565%2E4449941%2EVHvp5C) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23565%2E4449941%2EVHvp5C) Team – **This could be a real turning point!!! **

Senator Elizabeth Warren just launched a MAJOR investigation into the media companies that pulled Jimmy Kimmel off the air for _simply standing up to Donald Trump._ []() [ **Add your name to our National Petition ASAP if you support Senator Warren’s investigation → **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69739?t=3&akid=23565%2E4449941%2EVHvp5C) | [ADD MY NAME →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69739?t=4&akid=23565%2E4449941%2EVHvp5C)
---
* * *
Listen up, team – this is huge...

Jimmy Kimmel reported the TRUTH on Donald Trump’s administration, and immediately, major networks pulled his show off the air.

After IMMENSE public backlash, Kimmel’s show was put back on the air.

[**But two of the largest broadcast companies were STILL REFUSING to air his show!!! **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69739?t=5&akid=23565%2E4449941%2EVHvp5C)

Why? [ **Because they’re counting on Donald Trump to sign off on a $6 BILLION business deal.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69739?t=6&akid=23565%2E4449941%2EVHvp5C)

Senator Warren put it perfectly, friend:
[]()
[ **She’s absolutely right!!! ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69739?t=7&akid=23565%2E4449941%2EVHvp5C)

This entire deal has corruption written all over it. That’s why top Democrats are now DEMANDING answers – but they need strong support from the American people to keep the pressure on.

Look, we’re sending this petition at 8AM _tomorrow_ , but we’re still missing [438] signatures from Democrats in your area!

So please, team: [**Add your name to our National Petition if you support Senator Warren’s investigation → **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69739?t=8&akid=23565%2E4449941%2EVHvp5C)
[ADD MY NAME →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69739?t=9&akid=23565%2E4449941%2EVHvp5C)
---
We’re in this together,

Fight For Reform

I'm writing to you today with a thought I wanted to share with you. As I reflect on how far we've come in this campaign, I've realized what my biggest regret would be.
I hate asking for donations; it's one of the worst parts of any campaign. But the support from you and so many patriots across the country are the key to winning this CRUCIAL race.
So the fact is, if I've realize that if we came all this way, and I could look back knowing that I could've done more, that would be my biggest regret. I know that I would always regret if I hadn't taken a chance to ask for your help when it matters most.[DONATE TODAY >>

clean_body: , I'm writing to you today with a thought I wanted to share with you. As I reflect on how far we've come in this campaign, I've realized what my biggest regret would be. I hate asking for donations; it's one of the worst parts of any campaign. But the support from you and so many patriots across the country are the key to winning this CRUCIAL race. So the fact is, if I've realize that if we came all this way, and I could look back knowing that I could've done more, that would be my biggest regret. I know that I would always regret if I hadn't taken a chance to ask for your help when it matters most. I hadn't sent this email, I would regret not giving you the opportunity to stand with me against the liberal agenda that's threatening our nation. I would regret not giving you the chance to make a difference in the fight for our values, our freedom, and our Commonwealth. support will help me continue to fight for what we believe in, and it will give us the resources we need to take on my Democrat opponent and her liberal megadonors. I know that I'm not alone in this fight. I know that there are thousands of conservatives like you who are willing to stand up for what's right. And I know that together, we can make a real difference. But I need your help to make it happen. I need your contribution to help me and my team ensure we have the resources we need to spread our message and win this CLOSE and CRITICAL electionI refuse to look back and regret not doing everything I could to defend our values. Please don't sit on the sidelines, Peter! Sincerely,Winsome Earle-Sears| . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. Hi Peter, Jose here. First, I want to personally thank you for standing by my side through another critical end-of-month push. I truly mean it when I say — without supporters like you, our campaign wouldn't stand a fighting chance against my opponent, James Uthmeier, and the special interests bankrolling his campaign. Now, if you've been following the news lately, you know that in just two days, there are critical elections happening everywhere across the country, including a few down-ballot races right here in Florida. **[Whether you’re voting in 2025 or 2026, I want to take this moment to ask you to join me and pledge to vote for democracy defenders and leaders who put people first up and down the ballot:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118507860/579980465/-1195098130?refcode=em_JJR_PET_PledgeToVote_110225_B&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTgyNTkzOTktZmNiNy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fQzpb8GqqQHFyvxEpbygS45H8TD1zKx9yKLySQVaUIM=&emci=71cc4a5d-aeb6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e8259399-fcb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=32374386)** | **[TAKE THE PLEDGE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118507868/579980473/-1195098130?refcode=em_JJR_PET_PledgeToVote_110225_B&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTgyNTkzOTktZmNiNy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fQzpb8GqqQHFyvxEpbygS45H8TD1zKx9yKLySQVaUIM=&emci=71cc4a5d-aeb6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e8259399-fcb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=32374386) **

Our democracy is on thin ice. We have a president who ignores the Constitution, and leaders here in Florida like Ron DeSantis and James Uthmeier who put profits and political theater over our freedoms.
**The only way to truly fight back is to elect more pro-democracy leaders at every level of government.**
Although I won't be on the ballot until next year, we need to show our support for candidates who stand for justice and respect the Constitution.
**[Every voice matters. So today, I'm asking you to stand with me and take this pledge to vote in 2025 and beyond for leaders who will fight for the people and defend our democracy>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118507875/579980484/-1195098130?refcode=em_JJR_PET_PledgeToVote_110225_B&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTgyNTkzOTktZmNiNy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fQzpb8GqqQHFyvxEpbygS45H8TD1zKx9yKLySQVaUIM=&emci=71cc4a5d-aeb6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e8259399-fcb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=32374386)**

The only way to truly fight back is to elect more pro-democracy leaders at every level of government. Although I won't be on the ballot until next year, we need to show our support for candidates who stand for justice and respect the Constitution. Onward, Jose Javier Rodriguez = = | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. Howard Avenue #106-813 Tampa, FL 33606

My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is virtually tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---

clean_body: I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea.| | | | I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. | | | | My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is virtually tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Fellow American, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!" If you can't afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, "please keep me and my team in your prayers and add your endorsement today:" I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward, Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. body:
While Republicans are drawing lines to silence people, we’re drawing the line, too.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118508145/579981283/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwNDliYzc1LWZjYjctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cG0BkmQ6K9iYs05LY5V7pwr2M_RY-ABEx4yJqPObyOU=&emci=da35fbe0-96b6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7049bc75-fcb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)

Peter, Right now, the fair maps movement is in court, fighting the gerrymandered map that Texas Republicans forced through at the behest of Donald Trump. And for good reason. A new analysis finds that their map is a “statistical outlier” and that the architects of this map intentionally drew it along racial lines. This shameful strategy — known as “cracking and packing” — is designed to intentionally push voters of color into one district to dilute their votes and minimize their voting power. It’s a tactic that’s been used to deprive voters of color of their voice since the Jim Crow era. **While craven politicians draw lines to protect their power, something else is happening: Across the country, voters are drawing their own lines in the sand to fight for transparency and fairness in our democracy.** [**The NDRC is fighting back in battleground states to fight for fair representation. But the truth is, our resources are stretched thin considering how frequently our democracy is under attack this year. Please, chip in with a donation of $30 or whatever you can to power this work fighting for a democracy we all deserve.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118508155/579981358/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TXMapAnalysis_email_20251102-NDRC-Tier1-TXMapAnalysis_A&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251102-NDRC-Tier1-TXMapAnalysis_A&utm_campaign=TXMapAnalysis&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwNDliYzc1LWZjYjctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cG0BkmQ6K9iYs05LY5V7pwr2M_RY-ABEx4yJqPObyOU=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: While Republicans are drawing lines to silence people, we’re drawing the line, too. | Peter, Right now, the fair maps movement is in court, fighting the gerrymandered map that Texas Republicans forced through at the behest of Donald Trump. And for good reason. A new analysis finds that their map is a “statistical outlier” and that the architects of this map intentionally drew it along racial lines. This shameful strategy — known as “cracking and packing” — is designed to intentionally push voters of color into one district to dilute their votes and minimize their voting power. It’s a tactic that’s been used to deprive voters of color of their voice since the Jim Crow era. While craven politicians draw lines to protect their power, something else is happening: Across the country, voters are drawing their own lines in the sand to fight for transparency and fairness in our democracy. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = — Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Roy Cooper for Senate HQ
subject: Good morning, Peter
body:
Good morning, Peter. We hope you’ve had a safe and happy weekend so far.

We’re not here to ask you for another donation — we promise! But since Roy’s been so busy lately, meeting with folks all across NC, we wanted to share a little bit of what we’ve been up to. Read on for some of our most recent highlights!

Roy Cooper smiles for a photo with two people at the NC state fair: [https://x.com/RoyCooperNC/status/1981776551776526569]

Having fun at the North Carolina State Fair.

Roy Cooper wears a maroon shirt and orders from a food vendor at the NC state fair: [https://x.com/RoyCooperNC/status/1981776551776526569]

When everything on the menu looks this good, it’s tough to decide what to order.

Roy Cooper smiles for a photo with NCCU students. He's wearing a white shirt and blazer: [https://x.com/RoyCooperNC/status/1982537833089843576]

NCCU knows how to bring the energy to Homecoming!

Roy Cooper smiles for a selfie while attending homecoming at NC A&T: [https://x.com/RoyCooperNC/status/1977087098780848624]

Homecoming at NC A&T. Aggie Pride!

Roy Cooper rooting for the Carolina Hurricanes in his hockey jersey: [https://x.com/RoyCooperNC/status/1976426343991574948]

Ready to drink Sun Drop (or Mountain Dew) out of The Cup. 🏆

That’s all for now. See you next time!

- Team Cooper

Raleigh, NC 27602

Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.

Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
He needs to know he’s not alone...
| **_MAJOR BREAKING:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95776?t=6&akid=21696%2E878179%2Elwv0Ml) [**Gov. Gavin Newsom is FIGHTING ON THE FRONTLINES to save our democracy, and he needs to know he isn’t alone! Rush $3 in the next HOUR to sign our letter THANKING him before Tuesday’s special election →**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95776?t=7&akid=21696%2E878179%2Elwv0Ml) | [**DONATE $3 TO SIGN THE LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95776?t=8&akid=21696%2E878179%2Elwv0Ml)
---
TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. Dear Governor Newsom,

_Thank you so much for standing up for what’s right — even when it makes you a target for MAGA extremists!_

I refuse to sit on the sidelines while Trump attempts to STEAL the 2026 midterms.

**Thank goodness we have you leading the charge to FIGHT BACK — your new maps are inspiring Democrats in Virginia and all over the country to stop Trump.**

I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know Trump is dumping in millions to crush you on Tuesday, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice and WIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95776?t=9&akid=21696%2E878179%2Elwv0Ml) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95776?t=10&akid=21696%2E878179%2Elwv0Ml)

\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21696%2E878179%2Elwv0Ml). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21696%2E878179%2Elwv0Ml).**

name: Mikie Sherrill HQ
subject: We made a tough decision
body:
Those polls showing a close race are real, and we’re responding.

| |
---
Friend, we’ll get right to the point. A recent Emerson poll found this race tied, with tons of undecided voters. It’s not an outlier. We’ve lost count of how many polls have come out in recent weeks showing this race functionally tied. In a race this close, the last thing we can afford is for people who support Mikie Sherrill to not show up to the polls, or leave their mail-in ballot sitting on their kitchen table. Friend, we just made a decision to MASSIVELY expand our GOTV program between now and Nov. 4 — counting on money that we don’t yet have, because we’re counting on this grassroots team to come in big for us down the stretch. **[We know it’s asking a lot, but friend, we need all the help we can get in the final days of this race. ### About Nellie Pou
