body:
The entire country is watching this race
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118510183/579987237/167106798?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5632-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTZjNTI0Yy1mZGI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c6pzAwbPQz2SRGpAvG-NKkRfJvrLQC7jv6ASinjE2Tg=)
Friend, there are a couple of reasons why the entire country is watching this race:
**This is one of the first major elections after the presidential election last fall.** In that election, Donald Trump was just 6 points away from winning right here in New Jersey — making it even more clear that New Jersey is no longer the safe blue state it once was.
**I’m showing our nation a new way forward.** My opponent has shown he’ll do anything Donald Trump tells him to — no matter how much it hurts New Jersey families. I will ALWAYS put the people of this state first, friend. Leadership isn’t just following along with what some Washington politician wants. It’s doing what’s right for the people you serve, even when you get attacked for it.
**As New Jersey goes, so goes the nation.** What we do here in New Jersey will set the trend for 2026, 2028, and beyond. It’s up to us here to take a stand against Donald Trump’s incompetence and authoritarianism — and show the nation that there’s a better path forward.

clean_body: The entire country is watching this race | | | = Friend, there are a couple of reasons why the entire country is watching this race: This is one of the first major elections after the presidential election last fall. In that election, Donald Trump was just 6 points away from winning right here in New Jersey — making it even more clear that New Jersey is no longer the safe blue state it once was. I’m showing our nation a new way forward. My opponent has shown he’ll do anything Donald Trump tells him to — no matter how much it hurts New Jersey families. I will ALWAYS put the people of this state first, friend. Leadership isn’t just following along with what some Washington politician wants. It’s doing what’s right for the people you serve, even when you get attacked for it. As New Jersey goes, so goes the nation. What we do here in New Jersey will set the trend for 2026, 2028, and beyond. It’s up to us here to take a stand against Donald Trump’s incompetence and authoritarianism — and show the nation that there’s a better path forward. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to NJ Victory 2025 and Jacky Rosen will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Mikie (Use of photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.) name: Michael Bennet
subject: Sign Now: No news monopolies in CO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Rep. Neguse and I just sent a letter to the FCC – will you please co-sign to help us protect Colorado's news media?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118510198/579987285/-2054079050?code=jtk972-su-nd&refcode=jtk972-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjZjNTI0Yy1mZGI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_JPBnU9E0YfTAFBCThg70S3zbVPCtYQIFabu3HM9lRk=)
---
Friend,
Our nation was founded on the belief that the media should work in freedom, not in fear. So I'm committed to shielding Colorado's press from undue political influence – whether it's overreach from the FCC or from profit-hungry media companies trying to stay in Trump's good graces.
**That’s why I am demanding FCC Chairman Brendan Carr put the best interests of Colorado's communities over corporate profit by BLOCKING the $6.2 billion merger between Nexstar Media and TEGNA.**
**[If you already know what's at stake if this merger goes through, and you agree that the FCC must enforce anti-monopoly laws to protect the integrity of the news in our state, then will you please add your name to be one of the 10,000 grassroots signatures I need on my petition right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118510199/579987286/283732513?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk972-su-nd&refcode=jtk972-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjZjNTI0Yy1mZGI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_JPBnU9E0YfTAFBCThg70S3zbVPCtYQIFabu3HM9lRk=&emci=659938d0-82b6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=fb6c524c-fdb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)**
| | [Stop the Merger](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118510201/579987288/283732513?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk972-su-nd&refcode=jtk972-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjZjNTI0Yy1mZGI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_JPBnU9E0YfTAFBCThg70S3zbVPCtYQIFabu3HM9lRk=&emci=659938d0-82b6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=fb6c524c-fdb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)
---
Otherwise, allow me to explain:
For Colorado, the merger may consolidate our local news stations, giving Nexstar – **the corporation that pulled _Jimmy Kimmel Live!_ from its affiliate stations last month in response to Carr's threats** – near-total control over programming and the narratives on our airwaves. It jeopardizes free, fair, and accurate journalism across Colorado, risking our media becoming _even more_ nationalized, _more_ politicized, and _less_ locally based.
But across the country, the stakes are even higher. This merger would grant Nexstar ownership of 265 stations in 44 states, increasing its reach to **80% of U.S. households** – in direct violation of federal law, which caps it at 39%.
**In short, it could have devastating consequences for free speech, freedom of the press, and the free flow of information nationwide.**
_Jimmy Kimmel Live!_ only returned to the airwaves after widespread backlash from people like **you** against Brendan Carr’s dangerous attack on the First Amendment. **So before 11:59 p.m. tonight, I need you and 9,999 more supporters to raise your voices with me one more time.**
**[This monopolistic merger jeopardizes the very cornerstone of our democracy. Help me defend it now: Will you add your name as a grassroots co-signer on this petition to the FCC?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118510203/579987290/283732513?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk972-su-nd&refcode=jtk972-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjZjNTI0Yy1mZGI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_JPBnU9E0YfTAFBCThg70S3zbVPCtYQIFabu3HM9lRk=&emci=659938d0-82b6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=fb6c524c-fdb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)**
Thank you for taking action with me – in defense of our home state and our democracy.

Michael
| Bennet for Governor
PO Box 270117
Louisville, CO 80027
United States **Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore.** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/p/eM96_n8vkEqD4sB1LzVS-w2?unsubscribedata=CgFGGPJ3MeQRSnakdjCykIl6m8VhTgHRhJu0zdH6qJQk6oPsevvPxjKRiHnCvtWWLXwCLzAlKSvdzbWIEh0tV6RrSkrPvM1TavzRX6XpiWYYEV33H%2BqHexWf9ztKZGCpqucdBAXkkcV76TNQ0YlL4nljgxVZYl3uffbScw12QWRvg6PuLSIhvFrXhksAbitWAZWkzm0Oj%2BI8%2Bpya20akHQgAMGpXOCjY6ZQDzFuL%2Fs4Y4IXsW9Ypl0DvzKK9FNXITyUbZd59GYC6Wec4QFxNZ7WXx7Y1bBn2nU%2FErHDJnVeloLaJn%2Bi7WqBUT2MMl2mXFw9L7pN9Zb%2BmwygoG%2BQyeI3NXoxDV%2FoquQhn3DbLvBwTXRQIoNDjMPQnVyVKhXs%2Bu0zpLTCmY9zoPM3%2Far5vAZw3r9Zo7NFowDQgyrE98zc%3D) from future emails.

name: Jay Jones
subject: Down to the wire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025]
Hi, can you believe it? We’re down to the final 48 hours.
Every call made, every door knocked, every fundraising email written — it all comes down to this.
We’ve built an incredible campaign together, all grounded in a simple idea: Virginia deserves an Attorney General that stands up for people, not against them.
Someone who will protect reproductive freedom, safeguard our voting rights, and lower costs, from grocery to housing bills.
Jason Miyares has spent the last four years doing the opposite – using the power of his office to score political points instead of helping Virginians. He’s targeted women’s health care, let corrupt corporations rip off consumers, and pandered to Donald Trump.
In these final hours, we need all the help we can get to power our get-out-the-vote push and pull ahead of Jason Miyares in this race. Can you chip in right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025?]

name: Team Green
subject: Fighting on two fronts
body:
We need government of the people, by the people, for the people.| | |
---
| | Friend, I won’t mince words: our democracy is facing a crisis on two fronts. In Washington, extremists have shut down our government, holding the paychecks of our federal workers hostage to their political games. And back home in Texas, their allies are using this chaos as cover to ram through an illegal, discriminatory gerrymander designed to silence our community's voice in Congress. It is a coordinated attack on our government and our district. I am fighting back with everything I have on both fronts, but I cannot do it alone. Today, we are pushing to build the war chest we need to win starting today. **Will you be one of our first November donors, to keep the "Fight Back" fund going and help me fight for you?** clean_body: We need government of the people, by the people, for the people.| | | | | Friend, I won’t mince words: our democracy is facing a crisis on two fronts. In Washington, extremists have shut down our government, holding the paychecks of our federal workers hostage to their political games. And back home in Texas, their allies are using this chaos as cover to ram through an illegal, discriminatory gerrymander designed to silence our community's voice in Congress. It is a coordinated attack on our government and our district. I am fighting back with everything I have on both fronts, but I cannot do it alone. Today, we are pushing to build the war chest we need to win starting today. Will you be one of our first November donors, to keep the "Fight Back" fund going and help me fight for you? = = = = = = = Thank you for standing with me when it matters most. Justice will prevail.In the fight,Congressman Al Green | | = | | Keep Al Green in Congress Campaign Checks can be Mailed to: Keep Al Green in Congress Campaign PO Box 56761 Houston, TX 77256 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Team Guzman
subject: This is it, Friend, the final stretch!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
clean_body: | | | This is it. The final stretch! We’re just days away from Election Day — and everything we’ve worked for comes down to this moment. The ads are up, the attacks are flying, and every single vote will decide whether Virginia moves forward or backward. Now is the time to go all out, flip VA-HD22, and deliver Donald Trump and MAGA Ian Lovejoy a huge defeat in Tuesday’s Virginia House of Delegates elections. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Elizabeth Guzman has spent her career fighting for working families — not corporate lobbyists or right-wing extremists. She’s an immigrant, a social worker, and a mom who understands what Virginia families need: affordable healthcare, good schools, reproductive freedom, and a government that actually works for people. Her opponent, Ian Lovejoy, is backed by extremist groups who want to ban abortion and roll back progress. They’ve poured national money into this race because they know Elizabeth can win — and when she does, it’s a victory for every Virginian who believes in freedom and fairness. But we need your help right now to make it happen.** We’re mobilizing voters, knocking doors, making calls, and fighting to the very last hour — but we can’t do it without grassroots support. Let’s finish this fight strong and show Virginia, and the country, what people-powered progress looks like. — Team Guzman P.S. | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Elizabeth Guzman, please .

You may not know this about me: When I first decided to run for Congress in 2018, my district hadn't elected a Democrat in 50 years.
A lot of people tried to discourage me. They said it was a pipe dream.
_Well, they were wrong._
Growing up, my parents used to tell me to never do anything half-hearted, and that advice has stuck with me all these years: from my time as a federal law enforcement officer taking on narcotics traffickers; a CIA officer working undercover to keep Americans safe; and a U.S. Representative for Virginia's 7th District creating bills signed into law by presidents of both parties.
**Now, I'm running for Governor in the biggest election of 2025 — and I'm giving this everything I've got.**
I've seen the momentum on the ground, I've heard the enthusiasm of people all across the country who see our race as a beacon of hope.
But the last thing we should do is get complacent.
[_**So, what do you say? I hope I've said enough to earn your $25 contribution today. If we stand together, we can overcome the odds yet again and win the biggest race of 2025.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118510942/579988812/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-11-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGYyMmY2YjItZmViNy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8jqbV1qmI_xd7_AeXAJ5wSASoRJhF-GuxvMNXuyd-eU=)

clean_body: The last thing we should do is get complacent. = Peter, you're one of my strongest supporters, and I'm counting on your contribution today. We've set an ambitious fundraising goal ahead of Election Day, and your $25 before midnight is needed to close the gap. I'm used to winning tough races, but I've always done it with a strong team behind me. = = = = = = = You may not know this about me: When I first decided to run for Congress in 2018, my district hadn't elected a Democrat in 50 years. A lot of people tried to discourage me. They said it was a pipe dream. Well, they were wrong. Growing up, my parents used to tell me to never do anything half-hearted, and that advice has stuck with me all these years: from my time as a federal law enforcement officer taking on narcotics traffickers; a CIA officer working undercover to keep Americans safe; and a U.S. Representative for Virginia's 7th District creating bills signed into law by presidents of both parties. Now, I'm running for Governor in the biggest election of 2025 — and I'm giving this everything I've got. I've seen the momentum on the ground, I've heard the enthusiasm of people all across the country who see our race as a beacon of hope. But the last thing we should do is get complacent. = = = = = = = I can't do it without you, Abigail Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

name: Mikie Sherrill HQ
subject: We made a tough decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
Those polls showing a close race are real, and we’re responding.

| Peter, we’ll get right to the point.

A recent Emerson poll found this race tied — with tons of undecided voters. It’s not an outlier. We’ve lost count of how many polls have come out in recent weeks showing this race functionally tied.

In a race this close, the last thing we can afford is for people who support Mikie Sherrill to not show up to the polls, or leave their mail-in ballot sitting on their kitchen table.

**Peter, we just made a decision to MASSIVELY expand our GOTV program between now and Nov. 4 — counting on money that we don’t yet have, because we’re counting on this grassroots team to come in big for us down the stretch.**

[_**We know it’s asking a lot, but Peter, we need all the help we can get in the final days of this race. body:
We are reaching out to ask you to pitch in $2 to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand today — _and no, that’s not a typo!_ We know $2 might not sound like much, especially when the Republican party is preparing to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to try to flip Jon’s seat red... But when thousands of grassroots supporters are all chipping in $2 at time, _it all adds up!_ In 2021, this team was able to defy the odds and win a historic run off election alongside Rev. Warnock and secure the Senate majority — all because of $2, $10, and $25 donations from supporters just like you. Now, we’re counting on your support once again to help Jon win what will likely be the most expensive and competitive race in the nation. **[_So please, make a $2 contribution — or more if you can afford it — to Jon Ossoff’s campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand today. clean_body: We are reaching out to ask you to pitch in $2 to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand today — and no, that’s not a typo! We know $2 might not sound like much, especially when the Republican party is preparing to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to try to flip Jon’s seat red... But when thousands of grassroots supporters are all chipping in $2 at time, it all adds up! In 2021, this team was able to defy the odds and win a historic run off election alongside Rev. Warnock and secure the Senate majority — all because of $2, $10, and $25 donations from supporters just like you. Now, we’re counting on your support once again to help Jon win what will likely be the most expensive and competitive race in the nation. = | | = | = Thanks, Team Ossoff * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

name: Ghazala Hashmi
subject: This is an urgent moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Hi, it’s Ghazala Hashmi, Democratic Nominee for Virginia Lieutenant Governor.
With just two days to go until Election Day, I have to level with you: Our campaign’s fundraising has slowed down...significantly.
The chart below represents our daily individual contributions from October:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?amount=25]
We need to turn things around — and fast. So I’ve set a goal, in consultation with my team, to raise $20,000 between now and midnight.
Can I count on your support to help meet the goal, turn the tide, and raise the resources we need to win this race? Chip in to help us flip Virginia blue >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?amount=25]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?express_lane=true&amount=20]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?amount=30]
This is serious. If we fall short, it won’t just be a number on a screen.
It means fewer volunteers knocking on doors, fewer voters hearing our message, and less energy in a campaign that’s fighting back against an opponent with massive resources.
We can’t let that be the reason Virginia is forced to endure four more years of Republican governance — especially with Donald Trump in the White House wreaking havoc on our federal workforce, our economy, and our very democracy.
This is an urgent moment. Every contribution — whether $5, $10, $25, or more — helps us stay in the fight. I’m counting on supporters like you to make sure we finish strong. Will you step up? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?amount=25]
Thank you,
Ghazala Hashmi
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?amount=25]
DONATE NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?amount=25]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/P5FfEbyeIEejNQSsVSzanQ2?unsubscribedata=cIciftdCC2P53Vp%2B%2FRxA1Lx9EIlKpnd2p9rGuTgDbph5%2F8nHy3snhshuFQSw0RbT33rUN47TT4MLj5NLiDcU5atateQzWDAXtDY26SZLi3VLlo1qdBFiB3s3Fi%2BROkMr1eekN0athfk8hEwE4J96eCtvsgHSSxWdrqhpR8L2fPnqFmW7SXTEqGP%2FtcHrXk3sbeSmbVTQ%2Fx4VGNYv%2FLOAnAVJOPqSPf%2FcQkvbP8KVdQhDsxMvzqBOgm9Ix1sg0jDEP2uw%2BCB5N9OdbwohLMkUrm16BoUMUtL5YSUugST5QtGjoo8TUldlr2tzmIK%2FO%2BczYTD6mHLDZ%2FctEN8mGu44TcR7SXYuAZJlW1OOipaHai7D192TLD9yyrgWAB%2FeFpp09TnLRfXWukdy%2FJNTR2waE91EXLVHboqjGWIVpOghg%2Fg%3D .

name: Suzanne Beecher
subject: Help stop gender ideology from destroying fairness for female athletes.
body:
Women shouldn’t have to share locker rooms with men.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/vaqD9R1c56F6ceqjuHINz3Tsa77L8BUUMiusVS0JbAuqFQZ6Z9FuuMLurmSnRjke2pHRHO_TXi7-xe3kFWQ1raXRz7ztyOcjJqWOu6DU2W0M5zs46ySDdfroZAFDld88WoqSquN7W9gkVZ_b2u_7zSVCTQ9Cdu9lStaY6ercZyKo66uC2oGkk0HL/amH9Pk3TufZh4ToBJ1lMhS44N4LJRGSa/14)_

| | | [](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/WBLgWYHLWNBT0XaDXux36aT0Z30L2Jib4wmIznE3Ha70ctXHE8aY7XCpTFAJaHfiXDJyAc-UxJrqIWtPuNh5BzwnVYh2s1te6KuqkXuzqe08ar5fKDkslxxrdWZ34JV014GS6iv4-nfF7iKveixWiSQXVdl5o8xJNu3HVhwp-LN-S26Hati0Fd_fw8-YbDDcUZQmgja87S9kf9r0iktU37N0UcoHXCa-LPIdqTp_tjxuMRs4IdSeI-eh2w_e80D2XmElTVYTuVEzPrx3DOifiJsbOZdHP5MfBU-H6PkiWbt4Uc6_906SdfcTu_2348CgyW6EyCHj0Sg8OUUaqmir0YjK0dCv7P2QXOQr5ucXhUGIxOg4gdxfrlTOJ7Dcf5RfnRM5dxs3MeuQkUcU4rUPGgnoZgWpYxHI4l3S2OhfBxKTXOrT0BJLgJzMKoBbjrhzTtSGyq4beBSzPrHn0gyF0eGRpv7A8eZOccJmxKtetUpr77EZmlBf9KYrEz3sduNoem0MrNhbNYGAl8l_1HJQIiLGNQIwyFALMOW8u9iUxMrqXH18sstZnSeKOD_sx5blTf9teT3NVA9bmRJW98yFWB16HUuaXkiunPHyJJjqIC4hwCnSVZru260CaZRdRxMxNFKE_yF57xVpyygj-khbcmnVh6NS8al2CJKW4406VzB_UQDnREwEvMIgYvdQnDTKiRgjnWWnZg0n4M9BwztmPAL7ZICXNOTAIAomy3xNTvm4RMXMgiIU64eYpEtD/6xyvgOuUz38kMmLOGSy6qYendtnf9bps/14)
**** Dear Defender of Truth, Women shouldn't have to share locker rooms with men. They shouldn't have to compete against male athletes. And they shouldn't be punished for speaking the truth.

But across America, that's exactly what's happening.

Men are being allowed to compete in women's sports--robbing girls of scholarships, medals, titles, and safety.

Now, for the first time in history, the U.S. Supreme Court has agreed to hear two cases--_State of West Virginia v. B.P.J._ and _Little v. Hecox_ --that could decide the future of women's sports nationwide.

This could be a watershed moment in the fight to protect biological reality and fairness.

If you believe women's sports should be reserved for women, we need your voice today.

[Sign the Declaration on Women’s Sports »](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/N11UIYtWRpm4nOpxRtcXCqCMVNVIC1yTgQzBUSutonkfTdIJgiqJaswSl6dlVMnnA5UMM8dMBC4fsZ2oGBw9GLWXf0vP4E1N7jTLgxCd9ydmCsdLYdH-hKVkEZTm2Cy6AlxF4ENlVA9PmmlpK-AYBrL_wquIcn1gVK5n7DjqhL0qiyQeDb_NcfQuX2Unmec-xZuh4bANcyI5khpCYCUWl2eTT7aNNB8jRvBzaUCZsf0WrqcD3-btoz0Kph82WubIFu7j2ViA8UwmAtfu-yBj5O6yKvny8bLXzEB0BYNGWMq0cpWb_nqtFSjquuKn2IVh-t8Zhi8hX3z6qsmx3SOSwYr63oJaGFoRaMs3uOuJH7InVwisL_OTEDlx_yylhmJapG0fDWqt-CO5CqXH40Hz5CocQzBNuYeP1eGgFkIDXaE66YSn_UJp4XsXY_EbM-mRT_BVF3lhuWWWAMip6UCsA4sZFjHMaeQowgJALhzM07r1zh1MhlH5GOn1Wx8NEBYkfUP1QYyjF9JR4niCMXQUTRWHqmuqOBpaW2yXZqQC72AvKedrrDYnQO_oLFb1LIxIceRASVSe1xjMgvZr0ci9JxrgVcbRo1O4PENdJ82zC-UlugeG1B44ArTy-lwlAiz_WCd2UGrZgsqHlGZNuxAwyXAhpwVob8eFAutca6S9Kq2MsJ1xgWeanT9NNnykHplh3P011Et6TmHL8ad-LMLO-k_cyQadbMmMNxNxICFR3JTx8QIAnblWe_DXT9kJ/3C0K9QfFmqCO5YsQlHD7YXGUVvitJINS/14)

Your signature will say clearly:
✅ Men should not be allowed to compete on women's teams
✅ Women deserve privacy, fairness, and safety
✅ Radical gender ideology must not ignore biological truth

After you sign, you'll be taken to the next critical step...

Make a gift to support female athletes like Lainey Armistead, a courageous former college soccer player who is helping defend her state's Save Women's Sports Act in court.

Your gift of any amount will help Alliance Defending Freedom stand strong at the Supreme Court--at no cost to our clients.

🚨 We've won 16 cases at the Supreme Court since 2011. With your help, and God's blessing, we can win again.

Please add your name now--and then take the next bold step to protect women's sports with a generous gift.

[Add your name and make your gift »](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/HkfQ4UDjU_XJ2QjuqqBhHk5wLey4AhCfUd26WYR6Y1VlfgLnsRpcm3c4EUzNDNR5GSrR1ogw8fDbvrxDzobGjGMhtUyg1CGly6BPRs08YFHl5e5L8x4lfvrqcitP_q2dWrnplCZVxsTDMO-Zz0_SOcs_VqFpi1dgsW8-YOUjGEkP5bjCTzMahV4RHohseEI00DZHogNjvmvmB-6U6ckeNsQ91i2nQDAY1BxdB-zAexiNJNtzljwGi3Wy1NU_khIXNDKCWZXBtNwtnrsuRvEPicjV2RsZ06oUfof5tK650WsQl2jN-d_aN_YAyw_iaN5nbLA8gdhCYDICIbppp13V3Itkmu0M49T_W4RDEoOgxjbuOhpcsvyKsheoV4wv3yXlnGdgxNIy-R38QP3ikP1ZDv9pNaBfG1BkDLmwGkKJOOex4qQ_KG5JYV4ani-iklATnRj-MYNhQvWabI9RJLWwQow_3SdESEAgSNV4WyfF-3MhNaV3VB4SXxEUx_DFvDiwdbdBvkDR047Xo2jEu-mzEcz7SoluYNukH4HC0L3tus1EYOOf1ED-XrYmt9x53JCIcj60DgtlYFeU6uXvhR-qPUoI1M5Q879VxGi1C_BkRhSeUgO7ulIdC6YFd17Q1jKUIGvQYaOKYfwXNgWH0Jy1oByU9h2pz_aIuTw4_sSVtqOtsZBVeVO6hclRwLE8lxSEsbI3WSX6IZjz3j9zMLrAufV2T1-IbIYz1_bkA-PqiSIghhkOYji60V2ILFoP/_4JftUnaA6_bznJTyYQvHyGEvpD8FzEn/14)

Together, we can ensure every girl has a fair opportunity to play--and win--on a level playing field.

Thank you for standing for truth. With gratitude, **Suzanne** **Beecher**
Legal Counsel [](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/0AvUctjZuB4tnloOcmGNJQupv9QQjqz2Uohmy69e2Gr6gfKCCYxfRMkTgU4sanlSazCUFKVs-e3M6DXguKgi_3WLFglia2032OFKGcXbGDZCVd7xUTcNcwIazmwxr_jm7FXk6g5gW06sOP8fP4kklWpJ4RYQQ_ALJrvDCjf9fSne4Dpe0g2GqTqII84NcFdP9vs2fIkxU9Eq8rDq9ybZAu9ZXYOOMeEoJpovhKTIuI5eekeXZqHaR6oZKENyclzRhB-ap-0PH3SnE2dbdoTkJVYFTkJa-pcaJu3sml-c2zPny4G-dXIVXV7nd6iciczLseMh9LDndEs_WkDAWJu97aiYiwcp5YvdVF6MtvPg4KEaz5oXUoDQk0gGgrkL0cVINeiJfEaMZguCrn1wrgomkxS5wMUPtTa_0TljSTod9KPWR78LlDbiC0fOVtdjnwcAsUazy0bzli9sQwHKUHdsA_mLj2Gt93yxRWwJzu64qxOBu7IAe7A9GYw3iFbLuQ8BwQ111QJHXKk7MxWKdU2dhMvz4KEAQQLfrIuL-lpHsnhasfiz_oBPwxYN7vevueZqsfICl5r4tE_DONyOScAs7vR9Z3VNx0nHa6ggfPnFpsGFAQAOyFnIYmEJZttS9ICMMjwYNtOP7Jl9DlM-MDWqrkpx3KPW4aUT2IsgGX_55n1KE6egUM8niiauX5aZnNB1egqN5xKZ3iXH1KENFZY_n9ksmE7_kTMcWeMg4j5azm727XW0UNVSOPdP2kj9/HK4NnclV4j99X6m2i4jaXDnRk4A7x87p/14)

🔴Polls show my race is _TIED_ , Patriot❗
---
I have an important update for you, Patriot. Poll after poll shows that my race for Governor is a toss-up!

This race is shaping up to be the _CLOSEST_ in the nation in 2025. All eyes are on us to see if we can win and continue logging big wins for Virginians. We've been able to accomplish so much already, but we cannot falter now and let our Commonwealth backslide into failed liberal policies. _We must continue to build a better Virginia!_

My team and I are working around the clock to ensure we win, but we can't do this alone, Patriot! **[We’re going to need every conservative in our corner to give us the edge in this TIED race, so today, I’m asking you to donate even just $15 to help me in this must-win race!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=97dd854440384c1a844d858db420dba5&_e=CjfSo8qG8B5t7aeZP7OwOowfLAkfn-zovxNlwJr1TpSNTtHCJQKjZIZXm8D4WewtyyzfD3k7Pg0VnRe0nMwv-Q0-cD65TZjo6FqNx7PeBiDNp4YYsQx0TyaQS9iOAPWPa_ktZ6xdBxOIX7Qko2Zh8uXvN2kkmJhIwFEShxBq48NTN7ki7JTC6WqkRx_2L-OurQUk-AehcaH8eBfJ45Gnx2wMZuQkJ2Azn7Gc6LvDCy06uVUextmv_PUeHV-RVSFpyFvlbCUK52wz54X5cK79xpG-Ic9g4dHYJSX2s1hhYBmYQ_rKhixdJoEsRemTNSbLZ4Vg_N2D_d7f8tuLi0f7wQBmfftu-JePrDz4b6F85zt520sHmv7c6SebvYUyj3ZXNEqHjb7kXTSEX3ljSRqVOIimfdWOOZfmBbioArvLmV7puR_7t1TqDGdbjWVj0gtfOKYzX8m8fyjwGWqpMEk9RKSIlaVRTMF982yevD8efabMEYj79gWxr6t4a7YMwODac8c4VPndoP9mvAb-4maFrALyqJfDwbibJzzrbvpifsU0bq7mmE4KVfs1IvmyjIeqY82Qd4L-R-Er6XROmNmz2iqU1VcAc3xmVzKCteF61gAXidUnm9PLK2HqxpL-IyU_J16-t8Jx4jvaJw00NJsFHMH9UZk0w4LcyrdsZ-h80yimVqQdAZqrL-V_ZfAOQHxA6LH4_2InHUXGJeL-WDL4lv0EfmreQcT7ZkijDER-pXdCWQF8dm56oqwPfYUzp4gTe0hozztyhOS-16AMpsGQKg41iUsuwWXG0fasMWBi1vKtYx7mWK77NO_1HyO6919KUeHdgeTSoy0hWe0k2uVNehAonxZlcF2mAWe_yV3_EPdcFpggli0ZJSlyX945aTteq0581aOxLUC2HnzPtn5zsbsr0w8s7z_0gTRWO7vYPgV85Uq2kjaeAPBZR0fMbbwH)**

Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. clean_body: Poll after poll shows that my race for Governor is a toss-up! | | 🔴Polls show my race is TIED , Patriot❗ I have an important update for you, Patriot. Poll after poll shows that my race for Governor is a toss-up! This race is shaping up to be the CLOSEST in the nation in 2025. All eyes are on us to see if we can win and continue logging big wins for Virginians. We've been able to accomplish so much already, but we cannot falter now and let our Commonwealth backslide into failed liberal policies. We must continue to build a better Virginia! My team and I are working around the clock to ensure we win, but we can't do this alone, Patriot! Thank you so much and may God bless you! Sincerely, Winsome Earle-Sears Lt. Governor of Virginia | * Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. Peter —

In case you missed the show, I wanted you to see part of our discussion and what I plan to fight for once in Congress. | Peter,
The 2025 high stakes Pennsylvania Supreme Court election is escalating out of control and the stakes couldn't be higher. If MAGA seizes this court they become the arbiter of all elections in PA-- they win, we lose this key swing state in 2026 and 2028
In September the GOP launched a devastating surprise attack that changed the calculus of this race. Over just a few days they dumped millions into PA rapidly seizing the lead and putting Democrats on their backfoot.
In response, Defend our Courts, the organization helping to lead the defense of the PA Supreme Court, sent out a desperate call to the Democratic movement warning that if these calls went unheeded we would lose this court.
Our calls just got answered:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZxPaQorquwaOnu8KmHd1dNYI45pr9sMLl_d9PGiSSnuzhZNqZsYS9jNF3DnIULH-62RIpTJVFOS1qJg6KvAyK7klEq7Wfu6efP48D9jDQpVIOvrk7AY5WKJTziakfBJISDX-_FNDQcjItqqwuWCfLvU7dk3eLOxYg52OBo9JYZgxpuK4jmZQgKRBaawQO9CpKQWdMHmYzyVMuGrc8RKgJjkLTbDJlZMKZVhyaFX8onE=&c=BISSUJKoG32Whz0ch-Dai4x1t_DJF1INDn1VU7w7QEGJaeYqoVDReg==&ch=UUsw_fcPulN0VeOL9M96cAhqW47F_v___tmJAgFiTHIqqg4J-WWkHQ==)
---

The cavalry has arrived.
For months it seemed like those fighting on the ground in Pennsylvania were on our own but thanks to people like you who drew attention to this race from early on we have awoken the sleeping giant of the national Democratic movement.
An avalanche of Democratic support is now flooding into Pennsylvania. Obama is urging Pennsylvanians to vote, Pennsylvania's Democratic Governor Josh Shapiro has made this race his chief priority, and Democratic orgs are pumping in.
Internal polling still says we could lose and an uphill fight for Democrats awaits but we have finally made a breakthrough and we need to throw everything into this race.
[Everything we have needs to be rushed into the breach. Small dollar donations will add up. If you've been waiting to donate now is the time. body:
The cavalry has arrived. Democrats are surging and a MAGA victory is no longer inevitable. Rush everything into the breach—GO GO GO.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LROhcYTpzIzKJIOnrBn30a1Hydmy_zIk7aECr3i5evA82IJMaRPLY7qEqdgRGhrDEOZy2ipavniexj4mKd8ld0pXB66QjHNfyg5eDLv4gBdSTe-4oL-wH_7OdSEKCPbJJTfWHU6CuwQKoVf7UUsDZQrb9TYE2rXFiJ-j4fWNRWpRmysoM5HXueJ-hBqDEfcALI7IDY10gJYC1IGOrZQy6wm2edtPfLrO2f897FLCilczB6JiIp0lmA==&c=AgeVSJa4XkMCj89_iaZEGw4WX78fQ45znFViRq0oIQHI8trwURGM-A==&ch=hl0P2NBgP48EBHVayPn0dHCOeubvpBRLhemgd8Lpf4qWn7YJFsS4MQ==)
---
| Peter,
The 2025 high stakes Pennsylvania Supreme Court election is escalating out of control and the stakes couldn't be higher. If MAGA seizes this court they become the arbiter of all elections in PA-- they win, we lose this key swing state in 2026 and 2028
In September the GOP launched a devastating surprise attack that changed the calculus of this race. Over just a few days they dumped millions into PA rapidly seizing the lead and putting Democrats on their backfoot.
In response, Defend our Courts, the organization helping to lead the defense of the PA Supreme Court, sent out a desperate call to the Democratic movement warning that if these calls went unheeded we would lose this court.
Our calls just got answered:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LROhcYTpzIzKJIOnrBn30a1Hydmy_zIk7aECr3i5evA82IJMaRPLY7qEqdgRGhrDEOZy2ipavniexj4mKd8ld0pXB66QjHNfyg5eDLv4gBdSTe-4oL-wH_7OdSEKCPbJJTfWHU6CuwQKoVf7UUsDZQrb9TYE2rXFiJ-j4fWNRWpRmysoM5HXueJ-hBqDEfcALI7IDY10gJYC1IGOrZQy6wm2edtPfLrOvVDQ0XAlAXrDT9nzL28bSQ==&c=AgeVSJa4XkMCj89_iaZEGw4WX78fQ45znFViRq0oIQHI8trwURGM-A==&ch=hl0P2NBgP48EBHVayPn0dHCOeubvpBRLhemgd8Lpf4qWn7YJFsS4MQ==)
---

The cavalry has arrived.
For months it seemed like those fighting on the ground in Pennsylvania were on our own but thanks to people like you who drew attention to this race from early on we have awoken the sleeping giant of the national Democratic movement.
An avalanche of Democratic support is now flooding into Pennsylvania. Obama is urging Pennsylvanians to vote, Pennsylvania's Democratic Governor Josh Shapiro has made this race his chief priority, and Democratic orgs are pumping in.
Internal polling still says we could lose and an uphill fight for Democrats awaits but we have finally made a breakthrough and we need to throw everything into this race.
[Everything we have needs to be rushed into the breach. Small dollar donations will add up. If you've been waiting to donate now is the time. Can you rush a donation of whatever you've got so we can put it to work in the field immediately? ](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LROhcYTpzIzKJIOnrBn30a1Hydmy_zIk7aECr3i5evA82IJMaRPLY7qEqdgRGhrDEOZy2ipavniexj4mKd8ld0pXB66QjHNfyg5eDLv4gBdSTe-4oL-wH_7OdSEKCPbJJTfWHU6CuwQKoVf7UUsDZQrb9TYE2rXFiJ-j4fWNRWpRmysoM5HXueJ-hBqDEfcALI7IDY10gJYC1IGOrZQy6wm2edtPfLrOaKuDSzupQkIlyB0dZpJt_w==&c=AgeVSJa4XkMCj89_iaZEGw4WX78fQ45znFViRq0oIQHI8trwURGM-A==&ch=hl0P2NBgP48EBHVayPn0dHCOeubvpBRLhemgd8Lpf4qWn7YJFsS4MQ==)

clean_body: | | | | Nov 4 is almost here. Vote early or be there on Election Day! Hi Neighbor, This campaign has always been about one thing: keeping Morris County a place where families, small businesses, and communities can thrive. I’ve been honored to serve you, and I’m ready to keep delivering real results. You don’t have to wait until November 4. Early voting is open now , and every ballot cast early helps us build momentum heading into Election Day. | Thank you for standing with me, for believing in local leadership that listens, and for making your voice heard. Together, we can keep Morris County strong and moving forward. With gratitude, Christine Myers | | | | "Facebook" Christine Myers P.O. Box 320, Brookside, NJ 07926

I've been in Republican politics for decades, and I know when one race carries the weight of the entire country. Today, that race is in **Georgia**.

The media won't say it. The Left is trying to hide it. But trust me, [**this is the most important election in America.**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/cpK7Ao3YuIYh0tQIsUy_Myw-o010hKodFttd1Pr5LAuy2cq9UU9Yt_VvrobxbOQvJ3_7dt4aQ6_tojtqJ9sUKTRSE66t_Hgw4-2t2UptFkAJTZLrw03Beg1dReE_9GbwDePDFEhPQmDwEhQc-sVLkEpY7rrDbRBv3RMn2otcgvyOI_QRIBLxSaLBDh5QZ2d5Q7FFVnKi5YF7OF_9MqAj9EfbmESX0-mo4sLiwECvmSowxSZgNgyXopuzrYJZJM-whtdLDM5bD8-lQeIWCGEamKwZ1C-8hpqdWjwUr9ob5Cdx1kHfJqqx-IzH3WhEApYp6aLZJAAmc_WgbCeNqHYXvvZWPV4-14Ef8uS-ZvK49ucrEtoCIFXy3twUgUSMWaCVSnW2wUYdzqmnPHJ_i-HU6uHvkh2t3DksWlKKgkg266kNd3OJCaXDA_gmu0Y3g2sUzxsJLC4O_-Kesm2DRks5DEtE-FxhpHmTTi5XJGscR6ILA2CUfd2pS73Hb1AEsX9K0OJIS7GS5GULaFPNVKEbcVGP41AtOvpJkfAXM2QAyHKeHjPDvktoviZUtQMu20nXcf3cUF-YlGOBd2oszQwkLm6_aZw5H6W2iwGmeMivAIOXMz_dRocCIl8eiNbKZus3z5MaznNg97QqE42fr13kr78PJ66l9LWm22DVuh16dKnKTs-QWABbS3KmWeiudm4OWLJUZInrzSGUEFY2RoG9yKpOlMX18zmT1_eZLHVi_1JiAkYtnK7Lm9WsulnEYhi-fTG9znWEO7dWvahjok8yMi0JurIfzJFsNkhShfWgXCb9DmhwbEWOEBkJsNdZssPaljTH-ws/1rIVF95xm7a_fxebelLoyBnsRI9dr5MM/14)

Here's the truth:

* Jon Ossoff is Chuck Schumer's golden boy.
* He's voted with the D.C. swamp every single time.
* And if he wins re-election, Schumer takes the Senate majority.

That means:

❌ The Supreme Court **PACKED** with RADICAL judges. ❌ The filibuster **ERASED**. ❌ Trump's America First agenda **STRANGLED** in its crib.

But there's good news.

Mike Collins is leading the polls, and he is the [_**only candidate who can defeat Ossoff.**_](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/UXPjFVjBDBCMA7tMbpZDCZB_xlTs9BbQHpVelPWldx_Zqbd8FogMujxR0m7ftzko6P_PGHeB_DvIWDl816RuG-UsXcDNXFhCLXc3r4V6XMLsJky2mXtLB8fONGn-i2imRpsZW3ZwwQC6J5qSIIQsx92936jkomIapP1on-OjxmqXS2EjvoIM8TrL1FCrwPRjnZ2a-EibDdQn2SwHWVQJOonZ_aKx6IBUcw6stTBLPfeeDBOnTye3baBEjpxz4la1JMl45_UteZVIaoswpJn_WEyPUDGedVPeypp8xS2N35gTDHantT8RaDEGIDYtIZA7IdhmZBEiOVTwIgO_C0gci7TrsGd7jEcpKjHjVNhSN4yGebJlQFln8Kx5E-5s2ZjcAVFNPkergYc97np8a_K_9kmb4IQRNqej4fKFg8qaR5bkdc5fAtWTrqzJprRrqFJqs-NcrD6xURJeRRCisOjEPWEkhfNDb3YTPBbURYnt9kqhZTOV7u4T_IHX-czqzAoXJNndq3w_DGWqMIvMf4t1KFN83VLLDBiBJbH7Befc5usdNGoSMB9Jb7A1yYqkVdten_mMWr4flk9K2_81p-kkJ72k_UHiYcQY79Hw3fwkvhNG7AfH1z2UbY-T6RLy_stEpjTqip6b8ol3qqjqARfQDQHdDZzVXIul2PXwDfN4TkpeHDVn83Rbe2qp788E1ZRFhsHJfxEPnKjh788MPtaZjgCXDoanMwKHJ3CkA9lNhGvubeJNHNjU5AfbNP6y4mWaplzrxi8nNo94vCBwCSuIZVBhEhanU1UFGjJNiKa10_ngLImv5irlOBpBR_DOtNOfnSZGneU/uIvef7ueX9YH6xgdbFpNY6Huo91zNAAE/14)

Mike isn't a creature of Washington. He's a trucker, a fighter, and a conservative with the **BACKBONE** to hold Georgia **RED** and block Schumer's **RADICAL** agenda.

If we win Georgia, we stop Schumer cold.

clean_body: | Peter, This is Newt Gingrich. I've been in Republican politics for decades, and I know when one race carries the weight of the entire country. Today, that race is in Georgia. The media won't say it. The Left is trying to hide it. But trust me, Here's the truth: Jon Ossoff is Chuck Schumer's golden boy. He's voted with the D.C. swamp every single time. And if he wins re-election, Schumer takes the Senate majority. That means: ❌ The Supreme Court PACKED with RADICAL judges. ❌ The filibuster ERASED. ❌ Trump's America First agenda STRANGLED in its crib. But there's good news. Mike Collins is leading the polls, and he is the Mike isn't a creature of Washington. He's a trucker, a fighter, and a conservative with the BACKBONE to hold Georgia RED and block Schumer's RADICAL agenda. If we win Georgia, we stop Schumer cold. If we lose Georgia, America First is FINISHED. Peter, we can't afford to sit this one out. Georgia is the tipping point for our future. | This isn't just another Senate race. It's the ballgame. name: Team Walz
subject: Nasty, dishonest, and funded by billionaires.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
This is the same far-right playbook we’ve seen for years.
#
Peter,
Republicans are already on the attack in this race for governor. **One of Tim’s opponents is trying to launch a massive billboard campaign attacking him** , hoping to line the streets with lies about his record.
This is the same far-right playbook we’ve seen for years: _nasty, dishonest, and funded by ultra-wealthy megadonors._
When the GOP sees someone capable of calling out their BS and breaking through to everyday people, they call on their billionaire donors to help them flood the zone with lies and misinformation. That’s how they think politics is done.
Minnesotans deserve better. Tim is focused on building a better, kinder, more unified Minnesota for ALL of us — but he can’t do it alone.
**[Will you chip in $5 right now to help us fight back? With your support, we’ll push back on the noise and keep leading with the truth — and with Minnesota values.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251102.k8tbLj&amount=5&refcode=em20251102-45&t=1&akid=45%2E34582%2EcpOmNc)**

Thanks for all you do to have Tim’s back,
Team Walz

Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose.
We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more.
**[Now we need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from dragging us backward. Pitch in $5 today to help us win this race and keep moving forward — together.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251102-45&t=21&refcode2=45_34582_cpOmNc&akid=45%2E34582%2EcpOmNc)**

Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

**Republicans are returning their mail in ballots at a higher rate than Democrats.** This is phenomenal news, but it’s not all good... Democrat voters have requested almost 3 TIMES as many mail-in ballots as Republicans, and they still have more votes “in the bank” than we do.
Just like in Pennsylvania in 2024 for President Trump, this year in New Jersey **_we need to hit our magic number of mail-in and early in person Republican votes cast before election day_** so we can turn out the rest of our voters and win a decisive victory on Election Day.
We truly don’t have a moment to waste... in-person Early Voting begins on October 25th, mail-in voting ends on October 28th, and Election Day is November 4th.

clean_body: Thousands of Republican ballots in NJ depend on you opening this email | | | | | Peter, before I get into the latest from New Jersey, I want to who have stepped up to fund a voter registration staffer or ballot chaser this year. Because of them, we are tied in the polls and ahead of our projections in New Jersey, and this race is 100% winnable. Right now, my grassroots team is on the ground chasing mail-in ballots and preparing to launch our massive get out the vote program to FLIP New Jersey from Blue to RED this November, and we’re having great success. Republicans are returning their mail in ballots at a higher rate than Democrats. This is phenomenal news, but it’s not all good... Democrat voters have requested almost 3 TIMES as many mail-in ballots as Republicans, and they still have more votes “in the bank” than we do. Just like in Pennsylvania in 2024 for President Trump, this year in New Jersey we need to hit our magic number of mail-in and early in person Republican votes cast before election day so we can turn out the rest of our voters and win a decisive victory on Election Day. We truly don’t have a moment to waste... in-person Early Voting begins on October 25th, mail-in voting ends on October 28th, and Election Day is November 4th. Peter, the momentum is on our side, and the early returns are looking very good, but we have a lot of work to do in the next few weeks if we’re going to flip the Garden State red. We need your help to make the difference. By sponsoring an Early Vote Action staffer, you’re fueling the grassroots work to flip New Jersey RED in 2025. . In Liberty, Scott Presler | | | | | Paid for by Early Vote Action New Jersey Inc. 111 Town Square Place, Suite 1201, Jersey City, NJ 07310. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. |

clean_body: Most people rest after elections. We don't. | = Hi Peter, Election Day is just two days away, and the energy is electric. But our work doesn't stop on Tuesday — we're fighting to win this year and to prepare our next generation of Democratic pro-choice women leaders for the years ahead. Because winning isn't just about one day or one election. It's about taking back power in 2025, 2026, and beyond. = | = Here's where we're headed: 🗳️ The election is two days away — and we're working around the clock to support our candidates through the finish line. Every door knocked, every phone dialed, and every voter contacted matters more than ever right now. 🚀 Endorsements are accelerating — We're not pumping the brakes. Instead, we're endorsing more incredible candidates at every level of government who will shape policy for years to come. Watch this space! 📋 2026 strategy is underway — We'll be sharing our full midterm elections strategy soon, but the work of recruiting, training, and supporting the next wave of leaders has already started. Most organizations go into rest mode after Election Day. We go into overdrive. That's how we've built the largest bench of Democratic pro-choice women candidates in history. And that's how we'll keep building power in state legislatures, Congress, and governors' offices across the country. **= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Let's finish strong Tuesday and start stronger Wednesday and beyond. – the EMILYs List Campaigns Team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

I have an important update for you, Patriot. Poll after poll shows that my race for Governor is a toss-up!

This race is shaping up to be the _CLOSEST_ in the nation in 2025. All eyes are on us to see if we can win and continue logging big wins for Virginians. We've been able to accomplish so much already, but we cannot falter now and let our Commonwealth backslide into failed liberal policies. _We must continue to build a better Virginia!_

2025 just became ICE's deadliest year in two decades and NPR reports that 2026 is set to be even deadlier. Families are being torn apart. People are being deprived of food and water, tortured, and disappeared.

**🏆 7 VICTORIES DOWN, DOZENS MORE ON THE BALLOT TUESDAY**
It's worth pausing to remember what we've already accomplished together this year. Every victory on this list happened because supporters like you refused to sit on the sidelines.
Here are some of the major victories we've secured together so far in 2025:
✅ **Paloma Aguirre** won her special election for the San Diego County Board of Supervisors in California
✅ **Doron Clark and David Gottfried** won their races in Minnesota, blocking Republicans from controlling the Minnesota House and defending the Senate majority from Trump-backed extremists
✅ **Susan Crawford** won her race for Wisconsin's State Supreme Court — defeating Elon Musk and the GOP machine, who spent obscene amounts of money to buy this seat
✅ **Austin Fölnagy** won reelection to Oregon's Lane Community College Board with 65% of the vote
✅ **Adelita Grijalva** won her special election for U.S. Congress in Arizona, making history as the state's first Latina elected to Congress
✅ **Kannan Srinivasan** won his race for Virginia State Senate, keeping the chamber in Democratic hands
**That's 7 major wins — all leading up to November 4. We've proven that grassroots organizing works. We've shown that people power can beat Big Oil's millions.**
**[Now we need to prove it one more time. clean_body: With a new round of exciting updates and GOTV opportunities. | You're reading the November edition of The JanePAC Monthly — and if you've been following along, you know this is a BIG month for our climate movement. On Tuesday, voters across dozens of states will decide some of the most critical down-ballot races of 2025. Our endorsed climate champions are out in the field, talking to voters, knocking on doors, and building the grassroots power we need to win. Here’s what the final push looks like. 👇 🗳️ RECORD EARLY VOTING = RECORD MOMENTUM New reports show that early voting numbers in Virginia are at record highs for a non-presidential election year. THAT’S HUGE. Voters are turning out in force to make their voices heard. But record turnout only translates to victories if we reach the right voters in these final days. That's why we're asking you to join us — whether it's knocking on doors, making phone calls, or chipping in a few dollars to power our final push. | = 📸 OUR CANDIDATES IN ACTION 🌎 John McAuliff — Virginia State House District 30 John is fighting for one of the most competitive Republican-held seats in Virginia — a district where our message of climate action and environmental justice is resonating with voters. He's out knocking on doors and showing voters there's a better way forward. 🌎 Shakita Taylor — Mississippi State Senate District 44 Shakita is running to bring integrity, accountability, and climate leadership to Mississippi's State Senate. This week, she met with constituents at a candidate forum hosted by the Midtown Neighborhood Association in Hattiesburg — the kind of grassroots organizing that wins elections. 🌎 Nicole Cole — Virginia State House District 66 Nicole had an incredible weekend partnering with We of Action Virginia to knock on doors and rally voters. Her energy is contagious, her message is powerful, and her grassroots operation is exactly what we need to win on Tuesday. If you live in New York City, Washington, D.C., or Pennsylvania but want to help on the ground in Virginia, our partners at Lead Locally are assisting with travel and housing for any volunteers who can come canvass. 🏆 7 VICTORIES DOWN, DOZENS MORE ON THE BALLOT TUESDAY It's worth pausing to remember what we've already accomplished together this year. Every victory on this list happened because supporters like you refused to sit on the sidelines. Here are some of the major victories we've secured together so far in 2025: ✅ Paloma Aguirre won her special election for the San Diego County Board of Supervisors in California ✅ Doron Clark and David Gottfried won their races in Minnesota, blocking Republicans from controlling the Minnesota House and defending the Senate majority from Trump-backed extremists ✅ Susan Crawford won her race for Wisconsin's State Supreme Court — defeating Elon Musk and the GOP machine, who spent obscene amounts of money to buy this seat ✅ Austin Fölnagy won reelection to Oregon's Lane Community College Board with 65% of the vote ✅ Adelita Grijalva won her special election for U.S. Congress in Arizona, making history as the state's first Latina elected to Congress ✅ Kannan Srinivasan won his race for Virginia State Senate, keeping the chamber in Democratic hands That's 7 major wins — all leading up to November 4. We've proven that grassroots organizing works. We've shown that people power can beat Big Oil's millions. ✊ LET'S FINISH STRONG We've spent the entire year building toward this moment. We've endorsed incredible climate champions. We’ve spread the word. We've raised money from grassroots supporters who believe in what we're fighting for. Now we have 48 hours to finish what we started. As voters cast their ballots in states all across the country, we need volunteers — lots of volunteers — who are ready to roll up their sleeves and put in the work for our climate champions. If you've been waiting for the right time to get involved, this is it. If you've been wondering whether your support makes a difference, it does — especially now. Are you ready to join thousands of climate activists fighting to elect champions who will stand up to Trump and Big Oil? = Together, we are building a movement they cannot ignore. And on Tuesday, we're going to win. In solidarity, – Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Kelly Morrison
subject: With trust of the American government at an all time low, we want you to hear this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morrison for Congress
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter,
Congresswoman Kelly Morrison here - I hope you are doing ok during these challenging times.
Like you, I’m horrified by this administration’s treatment of the American people and disregard for the rule of law. This administration poses a direct threat to our democracy in a way that we have not experienced in modern American history.
I am also appalled by Trump’s blatant corruption and abuse of power since entering the White House. In case you missed it, Trump is now $3 billion richer since he became President in January. While life has become more expensive for everyday Americans under his leadership, our President has nearly doubled his net worth in a matter of months. There has been so much corruption that it’s hard to even keep track of everything. They’re trying to flood the zone to overwhelm and distract us so we forget, but I won’t let them. After Trump started his tenure by featuring billionaire businessmen (over his cabinet nominees) at the inauguration in January, he has since:

That's why thousands have already claimed their [**2 Months of FREE Survival Food**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2d197e3eaba2a15e98c48923b79636c4c3115800046640b1d9ea49d2fee50389e99aac8bd78c0b3ffdb752b880a278e00723fe12123d3b10de5bce22ae4c9f16) with this Exclusive Limited-Time deal! These food kits are flying off the shelves, selling out time and time again. People are waking up to the truth: you can't count on the system anymore. We gave our warehouse manager, Matt, one mission: **produce as many kits as humanly possible.** And wow... did he ever deliver. The result? **A tidal wave of inventory just crashed into our warehouse - more kits than we have space for.** Now we're on the hook for major storage costs... and we need your help. **This is your chance to take advantage of our mistake.** We're slashing prices and practically *giving away* these premium survival food kits just to move them fast. ENDS TODAY!** **YES! Order Today And You'll Get 2 Months of Survival Food Worth $559.90...**
**YOU GET IT FOR FREE!** That's right - the biggest "BOGO" deal we've ever done, with 2 months worth of FREE delicious food, designed to last for 25 years! And you'll snag our most popular food kit, in the process:
* **Delicious & designed to last for 25 years**
* It's a fridge, freezer and sub-freezer - but it never needs ice. Even during a blackout.
* **1,088 total servings**
* $0.64 Per Serving - holy smokes!
* **Secret gift for seniors & military (see if you qualify at checkout)**
* 2 FREE months of survival food - $559.90 value, on us
* **Only $77 down, ships tomorrow!**
* _And you also get a NEW affordable payment plan with no interest - take 9 MONTHS to pay!_

[**ORDER NOW: $77 TODAY,
SHIPS TOMORROW!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2d197e3eaba2a15e98c48923b79636c4c3115800046640b1d9ea49d2fee50389e99aac8bd78c0b3ffdb752b880a278e00723fe12123d3b10de5bce22ae4c9f16) [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2d197e3eaba2a15e98c48923b79636c4c3115800046640b1d9ea49d2fee50389e99aac8bd78c0b3ffdb752b880a278e00723fe12123d3b10de5bce22ae4c9f16) This is more than just food. It's **freedom in a box.** These 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are loaded with hearty, satisfying meals that are built to last 25 years. That's right - **no junk fillers, no sketchy ingredients** - just real food, crafted for real emergencies. **Get 5 Months of Food, Security & Peace of Mind, All In One Kit** Hand-packed in a small American facility by people who actually care, these meals are designed to keep you nourished, calm, and strong when everything else falls apart. And thanks to the recent upgrades, **these kits contain more food than ever.** It's a massive value - and right now, it's the lowest price you'll ever see. **Don't wait for a crisis to wish you had prepared.** Right now, this overstock deal gives you the chance to save big, feed your family in an emergency, and protect what matters most. But this inventory won't last long. [**ORDER NOW: $77 TODAY,
SHIPS TOMORROW!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2d197e3eaba2a15e98c48923b79636c4c3115800046640b1d9ea49d2fee50389e99aac8bd78c0b3ffdb752b880a278e00723fe12123d3b10de5bce22ae4c9f16) [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2d197e3eaba2a15e98c48923b79636c4c3115800046640b1d9ea49d2fee50389e99aac8bd78c0b3ffdb752b880a278e00723fe12123d3b10de5bce22ae4c9f16) Stay Safe. Stay Prepared.

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Real People. Real Emergencies. Real Gratitude.** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2d197e3eaba2a15e98c48923b79636c4c3115800046640b1d9ea49d2fee50389e99aac8bd78c0b3ffdb752b880a278e00723fe12123d3b10de5bce22ae4c9f16) **_Rory H._**_
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_ [**ORDER NOW: $77 TODAY,
SHIPS TOMORROW!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2d197e3eaba2a15e98c48923b79636c4c3115800046640b1d9ea49d2fee50389e99aac8bd78c0b3ffdb752b880a278e00723fe12123d3b10de5bce22ae4c9f16)

name: Team Ossoff
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#

Peter —
First and foremost, thank you for bearing with the increased number of fundraising emails before our end-of-month fundraising deadline.
Today, we’re asking you to do something different, but just as important.
Can you add your name to say you personally endorse Jon Ossoff's campaign for Senate in Georgia? It will only take a few seconds, but it will speak volumes about the strength of our campaign.
Here’s the link to endorse Jon: [**<https://act.electjon.com/go/Endorse-Jon-Ossoff> Here’s why we’re asking: This is going to be one of the closest and most expensive races in the history of the Senate. Republicans are gearing up to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to defeat Jon. For us, winning is going to require a grassroots movement that meets this moment. And Jon needs to know who is with him. So we're asking: [**Can you please add your name to say you endorse Jon Ossoff's campaign for United States Senate in Georgia? We would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://act.electjon.com/signup/ossoff-em-endorse-nov25/?source=em251102-1-subs&akid=1021%2E5691347%2Eofpqdj) **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.electjon.com/signup/ossoff-em-endorse-nov25/?source=em251102-1-subs&akid=1021%2E5691347%2Eofpqdj)** Thank you, Jon Ossoff for Senate

Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=1&akid=1021%2E5691347%2Eofpqdj) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1021%2E5691347%2Eofpqdj) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Kash Patel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
I could go on, but I think you understand how unfit Kash Patel is to serve as FBI Director.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc36ba7c8-9945-4707-9e14-99660956ac19/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, this is Adam Schiff. FBI Director Kash Patel recently appeared before the Senate Judiciary Committee. It didn’t go well for him — to say the least. He struggled to answer questions about his campaign of retribution at the FBI, where he is illegally firing top-notch agents who investigated Trump. After claiming for years that Epstein had a list of powerful clients for the women he trafficked, he now tried to persuade the American people that the only name on Jeffrey Epstein’s list was ... Jeffrey Epstein. But what really set him off was when I asked why Epstein’s co-conspirator was suddenly moved to a minimum security prison after seemingly exonerating Trump. At that point, he just lost it and began screaming at me. This is par for the course for Kash Patel. But it is shameful behavior from anyone, let alone the nation’s FBI Director. I’ve raised red flags about Kash Patel before. He’s spread dangerous, false conspiracy theories about a “deep state” that is unfairly persecuting MAGA world. He’s called for and is conducting a comprehensive “housecleaning” or purge of professionals at the Justice Department. While I served on the House Intelligence Committee, Kash Patel was a major part of the efforts to sabotage a thorough investigation of Russia’s involvement in the 2016 election — and for his work, he was rewarded with a post in the Trump Administration. I could go on, but I think you understand how unfit Kash Patel is to serve as FBI Director. He’s a threat to the critical mission of the Bureau, not to mention the justice system and our democracy — and we need to hold him and the entire Trump administration to account. [Help me and Blue Amp Action continue to speak out about Kash Patel and the dangers he poses in his high-ranking position in the Trump administration. Split a contribution between me and Blue Amp Action today. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted43bfe4-eb65-4a8a-b4b0-b1e1b53fe497/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---

---

---
| We cannot let Trump officials like Kash Patel betray the hard-working men and women of the FBI and our public safety. We must fight back. More soon, Adam

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta58c8f65-bea5-424a-adc2-1378a00bd5dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I’m ready to fight and deliver every day for New Mexicans as governor.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5448%2E400544%2Eu0KQGM)
Thanks to this incredible grassroots team, we finished October strong and powered our campaign forward with the support of thousands of people — not political insiders and wealthy billionaires.
Your support couldn’t come at a more important time.
Right now, Donald Trump and his allies are showing us just how cruel their vision for this country truly is.
When Washington abandons people, governors are the first line of defense. New Mexicans deserve a leader who truly understands their struggles and will fight fiercely to protect them.
I’m ready to fight and deliver every day for New Mexicans as governor — and I’m so grateful to know that you’re on our team as we continue to build the campaign we need to win and keep New Mexico blue.
I know these are challenging times, and I’m deeply grateful to everyone who’s chipped in what they can. Even if you can’t give right now, your support, your voice, and your belief in our shared future make all the difference. We’re in this fight together — as New Mexicans, and as a community that never gives up on each other.
With gratitude,
Deb
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251102-1&t=2&refcode2=5448_400544_u0KQGM&akid=5448%2E400544%2Eu0KQGM)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=5448%2E400544%2Eu0KQGM)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=5448%2E400544%2Eu0KQGM)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: Why I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
If you’re short on time and want to help us win this race, defeat Elise Stefanik, and elect new leadership here in the North Country, I hope you’ll consider splitting a donation between me and Heartland Patriots today.
Hi Peter, I’m Blake Gendebien.
Heartland Patriots said I could take a moment to introduce myself and fill you in on why I decided to run for Congress.
**[But, Peter, if you’re short on time and want to help us win this race, defeat Elise Stefanik, and elect new leadership here in the North Country, I hope you’ll consider splitting a donation between me and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96928?refcode=em20251102-9660&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9660%2E614464%2EO4X689)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96928?refcode=em20251102-9660&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9660%2E614464%2EO4X689)**
I’m a second-generation dairy farmer who was born and raised right here in the North Country. If I’m being honest, I never thought about getting into politics. But for too long, I’ve seen how our region has been sold out and forgotten by career politicians, and I can’t stand on the sidelines any longer.
As a father, husband, and farm owner, I know exactly what people in our community are facing. While farms are being forced to close their doors and families are struggling to make ends meet, our leaders in Washington are doing nothing to help us get by.
**[So, I’m running for Congress—not to just defeat Elise Stefanik, who’s failed us for years, but to be a voice for our region in Washington. If you’re with me, will you split a donation between me and Heartland Patriots today to join our team?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96928?refcode=em20251102-9660&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9660%2E614464%2EO4X689)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Blake Gendebien and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96929?refcode=em20251102-9660&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=9660%2E614464%2EO4X689) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96929?refcode=em20251102-9660&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=9660%2E614464%2EO4X689) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96929?refcode=em20251102-9660&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9660%2E614464%2EO4X689) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96929?refcode=em20251102-9660&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9660%2E614464%2EO4X689) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96929?refcode=em20251102-9660&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9660%2E614464%2EO4X689) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96929?refcode=em20251102-9660&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9660%2E614464%2EO4X689) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96928?refcode=em20251102-9660&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9660%2E614464%2EO4X689)

Together,
Blake
