name: Team Frost
subject: Team Frost Updates and a Note from Maxwell
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL ALEJANDRO FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://www.frostforcongress.com/ [https://www.frostforcongress.com/]
Hey Peter,
We’re now a month into the Republican-led government shutdown, and the impacts on working families are becoming more devastating by the day.
This shutdown isn’t about fiscal responsibility — it’s about power. Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans are holding the government hostage to push their extreme agenda: gut healthcare protections and raise ACA premiums , all while protecting tax cuts for billionaires and corporate donors.
Democrats are standing united to stop them — fighting to keep our government open, protect working families, and make sure no one loses access to affordable care. Because the truth is simple: in the wealthiest country on Earth, no one should have to choose between keeping their family fed and paying their medical bills.
Here in Florida, the stakes are especially high. That’s why we'll be launching a Food Bank Resource Guide this week and why we’re partnering with AFGE and local unions to provide direct support to affected federal workers and their families. You’ll hear more about this below — but know this: we’re not waiting for Washington gridlock to end before taking action.
And with the Election on Tuesday, Nov. 4th , we’ve got no time to waste. That’s why I’m proud to endorse Tom Keen for Orlando City Council District 1 [https://www.keenforfl.com/] . Last year, Tom flipped House District 35 blue for the first time in over 40 years — showing what’s possible when you organize, stay rooted in community, and fight for working families. Now he’s ready to bring those values to City Hall.
Whether we’re supporting our federal workers, pushing back on the GOP’s cruel agenda, or electing bold leaders like Tom, our team is working non-stop for everyday people. This movement belongs to all of us, and we’re just getting started.
Make sure to read through the rest of this newsletter for updates on our work and ways to get involved in the weeks ahead.
With love & gratitude,
Maxwell Frost
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92662/images/MAF%20Fellows.jpeg]
Congressman Frost & our Fall Organizing Fellows
💬 Stay Connected: Volunteer Signal Channel
We’ve launched a Signal Channel just for Team Frost volunteers! It’s a great space to connect, share updates, and stay in the loop.
Click here to join! [https://signal.group/#CjQKIEKC2HbKQsSPgo18peZHt_kugDkUtReM_pgADZ3bbxWLEhAQdtps8g5fXdp4pZWvU_eJ]
📢 ELECTION DAY IS THIS TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 4!
City of Orlando Residents: Election Day is just days away, and it’s time to make your plan to vote! Vote early or vote on Election Day at your assigned polling location. Let’s make sure we turn out strong and keep building progress right here at home!
🕓 Early Voting Information:
TODAY, November 2 | 11:00 AM - 3:00 PM
Location: Supervisor of Elections Office, 119 W Kaley St, Orlando, FL 32806
If you have a vote-by-mail ballot, do not mail it at this point because it may not arrive in time to be counted. Bring it with you to vote in person or drop it off directly at the Supervisor of Elections Office.
🗳️ Election Day:
Tuesday, November 4 | 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM
Find Your Polling Location Here [https://www.voterfocus.com/PrecinctFinder/addressSearch?county=ora]
Click to view a sample ballot or for more information. [https://ocfelections.gov/orlando2025?_gl=1*zgtys4*_ga*MjE0NDIwMDE5Mi4xNzU4OTgxMzIx*_ga_XD0YRFD3B7*czE3NjE3NTIwMjQkbzEwJGcwJHQxNzYxNzUyMDI1JGo1OSRsMCRoMA]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92662/images/New%20-%20Volunteer%20Email/MAF_Email_Volunteer_OurEvents_SectionHeader.png]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92662/images/Tom%20Keen_%20Endorsement_Instagram%20%281%29.png] GOTV Canvass with Team Frost, Young Democrats, & Tom Keen
Date: Sunday, November 2
Time: 10:00 AM - 1:00 PM
Location: Provided upon RSVP
SIGN UP HERE [https://www.mobilize.us/frostforcongress/event/864168/]
GOTV Canvass with Team Frost, Young Democrats, & Tom Keen
Date: Monday, November 3
Time: 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM
Location: Provided upon RSVP
SIGN UP HERE [https://www.mobilize.us/frostforcongress/event/864168/]
*VIRTUAL* Election Day Phonebank
Date: Tuesday, November 4th
Time: 10 AM - 7 PM (multiple shifts)
SIGN UP HERE [https://www.mobilize.us/frostforcongress/event/865810/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92662/images/Shutdown%20Relief%20Drive%20Flyer.jpg] SUPPORT FOR FEDERAL WORKERS
Our partners here at home are stepping up to support Central Floridians during the government shutdown. The American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE) is leading local efforts to provide food relief and essential support to impacted federal workers and their families.
Team Frost is proud to stand with AFGE Local 556 in this critical work, and we’re asking YOU to join us.
There are several drop-off locations throughout Orlando where you can donate food and supplies to help families weather this shutdown.
Questions? Email Fellows@FrostForCongress.com for assistance.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92662/images/12.6.25%20MadSoul%20Festival_Artists.jpg] 2025 MADSOUL MUSIC & ARTS FESTIVAL IS BACK!
GET YOUR TICKETS HERE! [madsoulfest.com] MadSoul is a one-of-a-kind music and arts festival, founded ten years ago by Congressman Maxwell Frost and a group of friends in Orlando.
Rooted in the belief that culture and activism go hand in hand, MadSoul bridges the gap between music and political advocacy , creating a space where joy, connection, and meaningful change thrive side by side.
As a musician and the first Gen-Z member of Congress, Maxwell understands the power of culture to inspire movements, and has made it central to his work in public service.
MadSoul is a call to action. Festivalgoers of all ages hear from local and national leaders fighting for a better future and connect with organizations advancing immigrant justice, workers’ rights, climate action, LGBTQ+ equality, and more– with on-site voter registration and civic engagement resources available throughout the day.
🛑 KNOW YOUR RIGHTS!
Everyone—regardless of immigration status—has rights under the U.S. Constitution. If ICE comes to your door, here’s what you need to know:
Do Not Open the Door
You are not required to open the door unless ICE shows a warrant signed by a judge with your correct name and address. Ask them to slide it under the door or show it through a window.
You Have the Right to Remain Silent
Do not answer any questions. Anything you say can be used against you. Calmly say:
“I choose to remain silent and want to speak with an attorney.”
Do Not Sign Anything
Don’t sign any documents ICE gives you without reviewing them with an immigration attorney. You have the right to ask for a translation if you don’t understand something.
Need Help? Call the Free Hotline:
1-888-600-5762 (Available 24/7)
Learn more and prepare at: floridaimmigrant.org/know-your-rights [https://floridaimmigrant.org/know-your-rights]

clean_body: [] Hey Peter, We’re now a month into the Republican-led government shutdown, and the impacts on working families are becoming more devastating by the day. This shutdown isn’t about fiscal responsibility — it’s about power. Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans are holding the government hostage to push their extreme agenda: gut healthcare protections and raise ACA premiums , all while protecting tax cuts for billionaires and corporate donors. Democrats are standing united to stop them — fighting to keep our government open, protect working families, and make sure no one loses access to affordable care. Because the truth is simple: in the wealthiest country on Earth, no one should have to choose between keeping their family fed and paying their medical bills. Here in Florida, the stakes are especially high. That’s why we'll be launching a Food Bank Resource Guide this week and why we’re partnering with AFGE and local unions to provide direct support to affected federal workers and their families. You’ll hear more about this below — but know this: we’re not waiting for Washington gridlock to end before taking action. And with the Election on Tuesday, Nov. 4th , we’ve got no time to waste. That’s why I’m proud to endorse Tom Keen for Orlando City Council District 1 [] . Last year, Tom flipped House District 35 blue for the first time in over 40 years — showing what’s possible when you organize, stay rooted in community, and fight for working families. Now he’s ready to bring those values to City Hall. Whether we’re supporting our federal workers, pushing back on the GOP’s cruel agenda, or electing bold leaders like Tom, our team is working non-stop for everyday people. This movement belongs to all of us, and we’re just getting started. Make sure to read through the rest of this newsletter for updates on our work and ways to get involved in the weeks ahead. With love & gratitude, Maxwell Frost [] Congressman Frost & our Fall Organizing Fellows 💬 Stay Connected: Volunteer Signal Channel We’ve launched a Signal Channel just for Team Frost volunteers! It’s a great space to connect, share updates, and stay in the loop. Click here to join! [] 📢 ELECTION DAY IS THIS TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 4! City of Orlando Residents: Election Day is just days away, and it’s time to make your plan to vote! Vote early or vote on Election Day at your assigned polling location. Let’s make sure we turn out strong and keep building progress right here at home! 🕓 Early Voting Information: TODAY, November 2 | 11:00 AM - 3:00 PM Location: Supervisor of Elections Office, 119 W Kaley St, Orlando, FL 32806 If you have a vote-by-mail ballot, do not mail it at this point because it may not arrive in time to be counted. Bring it with you to vote in person or drop it off directly at the Supervisor of Elections Office. 🗳️ Election Day: Tuesday, November 4 | 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM Find Your Polling Location Here [] Click to view a sample ballot or for more information. [] [] [] GOTV Canvass with Team Frost, Young Democrats, & Tom Keen Date: Sunday, November 2 Time: 10:00 AM - 1:00 PM Location: Provided upon RSVP SIGN UP HERE [] GOTV Canvass with Team Frost, Young Democrats, & Tom Keen Date: Monday, November 3 Time: 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM Location: Provided upon RSVP SIGN UP HERE [] VIRTUAL* Election Day Phonebank Date: Tuesday, November 4th Time: 10 AM - 7 PM (multiple shifts) SIGN UP HERE [] [] SUPPORT FOR FEDERAL WORKERS Our partners here at home are stepping up to support Central Floridians during the government shutdown. The American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE) is leading local efforts to provide food relief and essential support to impacted federal workers and their families. Team Frost is proud to stand with AFGE Local 556 in this critical work, and we’re asking YOU to join us. There are several drop-off locations throughout Orlando where you can donate food and supplies to help families weather this shutdown. Questions? Email Fellows@FrostForCongress.com for assistance. That’s why I’m in Congress: to take on the grifters trying to buy and sell our democracy — like Donald Trump and Elon Musk. These guys are dumping endless cash to make sure the government works for them, not for everyday people. I have one thing to say to that: hell no. Against power like theirs, these end-of-month deadlines are _real_. It’s how we know what we’ve got, what we can afford, and how hard we can fight in the month ahead. **So I’m asking for your dollar to make _sure_ we recover from missing our goal. So I _know_ how much funding we have to fight back — and if I’ll be able to stay here organizing, calling out corruption, and pushing for progress.** Musk can burn a dollar on a rocketship and never think twice. But for us? That dollar keeps me in the fight, fuels our movement, and makes sure we have the resources to take these extremists on. clean_body: | ~ | Peter, we just passed our October end-of-month deadline, and we fell short of our goal. That’s why, if you can, I need you to ~ That dollar keeps me in Congress, fighting against corrupt politicians and policies. It lets us keep resisting from the inside — pushing back on fascist power grabs, blocking corrupt bills, and preventing this billionaire takeover. That’s why I’m in Congress: to take on the grifters trying to buy and sell our democracy — like Donald Trump and Elon Musk. These guys are dumping endless cash to make sure the government works for them, not for everyday people. I have one thing to say to that: hell no. Against power like theirs, these end-of-month deadlines are real. It’s how we know what we’ve got, what we can afford, and how hard we can fight in the month ahead. So I’m asking for your dollar to make sure we recover from missing our goal. So I know how much funding we have to fight back — and if I’ll be able to stay here organizing, calling out corruption, and pushing for progress. Musk can burn a dollar on a rocketship and never think twice. But for us? That dollar keeps me in the fight, fuels our movement, and makes sure we have the resources to take these extremists on. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ Thank you, Maxwell Frost | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. # _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a707ec52-98c0-48d3-a2fb-8bb6d8889d3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
CNN anchor Jake Tapper claimed during a recent podcast appearance that Gen Z will be more conservative than previous generations.
Is he on to something?
Tapper based his assessment partly on observing his own children and their friends displaying skepticism toward liberal political ideas. "I think Gen Z's going to be a lot more conservative," he said.
In his interview, Tapper suggested the changes are due to the reaction to COVID and "a lot of progressive politics being forced down their throats in school."
* * *
**Support bold independent journalism! Become a PolitiBrawl member today:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..khgGVIy7uOHcAPO3X96GJfWt_qK2I3qb4069ACyT3_s?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=177599738)
* * *
He also acknowledged Trump performed better with young voters than previous Republicans, with the shift also from perceived failures of progressive movements including Bernie Sanders, Black Lives Matter, and #MeToo.
His statements mark the national shift experienced since Trump's 2024 election victory, and most recently, the assassination of Charlie Kirk.
In a 2025 poll conducted by Yale Institution for Social and Political Studies, **[18-21 years olds lean Republican](https://substack.com/redirect/bf39b43b-d6e9-4db9-b5be-ec08b9a958b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by almost 12 points.
According to 2024 election results, Trump had the largest showing for a Republican candidate since the year 2008. **[In a Harvard Kennedy School study](https://substack.com/redirect/b2b29ad4-3469-445a-bf0f-92ddab106d2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , Micah English, a PhD candidate at Yale University claimed it being the fault of Democrats promising to protect groups they don't follow through for: "If you look at the defection from the Democratic Party in 2024, a lot of that was Black men and young Latino men." English said in the article. "If you think these institutions are failing us, then you need to go out and create different institutions and not engage with electoral politics at all."
After Charlie Kirk's assassination, someone who is **[credited with galvanizing major numbers of young male followers](https://substack.com/redirect/25fb5a9e-a1ff-44b8-b3fd-1c47a541d181?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and Trump voters, there was even more of a political uproar.
**["We are at war for the soul of this nation.](https://substack.com/redirect/2687da48-19d0-47e3-8514-63a07001634a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/2687da48-19d0-47e3-8514-63a07001634a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)I will not retreat. I will advance," Isabella DeLuca told Politico after the event, a sentiment seemingly common among young conservatives and political agnostics alike after the violent murder.
Just yesterday, hundreds of students of Ole Miss came out to the first campus Turning Point USA event since Kirk's death, featuring Vice President Vance and Erika Kirk, with the university's TPUSA chapter president saying their group "has **[grown so significantly](https://substack.com/redirect/b49e076f-23da-45ca-8983-066bf3678b1e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that every time we hold the chapter meeting, we hit capacity, and it's a fire hazard..."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b676093d-bbf7-4c68-8d7d-b3f602c99502?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This is on top of over **[121,000 requests](https://substack.com/redirect/9d5f998c-4eea-4005-b4c8-c9c5502acb1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for new high school and college chapters in the two weeks following Kirk's murder.
If you look up 'young people shifting to conservatism' you'll find plenty of studies showcasing the same thing, even studies about young **[conservative women being three times happier than their liberal counterparts.](https://substack.com/redirect/c00511b3-8771-447a-93b6-9a872ffeab34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
So this begs the question, are more young people turning to Conservatism? Or maybe, are they just being more vocal and open about it?
* * *
**Support bold independent journalism! Become a PolitiBrawl member today:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..khgGVIy7uOHcAPO3X96GJfWt_qK2I3qb4069ACyT3_s?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=177599738)
* * *
That is still up for debate. According to a 2024 poll from **[Pew Research Center](https://substack.com/redirect/5126fc8b-06bf-4d13-a28e-c0719e5cc751?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , young people are still majorly left-leaning, but how much does that count for when the mainstream media, the education system and woke DEI corporate America has silenced and demonized conservatives for so long?
With so much at stake - with major elections like the one for New York City Mayor and midterms coming up in 2026 - young American opinion is absolutely vital in making for a successful campaign.
There's something to be said about the White House's current commitment to social media memes, and language. To Democrats, it's an abomination, but to outside observers who understand that absurd comedy is the language of America's youth (and so are people's hysteric reactions to it), it may just be yet another genius hook that catches and converts young people.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1e4e8d5e-4b27-4f11-b56a-dc0cb8a40918?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
With so many important elections coming up, only time will tell whether this generational shift truly has the legs to stand on.

The very fate of our Democracy and the future of the Democratic party rests upon a Democratic victory in the sleepy and often overlooked November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court Retention Election.
If we lose this court, MAGA will seize control of Pennsylvania and will implement an extreme abortion ban, redistrict the PA congressional map making it blood red, and rig the '26 midterms and '28 presidential in the penultimate swing state - 19 electoral college votes down the drain.
And we have alarming news to share: Republican turnout is surging in the final week.

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: Was 12 Reese's too many?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
On Halloween night, while kids were out collecting candy, our campaign got ahead of all the scares and reached our end-of-month goal!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118519050/580012044/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGZmMjU0NS0wYmI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p1umyXV_NyjzVhxs0bb3UH-A0pAwTMcK5ZwkhuUmCDM=)
Peter,

You know that feeling after Halloween — when you've eaten way too much candy, you get the sugar rush, and then suddenly...crash? You're lying on the couch, wondering if _maybe_ 12 Reese's was too many.

**_Well, I want to tell you something: That is not our campaign. Month after month, we're not crashing, we're growing. We're building steady, lasting momentum together._** And October was no different. On Halloween night, while kids were out collecting candy, our campaign got ahead of the scaries and reached our end-of-month goal!

That kind of progress doesn't happen on its own. It happens because of incredible supporters like you who believe that Iowans deserve better. _Thank you for being part of this._

Your support reminds me why I got into this race in the first place, Peter. Every time I talk with Iowans about Mariannette Miller-Meeks, I see the same look on their faces. It's a mix of fear and exhaustion at the thought of two more years under her leadership.

I'm running to end that nightmare and give our district a representative who actually fights for you and your neighbors. **[If that's the kind of future you look forward to, help me keep building a campaign that makes Mariannette Miller-Meeks quake in her boots. Chip in to help us get ahead on our November fundraising>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118519051/580012045/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251102_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251102_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=64ff2545-0bb8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGZmMjU0NS0wYmI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p1umyXV_NyjzVhxs0bb3UH-A0pAwTMcK5ZwkhuUmCDM=)**

Thank you,

Christina

Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue.

You're lying on the couch, wondering if maybe 12 Reese's was too many. Well, I want to tell you something: That is not our campaign. Month after month, we're not crashing, we're growing. We're building steady, lasting momentum together. And October was no different. On Halloween night, while kids were out collecting candy, our campaign got ahead of the scaries and reached our end-of-month goal! That kind of progress doesn't happen on its own. It happens because of incredible supporters like you who believe that Iowans deserve better. Thank you for being part of this. Your support reminds me why I got into this race in the first place, Peter. Every time I talk with Iowans about Mariannette Miller-Meeks, I see the same look on their faces. It's a mix of fear and exhaustion at the thought of two more years under her leadership. I'm running to end that nightmare and give our district a representative who actually fights for you and your neighbors. = Thank you, Christina Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. With Bitcoin soaring beyond $100 000, many think they've missed the boat... But according to legendary former hedge fund manager Larry Benedict, the best Bitcoin opportunity is still ahead... And it doesn't actually involve buying Bitcoin at all. Instead, you simply "skim" money from the computerized Bitcoin marketplace... And you could receive regular profits of $4,898 or more thanks to other people's Bitcoin transactions... without investing a penny in Bitcoin yourself. Including his 3-part, step-by-step system for getting started right away. | Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from YourCapitalMinds.com, an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. name: Patrick J. Murphy
subject: From the Front with Patrick J. Murphy: A New Generation of Leaders and the Necessity of Service
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/PJM_Logo.png]
Hi Friends,
It’s been another meaningful week of reflection, connection, and purpose. Our current political climate demands clear-eyed, courageous leadership, and it's evident that a new generation is answering the call.
In the Media: Calling for a New Generation of Democratic Leadership
This week, I returned to The Story with Martha MacCallum on Fox News to discuss the future of the Democratic Party and the necessity of new leadership. I argued that Kamala Harris was the first Democratic candidate for President to lose the popular vote in the last two decades and, and there is a genuine need for a new generation of leaders in my proud Democratic Party, and that leadership is coming from the states, not from Washington D.C.
I highlighted leaders like Josh Shapiro, Wes Moore, and Mikie Sherrill, a Naval Academy graduate and fighter pilot, as examples. I am going strong for Mikie Sherrill, stumping for her in New Jersey as was Josh Shapiro, and using my bi-partisan nature (Army vs Navy) to advocate for her, and I think she'll make us proud with a win this Tuesday.
On Substack: With Washington Shut Down, Look to Your Local Leaders
In this week's column, I wrote about how real leadership often shines brightest in the states. With the federal government shut down for nearly a month, we should look to our governors and local leaders for moral clarity and practical solutions.
Read the full column & consider subscribing: With Washington Shut Down, Look to Your Local Leaders [https://patrickmurphypa.substack.com/p/with-washington-shut-down-look-to]
Building Resilient Communities
This past week, I continued my work to harness the public and private sectors to strengthen our military families and veterans. I was in Las Vegas where I spoke at MCON on “Building Resilient Communities: VSO & Brand Collaboration for Military Families” and then did a fireside chat with the first woman Commander in Chief of the VFW, fellow Iraq Veteran Carol Whitmore, on “Leading from the Front: Breaking Barriers & Building Bridges.”
I joined leaders from across the country to discuss how veterans’ organizations, our government and the private sector can strengthen the foundation of military families, communities and the challenges we face today in America.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/MCON%202_2.jpg]
I also taped our weekly ‘Warrior Money’ show for Yahoo Finance and another one for Hilco Global on sovereign debt with my Wharton colleague Dr. Jessica Wachter. My main focus always remains on bridging public service and private innovation to strengthen America to meet today’s challenges.
Warrior Money Episode [https://youtu.be/oF7wtX4zZo0?si=I9cuRa0_IPgYAgbu]
Stay tuned for the episodes when they go live, including our Warrior Money preview with Pete Buttigieg.
Pete Buttigieg Preview [https://www.instagram.com/reel/DQcPhw9ie7_/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&igsh=MzRlODBiNWFlZA==] .
This week we also had a phenomenal Fireside ETA (Entrepreneurship Through Acquisition) in Erlanger, KY, on Thursday, October 30, 2025, hosted by Owners in Honor (OIH) at the DAV National Headquarters.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/MCON.jpg]
Our work continues to focus on building trust, showing courage, and reminding us that service is not a season of life, it’s a way of life. We must ensure we focus on the important work of getting out the vote (GOTV) for the new generation of leaders.
Thank you for being part of our team.
Honorable Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Army Under Secretary

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/JcTKjLm2l0SduvIvv8SeUg2?unsubscribedata=Yfj3O8IIgizgnlFWOzkrteraxb1TVJEX76kN1A0hciYnaGBFLd5Lgh6%2F4cATb5g8Z%2FjynraQWZrZvJaVo0HcjF9915mzCFmBtpTm08p8kzOqqZOjLiVx3p8xCOmPJSaX75DNnis7vJ02OVtraGAobs%2F8iso5YxLCd4s%2B3I8%2FY3uxJWfbSLvTH1eCt9crFOU9CNRnOlZcUeiWiXggEDIqW98nyUuck%2FKZpBKKvD%2FzAxFPC2P0zuH1dirm5w2LhLMJGAYBXStyWEGoiarP2%2Fmr179wkN8IPgWuFe8j5YSsN%2F1C6G1OkQuGcrvK%2FlosToQLodUE5Zn1VsIQGqjs2KQ7ecadc7RSTQnMN6VOlUcPxXJxrmcHIUugvyvn2fkYPhJb5%2Fvg97G%2BXXJdBkZWRF9AA3Qe75vwAdcMzpIx5X8Vtfh3XBK5ZNetMdWEJQC4zgRe .

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: “Let them eat cake”
disclaimer_text: paid for by some of the biggest corporations in America:
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1220%2E251025%2EvzdzSS ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1220%2E251025%2EvzdzSS ]Abdul for US Senate

Hey Peter,

Right now, Donald Trump is building a $300 million ballroom at the White
House, paid for by some of the biggest corporations in America:

[ A ]A screenshot from CNN showing all of the corporations funding Trump's
ballroom

As construction crews pour concrete for his latest monument to greed,
millions of Americans are wondering how they’ll afford groceries this
week.

That’s because WIC and other food assistance programs are at risk during
the government shutdown.

You’ve probably heard the phrase “Let them eat cake.”

It’s what Marie Antoinette supposedly said when told that poor families in
France had no bread.

Whether she said it or not, the meaning is clear: A ruling class so out of
touch that they can’t see the suffering around them.

Now, centuries later, Donald Trump and his corporate backers are living
out that same story.

This is what oligarchy looks like,
Peter, and we won’t let it
define us.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/survey/ballroom-donors-petition/?source=em20251102-1208&akid=1220%2E251025%2EvzdzSS ]Join me in demanding that the corporations funding Trump’s ballroom
contribute an equal amount to food banks across the country:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/survey/ballroom-donors-petition/?source=em20251102-1208&akid=1220%2E251025%2EvzdzSS ]Add your name ››

In solidarity,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1004&akid=1220%2E251025%2EvzdzSS
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1005&akid=1220%2E251025%2EvzdzSS

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Scott Presler
subject: I have door knockers waiting for the call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action New Jersey Inc
body:
I have door knockers in NJ waiting for me to call and tell them a sponsor has stepped up.
| | | | |
---
Patriot, we are approaching the end of early voting in New Jersey and Republicans are just a few thousand votes behind Democrats in early voter turnout.
[SPONSOR A DOOR KNOCKER](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=10e4be1f3bc3418cb1cdd6b4da3b79c0&_e=jSgrrNTgpgQ-HO2zcZabQsnV_pVPAYDEXoEXD7UZrrKz_hCuvunAtwFR7tVotw8hYpF5D05dYXYKm53HjH11DLoUn_o74SGgumJPZ3AYhEJYRUn6x533IRlSszy2A5FymeO6JZqMJn3Bnr66YnC7EidtyvawwSnZx2N9-xKJInWSwCk_OQSK0P9ZVzl_rRC1juwffwmJ8K8brdDE1sNFrSy7cGR1Il3jcq-5Xe_pZDp0Tz0Ne1Vi-uUgsTdZXwogK1X5KFtYntax04iqC6lxweiUm6DZKRdoqiYTolVWkw9H4Ois4K9o4UhYJv2Ak5aGtkNIJ7vt4we5eUOl3KDNhtUvn7APQ7AsssD9_DEj30MA9lJDEh3bJjqAuIyb9GXmNF55gQShE3Pw-1LtEs3Tew%3D%3D)
My team of grassroots activists is knocking doors across the state driving Republicans to vote early in-person so that we have as many “votes in the bank” as possible before election day. Here are the latest numbers:
🔴Republican In-Person - 122,628🔵Democratic In-Person - 127,543🟡All Others In-Person \- 61,030
Right now, the Democrat early in-person vote lead is 5 TIMES LESS than their margin in 2021, **_[and with only a few days left of early in-person voting, we could win the early in-person vote](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=10e4be1f3bc3418cb1cdd6b4da3b79c0&_e=jSgrrNTgpgQ-HO2zcZabQsnV_pVPAYDEXoEXD7UZrrKz_hCuvunAtwFR7tVotw8hYpF5D05dYXYKm53HjH11DLoUn_o74SGgumJPZ3AYhEJYRUn6x533IRlSszy2A5FymeO6JZqMJn3Bnr66YnC7EidtyvawwSnZx2N9-xKJInWSwCk_OQSK0P9ZVzl_rRC1juwffwmJ8K8brdDE1sNFrSy7cGR1Il3jcq-5Xe_pZDokuDgwD7TflVYvN_BFqv0S54_JSA7yR0vYaUcuhgAulG45NWsI3Cu8MPlODIi3OLWDTI5YK93u2PObHat1MSG0-YEmXMCCjAiWVT9ye-tmM7c1tABqcuZxDOmZVWz6bH8I_2Zi7BXWK3dd0C_xolpv5Dys_uUOv6iui88-Jj_n4A%3D%3D)_.**
[SPONSOR A DOOR KNOCKER](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=10e4be1f3bc3418cb1cdd6b4da3b79c0&_e=jSgrrNTgpgQ-HO2zcZabQsnV_pVPAYDEXoEXD7UZrrKz_hCuvunAtwFR7tVotw8hYpF5D05dYXYKm53HjH11DLoUn_o74SGgumJPZ3AYhEJYRUn6x533IRlSszy2A5FymeO6JZqMJn3Bnr66YnC7EidtyvawwSnZx2N9-xKJInWSwCk_OQSK0P9ZVzl_rRC1juwffwmJ8K8brdDE1sNFrSy7cGR1Il3jcq-5Xe_pZDq6R8jfPtDJGld394R50fK1S1yQ-5InjlKB00NGITE5LXwyFAyWz6AlzngqghtLsMEo_-dd-TnQOg1zh-1hTXktX3J4jiXYNH12ElS__h68tAjLP1GuYHQzaX0jzpE-9a6q-5JYLaNdl8hfvBKMh7JlygUBDrTq4x-hdgq4BqukVg%3D%3D)
Patriot, there is a lot of hard work ahead of us, but just like President Trump’s victory last year, the payoff is worth the sore feet and tired legs.
Why do we knock on doors? Because the research shows it is the most effective way to get voters to the polls. The equation is simple: the more doors we knock, the more Republican voters cast their ballots.
[SPONSOR A DOOR KNOCKER](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=10e4be1f3bc3418cb1cdd6b4da3b79c0&_e=jSgrrNTgpgQ-HO2zcZabQsnV_pVPAYDEXoEXD7UZrrKz_hCuvunAtwFR7tVotw8hYpF5D05dYXYKm53HjH11DLoUn_o74SGgumJPZ3AYhEJYRUn6x533IRlSszy2A5FymeO6JZqMJn3Bnr66YnC7EidtyvawwSnZx2N9-xKJInWSwCk_OQSK0P9ZVzl_rRC1juwffwmJ8K8brdDE1sNFrSy7cGR1Il3jcq-5Xe_pZDo1IatBYHq34dLcjH81j2rfAG_hl0MtpMXOsn-saVhjpr4u79Dh4zq-3vC7B7oJyZ7RCIMegSykVkQVGHRTziggLKB1I3djyL1zGXNXFYzfkrVnQn6RsNPcKtdySwQdl_261QypyAZDzC8t8-Pucf3MDPkahKeAfzwYm4KDtPoR2g%3D%3D)
**That’s where you come in.**
**We have door knockers in New Jersey right now who are waiting to get the call that a generous supporter has sponsored them and it’s time for them to start knocking.**

clean_body: I have door knockers in NJ waiting for me to call and tell them a sponsor has stepped up. | | | | | Patriot, we are approaching the end of early voting in New Jersey and Republicans are just a few thousand votes behind Democrats in early voter turnout. My team of grassroots activists is knocking doors across the state driving Republicans to vote early in-person so that we have as many “votes in the bank” as possible before election day. Here are the latest numbers: 🔴Republican In-Person - 122,628🔵Democratic In-Person - 127,543🟡All Others In-Person \- 61,030 Right now, the Democrat early in-person vote lead is 5 TIMES LESS than their margin in 2021, . Patriot, there is a lot of hard work ahead of us, but just like President Trump’s victory last year, the payoff is worth the sore feet and tired legs. Why do we knock on doors? Because the research shows it is the most effective way to get voters to the polls. The equation is simple: the more doors we knock, the more Republican voters cast their ballots. That’s where you come in. We have door knockers in New Jersey right now who are waiting to get the call that a generous supporter has sponsored them and it’s time for them to start knocking. . **Thank you, Thank you, THANK YOU, Scott Presler** Early Vote Action New Jersey | | | | | |

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Mike Johnson admitted it — this shutdown could break records
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251102-1604-foote&t=1001&akid=1604%2E342411%2E9GrGhU ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

24 million people.

That’s how many Americans are enrolled in the Affordable Care Act — and
how many could lose access to affordable healthcare while Trump and his
MAGA loyalists refuse to reopen the government.

Republican House Speaker Mike Johnson projected that the current shutdown
could be the longest in history — and he won’t even consider negotiating.

Let that sink in: Trump and his MAGA allies are playing political games
with people’s lives, with zero regard for who gets hurt.

If they get their way, millions who rely on the ACA could see their
premiums skyrocket overnight. This isn’t just about extending these tax
credits. It’s about not having to choose between putting food on the table
and paying for insulin. It’s about being able to afford life-saving care.

And this isn’t new. Republicans tried this in 2013, shutting down the
government in a failed attempt to repeal the ACA. In 2017, Trump tried
again with his “repeal and replace” plan. Each time, millions of lives
were at risk — and each time they failed because people like you stood up
and fought back.

They won’t get away with it this time, either.

The Squad is holding the line on healthcare, and fighting back with every
tool at our disposal. They’re in the halls of Congress, championing issues
for working-class families, and refusing to back down — but they cannot do
it without you.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251102-movement.BreQFK&refcode=em20251102-1604&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1604%2E342411%2E9GrGhU ]Can you chip in $3 today to help the Squad fight back
and protect healthcare access for millions of people?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251102-movement.BreQFK&refcode=em20251102-1604&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1604%2E342411%2E9GrGhU ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1604%2E342411%2E9GrGhU

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. subject: Zero dark thirty time for Dems in PA

body:
As long as we are physically able, as long as we have gas in the tank and a legion of supporters at our backs, we will never stop fighting to win.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-zpaAY2wqmfCIG0kGwjvfE5XWMW2pBIzc-n8J7cvCKXFo8bCQCcjjs2PWFuQV343cPV3m_MVN_tvb4cXDbfD2LCVHw9d_FGWC04NHwNr5hhlh43oTtO9GO9UHFmegUVUmlxa0NjX0mbl7DJK0rmddz2pfAAPBOSz_a0K0JHrcV1w4jcxFSl_KFQUm7Tsdf8gjoZzN6AJdkmF51k7hN3y1ahkIaIZ5AjG1kbgdQK8acE=&c=DgX5Kh99myA7fGydddHLwuxfSTGTEz9CbJCtoZHTGM_KiudMAAhRjw==&ch=w_wn-TTLZLZbaTCgkDpuZ4GAk0_Xdm5Rcgjk2C_wlmzBfn0VdI_P9Q==)

| Peter,
We know we've been emailing a lot. But it is for a really good reason: saving the 5-2 Dem majority on the highest court in the ultra-critical swing state of Pennsylvania from falling to MAGA.
We are working to exhaustion to keep three Democratic justices from being summarily dismissed from their posts overnight. Failure would mean crucial decisions about abortion rights and the future of free and fair elections in Pennsylvania are now entirely at Trump's discretion.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-zpaAY2wqmfCIG0kGwjvfE5XWMW2pBIzc-n8J7cvCKXFo8bCQCcjjs2PWFuQV343cPV3m_MVN_tvb4cXDbfD2LCVHw9d_FGWC04NHwNr5hhlh43oTtO9GO9UHFmegUVUmlxa0NjX0mbl7DJK0rmddz2pfAAPBOSz_a0K0JHrcV1w4jcxFSl_KFQUm7Tsdf8gjoZzN6AJdkmF51k7hN3y1c_T0iWMr965UdDZQQVyDFg=&c=DgX5Kh99myA7fGydddHLwuxfSTGTEz9CbJCtoZHTGM_KiudMAAhRjw==&ch=w_wn-TTLZLZbaTCgkDpuZ4GAk0_Xdm5Rcgjk2C_wlmzBfn0VdI_P9Q==)
---
| We cannot allow MAGA to unseat these three justices and take over this court. The impact of such an outcome would be immense, and immediate. We have to defeat them on Tuesday--it's that simple.
So for our team, this weekend is not a time to rest and recover from the work week and Halloween fun--it's zero dark thirty time: time for Democrats in PA to rise before dawn, suit up, and pound the pavement until the very end to defeat MAGA.
As long as we are physically able, as long as we have gas in the tank and a legion of supporters at our backs, we will never stop fighting to win. Because for us, this isn't a game--it's our lives at stake here.
[This team is working to deliver an undeniable victory in PA that will lift the spirits of Democrats everywhere. If you have given already, thank you so much - we hope you are able to make another donation as soon as you can. If you have been waiting for the right time to pitch in, our hour of need is upon us now:](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-zpaAY2wqmfCIG0kGwjvfE5XWMW2pBIzc-n8J7cvCKXFo8bCQCcjjs2PWFuQV343cPV3m_MVN_tvb4cXDbfD2LCVHw9d_FGWC04NHwNr5hhlh43oTtO9GO9UHFmegUVUmlxa0NjX0mbl7DJK0rmddz2pfAAPBOSz_a0K0JHrcV1w4jcxFSl_KFQUm7Tsdf8gjoZzN6AJdkmF51k7hN3y1ZMfwGnBgrf6mp3yTwaUPQE=&c=DgX5Kh99myA7fGydddHLwuxfSTGTEz9CbJCtoZHTGM_KiudMAAhRjw==&ch=w_wn-TTLZLZbaTCgkDpuZ4GAk0_Xdm5Rcgjk2C_wlmzBfn0VdI_P9Q==)

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Must-Watch: Rich Lowry's Inspiring Speech in Mississippi
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/richinms2025?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,
**I wanted to share this awesome talk Rich Lowry gave last week right here in Mississippi, where he joined Governor Tate Reeves to celebrate the state's remarkable successes.**

You can watch it by clicking on the image below:
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b9b261ebb6&e=5703353baa)
---
| **In his remarks, Lowry highlights rapid growth fueled by pro-growth policies.** He also touches on the future of conservatism, the Trump era's impact, and why these achievements offer hope for conservative policies nationwide.

Rich’s talk is both energizing and amusing – do watch it!

Warm regards and this not so warm Sunday!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9f7bfac894&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warmest regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---

name: Able Dems
subject: The U.S. military is NOT for sale.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Trump just accepted $130 million from a billionaire “patriot” | | | Donald Trump just accepted $130 million from a billionaire “patriot” to pay our troops during his government shutdown. That amounts to less than ONE day of pay, but that’s not the point. The point is that the Commander-in-Chief just let a private citizen fund our military. Once the armed services are paid by oligarchs, they become part of a private militia, and we no longer have a democracy. **At Able Dems, we know what happens when government stops serving the people. We fight every day to elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies because democracy means shared power, not****purchased privilege.** **[Chip in $10 or whatever you can today to help Able Dems elect inclusive, fearless leaders who will defend democracy for all, not just the wealthy few.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lC87RV9ONjG63TCp4NCM7n9Axc_ec0W2nmJrYmByp0RAhe2gxydzT0lWankVjTSkui9hm0zvyxQCmG6Rsx1Sl7xAprsTVtzWnM4rnLMgqyTws2sVaPbK63MNQ7xYZFGSMp2Da50KB3VPjGkorAEpoX5pOFAVLPg27r2RlGwQA7yx80nDtzoCZ-X2LQJyijlVl3IxmDJPgj4N4OykxDH2yuyx2wRRLhDuCrXBThax2EuRlSV_FTfXOVc8lYOA_qElPCDa5C6upz1FVBupar1Wuf7Lxci62fTNMKNvuLK_bxUQ/4l9/UYBvPzc7QqGmnh5dD1VyQQ/h0/h001.AO7QBKMKBxvvgy0ef8hngA5Y7Oxocp7qiNqzyjkbY48)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: Trump just accepted $130 million from a billionaire “patriot” | | | Donald Trump just accepted $130 million from a billionaire “patriot” to pay our troops during his government shutdown. That amounts to less than ONE day of pay, but that’s not the point. The point is that the Commander-in-Chief just let a private citizen fund our military. Once the armed services are paid by oligarchs, they become part of a private militia, and we no longer have a democracy. At Able Dems, we know what happens when government stops serving the people. We fight every day to elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies because democracy means shared power, notpurchased privilege. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. The patriot donor is billionaire Timothy Mellon, a Trump mega-donor who has spent $227 million on federal campaign contributions since 2020. He gave more to Trump in 2024 than Elon Musk. If we let billionaires fund our troops, what’s next? Who gets to “sponsor” our healthcare, our schools, our rights? We cannot allow Trump and his MAGA enablers to auction off our democracy to the highest bidder. In solidarity, -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. name: Ro Khanna
subject: I just introduced a resolution to hold ICE accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
At 1 AM on October 1, ICE agents conducted a military-style raid [https://chicago.suntimes.com/news/2025/09/27/ice-made-unlawful-arrests-during-operation-midway-blitz-new-court-filing-alleges] on an apartment complex in Chicago without any warrants for arrest. They broke down doors, threw flashbang grenades, and detained dozens of men, women, and half-clothed children outside with zip ties. The raid is one of dozens of instances of ICE terrorizing immigrant communities and those who defend them.
The American people didn’t vote for ICE to harass U.S. citizens, especially not without oversight, body cams, or accountability. They didn’t vote for ICE to violate people’s constitutional rights or their dignity.
That’s why I’m introducing a House Resolution to hold ICE and CBP accountable. It will bring transparency, professionalism, and oversight to these agencies.
My resolution, cosponsored by Del. Eleanor Holmes Norton and Reps. Jonathan Jackson and Jasmine Crockett, calls for:
✅ Mandatory body cameras for ICE and CBP agents
✅ Visible identification , no more masks, except in true safety emergencies
✅ Independent civilian review boards to investigate misconduct
✅ Transferring oversight of ICE to the Justice Department for proper accountability
As I told CBS News [https://www.cbsnews.com/news/ro-khanna-ice-cbp-resolution-immigration/] :
“This is about respecting law enforcement as professionals — but holding them to high professional standards. We should hold ICE officers to the same level of transparency and accountability we expect of police officers or FBI agents.”
Americans didn’t vote for ICE to violate constitutional rights or terrorize families in their own homes.
They voted for a nation that upholds the rule of law, protects due process, and treats every person with dignity.
ADD YOUR NAME: Support the ICE Accountability and Oversight Resolution. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/ice-resolution-petition?contactdata=NdV2OEhPZtQ3WmisBEbrhovJ+sbfMAQtLgz2R4ZhOQ8y3hMOecne0RjxvJ/9ysPT7MoLXncp8gMw2hBQE+XvOZVg8PVDpQBwNvGftJZp8UVnpGt1NHmM6UfbdJbBosvDKi1g96+DjAEtXnacpL5ag7JK2mH9fEpRD6FfQB30aPtX+rRMLgWb5Nc6leKsuIPv]
TAKE ACTION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/ice-resolution-petition?contactdata=NdV2OEhPZtQ3WmisBEbrhovJ+sbfMAQtLgz2R4ZhOQ8y3hMOecne0RjxvJ/9ysPT7MoLXncp8gMw2hBQE+XvOZVg8PVDpQBwNvGftJZp8UVnpGt1NHmM6UfbdJbBosvDKi1g96+DjAEtXnacpL5ag7JK2mH9fEpRD6FfQB30aPtX+rRMLgWb5Nc6leKsuIPv]
This isn’t about partisanship; it’s about protecting both public trust and officer safety.
I unequivocally condemn threats and violence against ICE agents. But accountability and transparency make law enforcement stronger, not weaker.
Together, we can restore public confidence and ensure that no federal agency operates above the law.
SIGN THE PETITION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/ice-resolution-petition?contactdata=NdV2OEhPZtQ3WmisBEbrhovJ+sbfMAQtLgz2R4ZhOQ8y3hMOecne0RjxvJ/9ysPT7MoLXncp8gMw2hBQE+XvOZVg8PVDpQBwNvGftJZp8UVnpGt1NHmM6UfbdJbBosvDKi1g96+DjAEtXnacpL5ag7JK2mH9fEpRD6FfQB30aPtX+rRMLgWb5Nc6leKsuIPv]
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

[] TAKE ACTION [] This isn’t about partisanship; it’s about protecting both public trust and officer safety. I unequivocally condemn threats and violence against ICE agents. But accountability and transparency make law enforcement stronger, not weaker. Together, we can restore public confidence and ensure that no federal agency operates above the law. SIGN THE PETITION [] Thank you for your activism and all that you do. In solidarity, Ro Wait! One more thing– Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future. If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you! subject: We could win the early in-person vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action New Jersey Inc
body:
Our Door Knockers are waiting for sponsors.

| | | | |
---
Patriot, we are approaching the end of early voting in New Jersey and Republicans are just a few thousand votes behind Democrats in early voter turnout.
[SPONSOR A DOOR KNOCKER](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bqGG/?__vbtrk=MzMwNTM4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMwNTM4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
My team of grassroots activists is knocking doors across the state driving Republicans to vote early in-person so that we have as many “votes in the bank” as possible before election day. Here are the latest numbers:
🔴Republican In-Person - 122,628🔵Democratic In-Person - 127,543🟡All Others In-Person \- 61,030
Right now, the Democrat early in-person vote lead is 5 TIMES LESS than their margin in 2021, **_[and with only a few days left of early in-person voting, we could win the early in-person vote](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bqGG/?__vbtrk=MzMwNTM4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMwNTM4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
[SPONSOR A DOOR KNOCKER](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bqGG/?__vbtrk=MzMwNTM4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMwNTM4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, there is a lot of hard work ahead of us, but just like President Trump’s victory last year, the payoff is worth the sore feet and tired legs.
Why do we knock on doors? Because the research shows it is the most effective way to get voters to the polls. The equation is simple: the more doors we knock, the more Republican voters cast their ballots.

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: More than a million workers have missed their paychecks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends, let’s talk about this disastrous GOP government shutdown by the numbers for a minute:
* Six weeks: How long it’s been since Mike Johnson called the House into session. (Actually six weeks and two days.)
* 1.4 million: How many federal workers missed a full paycheck at the end of October.
* 1 in 8: How many Americans rely on SNAP to put food on the table.
* $6 billion: How much money Trump’s USDA is sitting on while they refuse to fund SNAP benefits.
* 65,000: How many kids served by Head Start who will be left without child care programming.
* Nov. 15th: The date Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says we’ll be unable to pay our troops.
You get the idea. This is just horrific. It’s cruel, it’s chaotic, and the worst part is... it’s completely UNNECESSARY.
This kind of benefit cutoff has never happened before. Not once. Even during past shutdowns, programs like SNAP continued — because cutting off food for families, pregnant women, and babies was unthinkable.
But Trump and Republicans in Congress are breaking precedent (and the law) for programs that have always had bipartisan support. They’re choosing to let millions of children go hungry. It’s sick.
Let’s be 100% clear about how to fix this nightmare: Republicans control the House of Representatives. Republicans control the Senate. Republicans control the White House. They own this shutdown, and they need to end it.
The sad truth is that we can’t force Republicans to actually care about their constituents. But we can care for each other. If you’re able, please consider donating to or volunteering with a local food bank or mutual aid group near you. Here are a few places to start:
— Jewish Family Service [https://www.jfssd.org/]
— San Diego Food Bank [https://www.sandiegofoodbank.org/]
Democrats are still fighting to reopen the government, protect health care, and fund programs families rely on. We’re showing up to work every day, and we’re not going to stop.
Thanks for looking out for your neighbors.
Sara

California’s 51st District

name: Sharice Davids
subject: This email is just to say thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
When I first heard about the Kansas GOP’s latest redistricting push, I wasn’t completely sure how this team would respond

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118524201/580030075/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGM5MjYzZi0xOGI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nhFfl3spfVKp70dPDLS_SHQuu5XPAr3xAAY-6nFQLeg=) I owe you a huge thank you. Not just for helping us hit our fundraising goal on Friday night when it looked like we were going to fall short, but for stepping up again and again over the last two months. When I first heard about the Kansas GOP’s latest redistricting push, I wasn’t completely sure how this team would respond. It’s still so soon after last year’s painful election, and I know how easy it would be to throw our hands in the air and accept this gerrymander as an inevitability. Trust me: I know just how much the Kansas GOP would have _loved_ to see us give up. **But we didn’t.** Instead, we’ve essentially run a complete re-election campaign in just two months — building momentum, gathering resources, and sending a clear message to Kansas GOP leadership: **Gerrymander our state at your own risk.** Now, their redistricting push is stalling. They _still_ don’t have the signatures to force a special session later this month — and Donald Trump is getting nervous. **And that’s all thanks to you.** So for now, I’ll leave you with this: _Thank you for stepping up._ I wouldn’t be here without you, and I know that together, we can be ready for whatever’s next. Let’s keep up the good work. [_**And finally, if you haven’t had the opportunity to chip in yet, please know that our fight isn’t over yet. Every donation — whether it’s $1 or $100 — goes directly toward our campaign’s work to make sure Kansas voters aren’t silenced in the next election.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118524202/580030076/-46554286?refcode=email_110225_ty&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGM5MjYzZi0xOGI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nhFfl3spfVKp70dPDLS_SHQuu5XPAr3xAAY-6nFQLeg=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118524203/580030077/-46554286?refcode=email_110225_ty&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGM5MjYzZi0xOGI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nhFfl3spfVKp70dPDLS_SHQuu5XPAr3xAAY-6nFQLeg=)
---
I can’t thank you enough for your help.
Sharice

Now, their redistricting push is stalling. They still don’t have the signatures to force a special session later this month — and Donald Trump is getting nervous. And that’s all thanks to you. So for now, I’ll leave you with this: Thank you for stepping up. I wouldn’t be here without you, and I know that together, we can be ready for whatever’s next. Let’s keep up the good work. = | | = I can’t thank you enough for your help. Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. And she is just one of our _ten_ brilliant Virginia House of Delegates candidates running to flip seats in Red-to-Blue races this year.

These races are some of the most competitive in the country, and every single one could determine whether the Commonwealth moves forward or backward.

Our candidates are running strong campaigns, connecting with voters, and building the grassroots energy they need to win. But they also need our help to compete with Republican war chests funded by corporate special interests and billionaires.

clean_body: Help Kimberly Pope Adams and nine other Democratic pro-choice women win in Virginia's most competitive races this Election Day. | = Hi Peter, 78 votes. 👆That's how many votes Kimberly Pope Adams lost by in her heartbreaker of a 2023 Virginia House of Delegates race. Now, she's running again to finish what she started and stand up for her community. = | = Running for office isn't easy. It's long days knocking on doors, having tough conversations, making personal sacrifices, and opening yourself up to scrutiny and criticism. Kimberly is taking on this challenge a second time because she knows what she stands for, and she knows what's at stake. And she is just one of our ten brilliant Virginia House of Delegates candidates running to flip seats in Red-to-Blue races this year. These races are some of the most competitive in the country, and every single one could determine whether the Commonwealth moves forward or backward. Our candidates are running strong campaigns, connecting with voters, and building the grassroots energy they need to win. But they also need our help to compete with Republican war chests funded by corporate special interests and billionaires. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Emily Parés (she/her/hers) Deputy Chief Campaigns Officer, State & Local Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. ## **_NOTICE ON SOCIAL SECURITY FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP!_**

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Friend, I got **NO TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY** passed, and I signed it into law.
**_BUT DON’T THANK ME YET._**
_Democrats and Radical Judges are trying to shut down all the progress we’ve made TOGETHER._
PLEASE, all I’m asking is for you to respond to me, IMMEDIATELY:
**_[DO YOU STAND WITH TRUMP ENDING TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY?](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
[YES](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

It’s going to be hard, but in order to make this plan a reality, I’m going to need your help TODAY, not tomorrow. Tomorrow will be too late.
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you,
