name: Justin with Team Moulton
subject: 3 reasons
body:
| |
---
Team, this is Justin, Seth’s Digital Director. I could list a hundred reasons why I think Seth is the best person to represent our commonwealth in the U.S. Senate — _but there's a lot of work to be done, so here are just three:_
1. **Seth has a proven track record of service, spanning from four tours of duty in Iraq to ten years in Congress.**

He led the charge to create the national 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline, won major victories for veterans and their families, delivered more than $1 billion in federal investments to his district, and introduced the most ambitious high-speed rail plan in American history.

2. **Our nation and our planet are in crisis. This moment demands a new generation of leadership — leaders who will fight for bold change, not just uphold the status quo.**

Seth is just that kind of leader. He's helped flip dozens of Congressional seats from red to blue with his Serve America initiative, and he's repeatedly stood up against his own party establishment when they have failed to deliver for us.

3. **Seth is building a people-powered campaign to protect our democracy, stand up to Donald Trump, and deliver bold solutions to the urgent problems we face.**

_Will you help power that fight, friend?_ **[Support our campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118524725/580031873/1375639745?refcode=251102_jp_reason_b1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTEwOWZjMC0xYmI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bwc5foBGbMY1TVqeuGEs190d7H6Tcp_C0AOxZCV5Otg=)** Thank you. — Justin with Team Moulton
| | |
---|---|---

### About Seth Moulton
Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. clean_body: | | Team, this is Justin, Seth’s Digital Director. I could list a hundred reasons why I think Seth is the best person to represent our commonwealth in the U.S. Senate — but there's a lot of work to be done, so here are just three: 1. Seth has a proven track record of service, spanning from four tours of duty in Iraq to ten years in Congress. He led the charge to create the national 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline, won major victories for veterans and their families, delivered more than $1 billion in federal investments to his district, and introduced the most ambitious high-speed rail plan in American history. 2. Our nation and our planet are in crisis. This moment demands a new generation of leadership — leaders who will fight for bold change, not just uphold the status quo. Seth is just that kind of leader. He's helped flip dozens of Congressional seats from red to blue with his Serve America initiative, and he's repeatedly stood up against his own party establishment when they have failed to deliver for us. 3. Seth is building a people-powered campaign to protect our democracy, stand up to Donald Trump, and deliver bold solutions to the urgent problems we face. Will you help power that fight, friend? = Thank you. — Justin with Team Moulton | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. They live in Salem, Massachusetts. | = | = ---|--- Follow Seth | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Thank you in advance for anything you can give to support GIFFORDS PAC before Tuesday’s elections.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I am so grateful to have your support as we fight to end gun violence.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251102-1-b&t=1&akid=11007%2E3935704%2Eef2wF4)
Hello, Gabby Giffords here with an urgent update:
Polls open in less than 48 hours for the fall 2025 elections. As millions of voters prepare to vote, GIFFORDS is working to reach final undecided voters to elect gun safety leaders up and down the ballot.
We fell slightly behind in our October fundraising goal, and need your help to catch up. **So we’re trying something different today: We’re lowering our ask to just $1 for everybody reading this email.**
[**So, will you pitch in $1 (or more, if you can afford it) so we can stand up against the gun lobby’s influence in Tuesday’s election and beyond? It adds up quickly when everyone is chipping in.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/63703?c0=giffords-em-q42025.5jLSU2&refcode=em251102-1-b&t=2&akid=11007%2E3935704%2Eef2wF4)
| | **[Donate $1](https://go.giffords.org/go/63703?c0=giffords-em-q42025.5jLSU2&t=3&akid=11007%2E3935704%2Eef2wF4)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251102-1-b&t=4&akid=11007%2E3935704%2Eef2wF4)**
---
****
$1 because this is our first major test since Donald Trump took office, and the results will have a huge impact on who has the momentum going into the midterms.
$1 because early voting has already kicked off in several states, and we’re running out of time to share our message.
$1 because we can stand up to the gun lobby and pass commonsense gun safety legislation across the country...but we need grassroots donors to step up today.
I know what you’re thinking. $1 might not feel like it has a big impact... but when 5,000 or even 10,000 people are making the choice to donate today, it suddenly gives us more resources to reach voters.
**_That last-minute money could be enough to break the tie in our most competitive races.**_
But here’s the reality: Not everyone will donate to this email. That’s why we’re hoping folks who truly understand the need to end gun violence — and the stakes of Tuesday’s election — step up today.
[**Thank you in advance for anything you can give to support GIFFORDS PAC. Whether it’s $1, $10, or even $100, I am so grateful to have your support as we fight to end gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251102-1-b&t=5&akid=11007%2E3935704%2Eef2wF4)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $1](https://go.giffords.org/go/20737?c0=giffords-em-q42025.Pe3qAk&refcode=em251102-1-b&t=6&akid=11007%2E3935704%2Eef2wF4)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-q42025.XBpxZs&refcode=em251102-1-b&t=7&akid=11007%2E3935704%2Eef2wF4)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-q42025.bzPEeG&refcode=em251102-1-b&t=8&akid=11007%2E3935704%2Eef2wF4)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-q42025.BnaACt&refcode=em251102-1-b&t=9&akid=11007%2E3935704%2Eef2wF4)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-q42025.3xF0Vo&refcode=em251102-1-b&t=10&akid=11007%2E3935704%2Eef2wF4)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&refcode=em251102-1-b&t=11&akid=11007%2E3935704%2Eef2wF4)**
---
****
— Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=11007%2E3935704%2Eef2wF4) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1011&refcode=email20251102_v&akid=9775%2E5885482%2EXMY3Ex ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

With just 48 hours left before Election Day, we urgently need your help.

Our grassroots movement is up against this tidal wave of billionaire cash
– Trump-supporting Wall Street billionaire Bill Ackman dumped a staggering
$1.5 million into anti-Mamdani super PACs, hoping to drown us out.
Billionaire former NYC mayor Michael Bloomberg cut a $1.5 million check to
a pro-Cuomo super PAC and publicly endorsed Cuomo.

While the billionaire class may be in full panic mode, we have something
they never will: people power. And we’re putting EVERYTHING we’ve got into
this final get out the vote sprint to get Mamdani voters to the polls and
meet our goal of 500,000 voter contacts before election day.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email20251102nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9775%2E5885482%2EXMY3Ex ]Please, can you rush a donation right now to help us raise $20,000 in the
next 48 hours to power our massive get out the vote push? We’re counting
on you. Please chip in and help us shatter the billionaire blockade and
turn out every last Mamdani voter on Tuesday!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email20251102nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9775%2E5885482%2EXMY3Ex ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email20251102nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9775%2E5885482%2EXMY3Ex ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email20251102nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9775%2E5885482%2EXMY3Ex ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email20251102nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9775%2E5885482%2EXMY3Ex ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33255?source=email20251102&t=1060&akid=9775%2E5885482%2EXMY3Ex ]Photo of Our Revolution organizers hitting the NY subways

It’s clear what is happening: billionaires, terrified of losing their grip
on politics and power, are throwing everything they have at this race to
try to stop Mamdani from winning. Floods of slick, racist, high-priced
attack ads are taking over the airwaves, designed to divide us.

As Mamdani himself put it: “The billionaires who rigged our economy and
tried to buy an election don’t give up easy.” He’s right. Which is why
it’s SO IMPORTANT we keep up the momentum in these final hours.

Our Revolution was built for this moment. We’ve powered countless calls,
knocked on doors, and elected working people to office across the country.
But our whole grassroots game plan – texting, phone banks, and a final get
out the vote push – rides on what we raise together THIS WEEKEND.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email20251102nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9775%2E5885482%2EXMY3Ex ]Will you make an urgent donation to help us reach our $20,000 goal before
midnight tomorrow, and remind the billionaires that elections are not for
sale?

The billionaires have the dark money. But we have each other – and the
energy to win if we act, right now, together.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

We are proud to support women across the country, in both red and blue states, but, as Election Day nears, we would like to draw your attention to Virginia.

**Virginia is the LAST southern state in which women still have access to full reproductive healthcare –** which means millions of women depend on this state for access to life-saving abortions or miscarriage management. We want to be very clear: **that could change after Tuesday’s elections.**

**Here’s why:** Pro-choice legislators in Virginia are working to enshrine reproductive rights in the state constitution to ensure that this right does not become dependent on which party is in control. They have already passed the amendment out of the State House once, but in order for it to make it to the ballot for voters to protect abortion access once and for all in 2026, it needs to pass a second time this upcoming legislative session.

GOP candidates running against our candidates have stated that they would work to block this from happening.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525018/580033004/-1671734817?refcode=EM_F_251103Tmrw_HBM_90DO_10_NG_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkYjU5MzIwLTFlYjgtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I1V-CUCzDhMS0K4_ynPIKaW5uyZUY7xzP1UgHnEcgac=)

**That means it’s essential that we help elect pro-choice _women_ THIS TUESDAY.** Many of our candidates’ opponents have either already voted against protecting abortion access (as well as birth control) or have made it clear that they plan to do so in the upcoming legislative term.

**Please join us in sending luck, strength, and gratitude to our candidates on the ballot this Tuesday, like Senator Ghazala Hashmi for Lieutenant Governor, Shannon Jones for Commonwealth Attorney, Elizabeth Guzmán, May Nivar, Stacey Carroll, Jessica Anderson, Rae Cousins, and Kimberly Pope Adams for the VA House of Delegates.**

| | We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, **making it easier for voters to participate in our elections**. Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail.Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. **Mail-in voting has been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic.** There's no good faith reason to get rid of it. **[Opponents of voting rights have proven they'll go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and make sure that they stay in power. clean_body: @JeffMerkley: Why does Trump want to ban Vote by Mail? Because it blocks Election Day interference: closing polling places, long lines, voter suppression. Vote by Mail is the best tool we have to put power where it belongs—in the hands of the people. I'll fight like hell to protect it.| | | | | This is the whole ball game, Team: = This is the whole reason behind President Donald Trump's massive anti-voting executive order. After every election in which he's been a candidate or in power, Trump has raged over the use of mail-in ballots in general and ballot deadlines in particular . He's tried to claim fraud for every single ballot counted after Election Day. It's worth noting that Trump himself has used mail-in ballots to vote , most recently in an election in his now-home state of Florida.This isn't about safety or security. It's a blatantly partisan exercise to suppress the vote and make it harder for you to have your voice heard in our elections. It's about their anti-democratic authoritarian desires and need for total control. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | | We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, making it easier for voters to participate in our elections. Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail.Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. Mail-in voting has been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic. There's no good faith reason to get rid of it. = | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. * * *
Friend, Civil rights groups just filed a **federal class-action lawsuit** exposing a secret, sprawling data operation within the Trump administration: a system that consolidates **Social Security numbers, medical records, biometric data, even children's case files** across multiple federal agencies. **All without public notice. All without legal authority.** And now? That data is being handed to election officials across the country to **purge voter rolls and launch criminal investigations** under the false flag of “election integrity.” Lawsuits now allege the administration secretly pooled data from the IRS, HHS, SSA, DHS, DOJ, and Department of Labor, **without public consent and in violation of federal law.** **Democratic Secretaries of State are our first and last line of defense against this dangerous overreach.** They’re the ones saying NO – to illegal data demands, to voter intimidation, to unconstitutional power grabs. But they cannot fight alone. **[Will you rush a donation of $3 or whatever you can to the DASS Legal Fund to help stop this voter surveillance scheme and protect election privacy nationwide?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525265/580033899/292117375?refcode=em-11.02.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2I1OTMyMC0xZWI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=my0CT04nV7Ww6JoCZvBkNJR3PNTfdNX32uqfU2gSPbU=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525266/580033900/292117375?refcode=em-11.02.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2I1OTMyMC0xZWI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=my0CT04nV7Ww6JoCZvBkNJR3PNTfdNX32uqfU2gSPbU=)**

Governor Tina Kotek is here, listening, and doing everything she can to protect the people of Oregon. |
#

name: John Fetterman
subject: One Year Out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Derek, tomorrow marks one year out from the 2026 midterm elections.
That means one year out from making Trump and his crew pay for running roughshod over our health care system.
That means one year out from kicking extremist Republicans out of office for selling out the people who elected them in exchange for tax cuts for the ultrawealthy.
That means one year out from electing Democrats up and down the ballot who actually give a sh*t about working people.
**These past few months have made clear as day what goes wrong when Trump and his crew hold the House, the Senate, and the White House. That all starts to change next year.**
**[I’m setting a $50,000 goal to hit by midnight to start these next 365 days on the strongest foot possible. Will you pitch in $5, $25, or whatever you can afford right now to help me hit this goal and put some MAJOR numbers on the board?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52246?t=1&akid=10401%2E434096%2EAhuvxw)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52247?t=2&akid=10401%2E434096%2EAhuvxw)

---
Peter,

As this month comes to a close, I want to take a moment just to say _thank you._

Despite everything, this team stepped up and ensured this campaign didn't fall short of our critical October fundraising goal. That's an incredible feat!

But it’s not just about hitting our goal—we're now officially almost one year out from the 2026 elections, and how we step up every day will be the difference between taking back the House or allowing the GOP to continue to rule with their harmful agenda.

After your support this past month, I know a blue 2026 is truly possible, and I'm excited to see how we achieve it, together.

I know things are tough right now, and the road ahead isn't going to be easy, **but I'm beyond grateful to have this grassroots team fighting by my side through it all.**

Thank you for being part of this work,

Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525779/580035656/1491818712?refcode=em25_251102_eomty_enask_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251102_eomty_enask_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=2b04f5f1-1fb8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjA0ZjVmMS0xZmI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mlTJiivYNkn-J8YsOs8QMZmCbqSxYO-keCGHW0JXd-0=)

body:
Will you pitch in to help us win the biggest election of 2025? |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525902/580036125/-343666687?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzYwNmY1My0yMmI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H8siCrwgdhl4JFsSxZt60hs9fWy9F-Yd_Jt2CAoAJ4I=&emci=38c88d94-4cb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c7606f53-22b8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=28008880)
---
Peter, I’m fired up by the movement we’re building here in Wake County, and I’m excited to share more about our campaign for District Attorney. [**But first, will you make a contribution today to keep us running strong?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525903/580036126/1409485659?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzYwNmY1My0yMmI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H8siCrwgdhl4JFsSxZt60hs9fWy9F-Yd_Jt2CAoAJ4I=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525904/580036127/1409485659?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzYwNmY1My0yMmI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H8siCrwgdhl4JFsSxZt60hs9fWy9F-Yd_Jt2CAoAJ4I=)
---
* * *
**We officially kicked off!**
Just a few weeks ago, we had **over 150 friends and supporters** join us in Raleigh to kick off our campaign for Wake County District Attorney. The crowd was energetic, and it meant the world to have so many people cheering me on from Day One.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525905/580036128/1409485659?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzYwNmY1My0yMmI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H8siCrwgdhl4JFsSxZt60hs9fWy9F-Yd_Jt2CAoAJ4I=)
Since then, we’ve been talking about the real challenges our community faces.
Right now, Wake County’s District Attorney’s office has less than half the number of prosecutors compared to Mecklenburg County — even as our population keeps growing. That means victims are waiting years for justice, and our prosecutors are stretched too thin to keep up.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525906/580036129/1409485659?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzYwNmY1My0yMmI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H8siCrwgdhl4JFsSxZt60hs9fWy9F-Yd_Jt2CAoAJ4I=)
**As your next District Attorney, I’ll fight to double the size of our DA’s office, support law enforcement, and make sure justice is delivered fairly and efficiently — because everyone in Wake County deserves to feel safe and protected.**
* * *
**Standing with Governor Roy Cooper**
We also had the honor of welcoming Governor Roy Cooper to our home in Cary this month. His leadership and integrity continue to inspire me, and our shared message was clear: **Democrats up and down the ballot must work together to move North Carolina forward.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525907/580036130/1409485659?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzYwNmY1My0yMmI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H8siCrwgdhl4JFsSxZt60hs9fWy9F-Yd_Jt2CAoAJ4I=)
* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
My team and I have been connecting with members of the community; knocking on doors, making phone calls, and getting out the vote for some key local officials on the ballot this week.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525908/580036131/1409485659?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzYwNmY1My0yMmI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H8siCrwgdhl4JFsSxZt60hs9fWy9F-Yd_Jt2CAoAJ4I=)
And perhaps most fun of all, my wife Caroline and our kids carved some pumpkins ahead of Halloween. Nothing brings the community together more than a fun holiday, and our kids had a blast trick-or-treating this year.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525909/580036132/1409485659?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzYwNmY1My0yMmI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H8siCrwgdhl4JFsSxZt60hs9fWy9F-Yd_Jt2CAoAJ4I=)
* * *
**What’s Next**
**Change starts with us — and every person makes a real difference, including you,****Peter.**
I’m proud of the momentum we’re building, but we still have a long road ahead. As we build up this campaign, here are some steps you can take to support our work:
✅ **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525910/580036133/1409485659?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzYwNmY1My0yMmI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H8siCrwgdhl4JFsSxZt60hs9fWy9F-Yd_Jt2CAoAJ4I=)**

✅ **[Put up a lawn sign in your community](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525912/580036135/-1189704721?contactdata=bduAV0hCtusay0x9DVeoqbC7Lew/T5uuuVdebP5a7LcZ7nFJIuWVbv280H+WyShF9UhNCC6p1fYnBSj0TCy4QDV+Ss4tE5qFSjQh7KLkTOGbuZcSroaGKGBDV6oDhN8L&refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzYwNmY1My0yMmI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H8siCrwgdhl4JFsSxZt60hs9fWy9F-Yd_Jt2CAoAJ4I=&emci=38c88d94-4cb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c7606f53-22b8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=28008880)**
✅ **[Knock doors& spread the word](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525913/580036136/963080434?contactdata=bduAV0hCtusay0x9DVeoqbC7Lew/T5uuuVdebP5a7LcZ7nFJIuWVbv280H+WyShF9UhNCC6p1fYnBSj0TCy4QDV+Ss4tE5qFSjQh7KLkTOGbuZcSroaGKGBDV6oDhN8L&refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzYwNmY1My0yMmI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H8siCrwgdhl4JFsSxZt60hs9fWy9F-Yd_Jt2CAoAJ4I=&emci=38c88d94-4cb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c7606f53-22b8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=28008880)**

clean_body: Will you pitch in to help us win the biggest election of 2025? | Peter, I’m fired up by the movement we’re building here in Wake County, and I’m excited to share more about our campaign for District Attorney. = | = We officially kicked off! Just a few weeks ago, we had over 150 friends and supporters join us in Raleigh to kick off our campaign for Wake County District Attorney. The crowd was energetic, and it meant the world to have so many people cheering me on from Day One. = Since then, we’ve been talking about the real challenges our community faces. Right now, Wake County’s District Attorney’s office has less than half the number of prosecutors compared to Mecklenburg County — even as our population keeps growing. That means victims are waiting years for justice, and our prosecutors are stretched too thin to keep up. = As your next District Attorney, I’ll fight to double the size of our DA’s office, support law enforcement, and make sure justice is delivered fairly and efficiently — because everyone in Wake County deserves to feel safe and protected. Standing with Governor Roy Cooper We also had the honor of welcoming Governor Roy Cooper to our home in Cary this month. His leadership and integrity continue to inspire me, and our shared message was clear: Democrats up and down the ballot must work together to move North Carolina forward. = On the Campaign Trail My team and I have been connecting with members of the community; knocking on doors, making phone calls, and getting out the vote for some key local officials on the ballot this week. = And perhaps most fun of all, my wife Caroline and our kids carved some pumpkins ahead of Halloween. Nothing brings the community together more than a fun holiday, and our kids had a blast trick-or-treating this year. = What’s Next Change starts with us — and every person makes a real difference, including you,Peter. I’m proud of the momentum we’re building, but we still have a long road ahead. As we build up this campaign, here are some steps you can take to support our work: ✅ = ✅ ✅ ✅ No matter how you choose to get involved, I can’t tell you how grateful I am for your support. Let’s do this! Wiley Nickel P.S. Don’t forget to vote on Tuesday, November 4th from 6:30 a.m. to 7:30 p.m. Wake County has amazing municipal candidates that need your support! For more information including where to find your polling location, click . Wiley for Wake PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley for Wake

name: Elizabeth Guzman
subject: GOTV is here — let’s make history!

body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6JT2e6-gM7kf7A7fsl5ASH2RA92qbKOTEDKGFpGVq23nfA-2wJb02TuS5Nmy8WOeAdY0CxL1jLYAF1bqnORbzg4pgxEpf5wO_6ng4QyMfe0q-2pBw9t2W5DGB6KmSHHnWYBrQYsB92OPm66t9Ri2rrHrTB5HGm41ixg448FVTthlAoFxL377bHz306QC5LbIomVk0od5eVWFhrZswUG2O-nFRthxBjCfOKQgaG51YnCIsPyAnDuUFn9M2uLtlHeBKw/4l9/4XBx6rj5QlKHSeRlJspEuQ/h0/h001.mIWkwpaLthKuoW4P2sz9XmCNOnNUfRRiPUIvmwkZuPY) Friend — We’ve reached the moment we’ve been fighting for — the **final countdown to Election Day!** Every door knocked, every call made, every single dollar donated has been building to this. **_And now, our final Get Out the Vote push is here — and it’s all on the line._** Recently, I had the privilege to canvass with**Sister District, SEIU, CCAN Action Fund, Jews United for Justice, and Delegate Kathy Tran** — an incredible coalition of brilliant organizers, neighbors, and friends who share one mission: _to fight for a fairer, more just Virginia._ We had an incredible time knocking on doors and talking to voters. But let me be clear. Our opponent’s dark-money backers are spending big in these last days, but we’ve got something they’ll never have: **you** — **a grassroots movement of people who believe in progress, equality, and a Virginia where everyone has a fair shot.** [**Can you chip in before midnight to fuel our final GOTV push?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviOe6wF9anNgAGC4E18pFY-ZyD_99kKkd4lFgnkjH5LCHCWsCqQEhYOvM12n1D37LXjAm7DZQ_ShU08eozyttFdTIp2H1Jy_pMwFJm4YwujTR0LTAKjuPRlGf8kz-ZmhUW4QeCEWeRbPzvlZQSS4ccan9ynRrdoWFzkulVbj7Jz1zzaq83S1-t7bHNPRVpTSsoLRpufkWgtzLuHpxPKMKUmGe4_bPW67Kax3bfa6pZ7bdo3jtg-gFFWDPSZaZbTUDCA/4l9/4XBx6rj5QlKHSeRlJspEuQ/h1/h001.h1IR3qyTYFKXTfFhTsej1jS8VZvbLxnxqBGw85aZ5gQ) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3d-KWm5rOXMU9obrmb7z5EG0Nsmkm77EXnqlHCQW7oZQTJ_KYrQlsIxfmDq__lHogZHn3OnOUbDN8Tv9Sc53FzwLYHvYYiNPLmzolM5Ilp2zp0Cdto3bvzDS3egKGAwaesD1R3OcL24hjjT7Y7GQK-I7OtWI0zZ73SGKTkmrzRZieCMsP8jNZm6bznfJDP9vv4mqyK3Y5Pq4QgWr3ap2YXLh1El6pKQ2XM3pKpC5CH5n1OGDOE5Rg89CMHA2soMtbuFCqCU5_rI7EtlX0QKli6fdPyXxWTPQnF0OZFQ9Y2D9kA7Boc5Vw6VlTZ4o81fh-4gEuS_8eLlFJyWZfOe1woj4EtEIQb8IbxPEBlxzvwxLk5IE_Rs0kfFVxjUrphC2F/4l9/4XBx6rj5QlKHSeRlJspEuQ/h6/h001.5AGzt7cjKht2n8WMTg5fWyN1ca2devGtt60HUA3MOvI) [Other Amount](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqaDw67nRgWZBbP1mwHT2H1CWckpgvY_hxFGCbry0P7XTOBdwmMsBBk18TNj-b3qHvm_0ZkNjMBOoyahsBvIoWSlWu_9fuUxoCTBKdF11FlbhtiWJF6o7mNsety3VYwwVqsySKpAXBzQy8db2WG5ygsbPk5UpWOqOZO7NlDjqzjpQ82UTAU5daFhTOe_QnlvN4s3yw6-Gpz1rHkGPDT-NbnntydlIuUh3KBXrHkIYemroKkIK3QvHLRnerFnGuF9uLd5byNB1u3TbOebyEC3RqlXqCO0MljXubIICxaZtuf3MH7ebk-LkMMTfSWX6hyF_pQ/4l9/4XBx6rj5QlKHSeRlJspEuQ/h7/h001.xA52sghjx2czUEte4eG4-PCS3hyybwy9gW9qwb2AyVw) **** I’m not your typical politician — I’m a social worker, a mom, and a fighter who knows what it’s like to struggle and still show up for your community. I’ve spent my life delivering for working families, protecting reproductive freedom, and making sure no one gets left behind. That’s who I’m fighting for. But to cross the finish line, we need to give it everything we’ve got — right now. [**The energy is on our side. Let’s keep it up, keep the phones buzzing, the doors knocking, and the donations coming in. clean_body: | | | Friend — We’ve reached the moment we’ve been fighting for — the final countdown to Election Day! Every door knocked, every call made, every single dollar donated has been building to this. And now, our final Get Out the Vote push is here — and it’s all on the line. Recently, I had the privilege to canvass withSister District, SEIU, CCAN Action Fund, Jews United for Justice, and Delegate Kathy Tran — an incredible coalition of brilliant organizers, neighbors, and friends who share one mission: to fight for a fairer, more just Virginia. We had an incredible time knocking on doors and talking to voters. But let me be clear. Our opponent’s dark-money backers are spending big in these last days, but we’ve got something they’ll never have: you — a grassroots movement of people who believe in progress, equality, and a Virginia where everyone has a fair shot. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** I’m not your typical politician — I’m a social worker, a mom, and a fighter who knows what it’s like to struggle and still show up for your community. I’ve spent my life delivering for working families, protecting reproductive freedom, and making sure no one gets left behind. That’s who I’m fighting for. But to cross the finish line, we need to give it everything we’ve got — right now. This is the week that decides everything. The difference between winning and losing will come down to how hard we fight in these final days. Thanks for your support. Let’s make history together. — Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: My Faith Votes
subject: The Virginia governor’s race is razor-thin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by My Faith Votes
body:
112,000 letters to low-propensity Christian voters
| | | | |
---
|
---
Fellow Patriot,
The Virginia governor’s race is razor-thin, with RealClearPolitics showing just a **3% difference** between the candidates in the latest poll. That margin could be as high as **95,700 votes** or as low as **82,800**. The difference between godly leadership and policies that ignore biblical values.

With **5.81 million registered voters** in Virginia, turnout on **November 4** could range from **2.76 to 3.19 million** , depending on whether voters show up like they did in **2017 (47.6%)** or **2021 (54.9%)**. Will they be informed? Will they be guided by faith?

My Faith Votes is focused on reaching **low-propensity Christian voters**. Those who are already registered, but don’t vote consistently, especially in off-year elections like this one. Many simply need a reminder, a reason, and a resource to act. That’s where we come in.

Thanks to our army of Action Partners, we’re already sending over **112,000 letters** to low-propensity Christian voters in Virginia and more are being written every day.

_But we must do more._

**Text messaging has been proven to boost turnout.** We want to follow up with those receiving letters and reach even more Christian voters across Virginia with a simple, powerful message and a link to our **Candidate Fact Sheet.**
[**Every dollar you give helps us reach more believers with truth and clarity.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0a7d4e5ecb9744079dfab4f00ccef978&_e=W0aUTyhAKqyDBYBf_IuXQb5CZ7i_GuyMNKY9Uk3SxO4A6DkvyKLiVSaw79DSOCnarakvbmmlrvH2c3c9Ae1SytObcsv0au1LA34-19lCV0JuchrretOsmi9WAq8r_LsAK5RB8fYPDg6pED4Xa9UmlQsDYT4VzG7_3GYJAHKLtmQsXbwR0A6cGW4PTU8KlyQpjYm714hQE3hhmYPc1rJp_MXcMzVFKGF4NrraHUav1GQhz_s-HmRzzoetYZuaS2KexmEKQhFivsEq-Z0pAJBEYov9d88e8X3l6gURPKESkibNW_li70MsLByKdCMZLNF2JlbPN3HlsNekrMVynCLCf4TZqAnvIn_DJtCg3Sv28E3d1wOAsx3fECHLEA4WCurjeGmXsrilsMYpNoPR73tRFf4xXMOqJpvL3sZcQsDWeuz6z-77_uXuxOgqf0va6FrOo1HnJJQ7xum7qMj3ah-h1MHpWUirT1gAJca306OQnhsN2QpWpX3-9yB7mYrAyWRr10xknpbhLSuQsE2heqMor5ZRAd4PcqAooVBp6J_OGAlbiQC1R2u3B6wGrZYMKVpt8hKj2Gnpv6QyxLk2bXY8zjSJQY_8YW91UGywq9WE1pOphbk4SshysTEtmDXXlEzlWPAKDhNWWXPsnL0r1n3gpw%3D%3D)

name: Mikie Sherrill HQ
subject: We made a tough decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Those polls showing a close race are real, and we’re responding.
We’ll get right to the point.
A recent Emerson poll found this race tied — with tons of undecided voters. It’s not an outlier. We’ve lost count of how many polls have come out in recent weeks showing this race functionally tied.
In a race this close, the last thing we can afford is for people who support Mikie Sherrill to not show up to the polls, or leave their mail-in ballot sitting on their kitchen table.
**We just made a decision to MASSIVELY expand our GOTV program between now and Nov. 4 — counting on money that we don’t yet have, because we’re counting on this grassroots team to come in big for us down the stretch.**
[**We know it’s asking a lot, but we need all the help we can get in the final days of this race. Can we count on you to split $5 between our team and Sarah McBride to help us fund the biggest GOTV operation in New Jersey history?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251102-1.K5Xfw7&refcode=em20251102-2460&amount=5&t=1&akid=2460%2E21716%2EfahXiN)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251102-1.K5Xfw7&amount=5&refcode=em20251102-2460&t=20&akid=2460%2E21716%2EfahXiN)**
Thank you,
Mikie Sherrill HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: How we help them
subject: Federal employees missed their 2nd paycheck
body:
Help provide groceries for federal workers and their families
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WHPqBVVpDhxghaB1z7gN1MjSZiPaTn4TwOxexdv7T6sxdeXs1vjr0PRaF3LxsNV6tJgkXCiTTxwk9mPAuvp6_w06dSLpH5qWqFq7J2KQB4OrvOKnlJdK4oxeMUZo8chm20RqNE0MILHO0tiw67eGnOZxG_Er9vkwZsBw7MyWkn6Nei9VdQm5ooMekrWG5XeMUX3JjggGZ_SWiKxbyz_Igg==&c=Ysc6SJXG1CL0BmODqFKTB6M_V4tkPiw6RhjBZFL8oQkVKbbX_nnSPg==&ch=13hOG5V4gLNuOJRuMSCjKmHbayqzftsr2B_xkFLCcP27VOeskGEV0Q==)
---
|
Peter,
Since Congress shut down on September 30, federal workers have either been off the job or working without pay. On October 24, they missed their second paycheck.
Instead of negotiating an end to the shutdown, this administration has threatened mass firings, even pledging to renege on a law President Trump signed to guarantee backpay to workers after a shutdown. No political victory should come through punishing the workers who keep Social Security working, who make sure our water is safe to drink, and who take care of our veterans. As a former federal employee myself, I know that public service is a badge of honor.
The people who are working at Social Security offices, still making sure seniors' checks go out on time, won't get their own check this week. Their bills didn't stop. The rent is still due, and they still have families who need to eat. We need solidarity, not charity.
[Our friends at The Labor Force are distributing grocery cards to federal workers during this shutdown. Can you split a contribution between our campaign and Labor Force help to buy a load of groceries for these workers?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WHPqBVVpDhxghaB1z7gN1MjSZiPaTn4TwOxexdv7T6sxdeXs1vjr0PRaF3LxsNV6tJgkXCiTTxwk9mPAuvp6_w06dSLpH5qWqFq7J2KQB4OrvOKnlJdK4oxeMUZo8chm20RqNE0MILHO0tiw67eGnOZxG_Er9vkwZsBw7MyWkn6Nei9VdQm5ooMekrWG5XeMEm--Jyp_oOccFebHVt61aw==&c=Ysc6SJXG1CL0BmODqFKTB6M_V4tkPiw6RhjBZFL8oQkVKbbX_nnSPg==&ch=13hOG5V4gLNuOJRuMSCjKmHbayqzftsr2B_xkFLCcP27VOeskGEV0Q==)

clean_body: Help provide groceries for federal workers and their families | | | | | == | Peter, Since Congress shut down on September 30, federal workers have either been off the job or working without pay. On October 24, they missed their second paycheck. Instead of negotiating an end to the shutdown, this administration has threatened mass firings, even pledging to renege on a law President Trump signed to guarantee backpay to workers after a shutdown. No political victory should come through punishing the workers who keep Social Security working, who make sure our water is safe to drink, and who take care of our veterans. As a former federal employee myself, I know that public service is a badge of honor. The people who are working at Social Security offices, still making sure seniors' checks go out on time, won't get their own check this week. Their bills didn't stop. The rent is still due, and they still have families who need to eat. We need solidarity, not charity. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split between Trisha Calvarese and The Labor Force: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | Federal employees are not bargaining chips. They are veterans, caregivers, law enforcement officers, and neighbors who serve their country and fellow Americans every day. They deserve stability and respect, not pink slips and political games. == In solidarity, Trisha Calvarese & Labor Force | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | | | | | | |

As Election Day comes closer and closer, I want to share with you everything you need to know about my opponent

As Election Day comes closer and closer, I want to share with you everything you need to know about my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, and his plans for our state if we let him win this race.

And after reading this email, if you agree that my opponent is the wrong person to be leading New Jersey, I hope you’ll **_[split whatever you can between our team and Maggie Hassan to help me win this upcoming election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525977/580036459/1314955220?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.02_Mikie-Sherrill-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTIxNjU5My0yM2I4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TrZXZbudU4QZ7Rjr3MRfOmtEoBJZl8AHHaB874k1NKc=)_** | | [ CHIP IN $10 >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525978/580036460/1314955220?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.02_Mikie-Sherrill-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTIxNjU5My0yM2I4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TrZXZbudU4QZ7Rjr3MRfOmtEoBJZl8AHHaB874k1NKc=)

**On abortion rights:** Jack Ciattarelli supports a statewide abortion ban and wants to defund Planned Parenthood healthcare centers in New Jersey, which would lead to patients losing access to not only abortion care, but also cancer and STI screenings, routine gynecological exams, and more.

**On affordability:** My opponent proudly stood alongside Trump as Washington Republicans cut Medicaid, set Medicare on track for disaster, took away food assistance, and gave billionaires a massive tax break in their price hike bill. Not only did he urge Republican Members of Congress to vote for Trump’s agenda — _he’s promising to implement it at the state level here in New Jersey, too._

**On Trump:** Ciattarelli got Trump’s endorsement in this race after shamelessly begging for it. He praises the disastrous policies Trump is implementing in Washington and promises, and even said this: “When I’m governor, we’re gonna do the same in New Jersey.”

It’s abundantly clear — **Jack Ciattarelli is out of touch with New Jersey, and we cannot let him become the next governor of our state.**

But with far-right super PACs lining the pockets of his campaign, I’m relying on my grassroots supporters now more than ever to help us out in the final stretch of this campaign.

**_[If you’re with me, please split whatever you can between NJ Victory 25 and Maggie Hassan to help us fight back against Jack Ciattarelli and his far-right backers and win this election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118525979/580036461/1314955220?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.02_Mikie-Sherrill-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTIxNjU5My0yM2I4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TrZXZbudU4QZ7Rjr3MRfOmtEoBJZl8AHHaB874k1NKc=)_**

name: Breaking:
subject: In 48 hours MAGA will attempt a second January 6th Coup
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
On November 4th, 2025, less than 48 hours from now, MAGA will try to seize the Pennsylvania State Supreme Court and all but guarantee a Trump victory in 2028 when he seeks a third term.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K-6qoijT4o5GQr1oZUqL6XWjqqOparfVnzdmueYZXrisQXcMECe1NitrA5xK2dJuqSPcnPg4wVmjYg3KtNmWLQBM2PzyFMrGxAxCAUcXWvwjkrdfhWOhhIkml7mwF8n2z26IRAoaFziEDc2XXmVrBk7e_F9Os2SkQUZumTdAwBFWbOoYvciaLXtxUGjH-r2yEjU0z1onqsqo-iV8ss8K5rOwtf_qW84wZjw6ePMq-gQ=&c=5VaF-lUx9qTzrOM5krpxnKNuYIMANSTFaXUzIsujKrQYWJzHR5tiSA==&ch=BAnRsr_Soxhgelir6Tdnn-xNRGr5fzLMRRpQ3YiI30bhtKCY_5G3Zg==)
---
| Peter,
On January 6th, 2021, MAGA attempted a hostile takeover of the American government and was unsuccessful.
It was unsuccessful because they were too loud, too bold, and too many people were watching. They learned their lesson and determined that the next January 6th would need to be quiet, covert, and carried out under our noses within existing political systems.
Now they are ready to give it another go.
On November 4th, 2025, less than 48 hours from now, MAGA will attempt a 2nd January 6th coup. They will attempt to seize the Pennsylvania State Supreme Court all but guaranteeing a Trump victory in 2028 when he seeks a third term. Here's how it going down:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K-6qoijT4o5GQr1oZUqL6XWjqqOparfVnzdmueYZXrisQXcMECe1NitrA5xK2dJuqSPcnPg4wVmjYg3KtNmWLQBM2PzyFMrGxAxCAUcXWvwjkrdfhWOhhIkml7mwF8n2z26IRAoaFziEDc2XXmVrBk7e_F9Os2SkQUZumTdAwBFWbOoYvciaLXtxUGjH-r2yEjU0z1onqsqo-iV8ss8K5vj4LNwP3n3dkeAlanUZpJg=&c=5VaF-lUx9qTzrOM5krpxnKNuYIMANSTFaXUzIsujKrQYWJzHR5tiSA==&ch=BAnRsr_Soxhgelir6Tdnn-xNRGr5fzLMRRpQ3YiI30bhtKCY_5G3Zg==)
---
| | | | The Democratic blue wall strategy for winning Presidential elections requires winning PA. Every recent election where we've lost PA we've lost the presidency.
MAGA control of the PA Supreme Court gives them the final call on declaring winners and losers in elections held in PA -- if we lose this court on Tuesday, Democrats never win PA and its 19 electoral college votes again.
Rather than masked men roaming the halls of Congress with zip ties, MAGA's coup in Pennsylvania has been defined by millions of dollars pumped into disinformation efforts tricking Democratic voters into thinking that voting no (the GOP ballot option) will protect abortion.
GOP turnout is surging and their disinformation effort is working, thousands of Democratic voters who have already turned in mail ballots are reporting that they fell for it - they were duped by MAGA's covert disinformation operations.
Defend our Courts just placed a $500k cable and digital ad to counteract MAGA's deception but it was nearly everything left in our warchest. We have two days to replenish our funds and turnout every vote or they will take this court.
Tomorrow morning, funds raised over the past few days will hit our account from ActBlue. [We need a tidal wave of donations tonight to keep us hammering voters to turn out all the way up to the close of polls. Please rush $55, the average cost per vote (CPV) in this election, or whatever you can spare, to ensure that come Monday AM we have the budget to keep fighting until the bitter end.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K-6qoijT4o5GQr1oZUqL6XWjqqOparfVnzdmueYZXrisQXcMECe1NitrA5xK2dJuqSPcnPg4wVmjYg3KtNmWLQBM2PzyFMrGxAxCAUcXWvwjkrdfhWOhhIkml7mwF8n2z26IRAoaFziEDc2XXmVrBk7e_F9Os2SkQUZumTdAwBFWbOoYvciaLXtxUGjH-r2yEjU0z1onqsqo-iV8ss8K5rw-3jBcEWdIOkmIlFoavZQ=&c=5VaF-lUx9qTzrOM5krpxnKNuYIMANSTFaXUzIsujKrQYWJzHR5tiSA==&ch=BAnRsr_Soxhgelir6Tdnn-xNRGr5fzLMRRpQ3YiI30bhtKCY_5G3Zg==)

Peter,

My name is Winsome Earle-Sears, and if you don't mind, I'd like to tell you a little about myself. **I 'm not your typical politician, and I never will be. _This is my story._**

In 2021, I won the General Election for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia by less than 60,000 votes. In doing so, I became the first black woman to hold this office--but that's not why I ran. I ran to effect real change and instill common-sense conservative leadership. That's exactly what we have done and will continue to do.
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e84ce24198454a0393a4562a17fc3408&_e=LQObQadqY-se0NNO713fgsFHByDKI9VDmHPj0jNXYZcPBt9lJAGdt4RBc34TskQ3Ieo42weVQ0Mtb2wsdqahJlBjvgXqu7tv2mZrSYhxUBV0qgnk-J0zvAwSU02GJBucfz-m80GZVHPtkuehbYK5mY4E0gzLa2GAUUXBOPx4Xbk6yzd8hIPEMJKg-Bg860u486VML8NCtvTJJfn91iv5qDduNvwcVdCU3dRjGrO93I5DpCfUOiBSI8Ww7xo-_72l-weZndLlemeumV0EearfxTrO-9bxp0vapCck1HY60YvpdCln7g55yqDM6NJD3DqaYxL3vSuu1LNN89zMtBOP3nOWIhHVBzbZ7udD9rVnSTVXNbtmca3mn_Jn3AAPtipQI29r96BNSUw2OYOiWkkV7hOPsMTfOOLaVGPd6mlT7_dglTwFKl1FMthsv_scRu1GrhVDKyNJMAHaF8Ucj471riJciXOMXCcihrNDTq5cWjySgxWNZbmlrkD9yYjd1POVB7_yXNLq5Y2KAQd_D2AMWPJOmpprPNk8es8lsHvD6sJwZq4vSyOy7bC-oW7UQfvvIxoT0E6avGcajqv9pJfYCBxXKVLwPfuf33wNa2B1y6LnoohpSjrQPAH0RpiEEUb1exqwVHlDk1Bbkyl0LvDk22GzTmzU2BqZ0fSMp1ELaM_opRqvPEEnTgMSkJoRsRveYgvFhkMOxcYGU4147idbuKlNewlClFd1xCszgZbFJ61DRJCpV0f4_I2UXV-rTmvS6SRo35v0Rb4Jjm_OkXAKGZKUYpAdTvZ_XmKJET98YzpZiAXrcjTsUqnvxX_c5_lP6yc0mpkiq13LMcenZhCrSg%3D%3D)

Before becoming the 2nd in command in Virginia, I beat a 20-year incumbent in 2001 to become the first Republican to win a seat in a majority black district in the Virginia House of Delegates since 1865. In the General Assembly, I focused on getting results for my constituents.

This is my story.| | | | Peter, My name is Winsome Earle-Sears, and if you don't mind, I'd like to tell you a little about myself. I 'm not your typical politician, and I never will be. This is my story. In 2021, I won the General Election for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia by less than 60,000 votes. In doing so, I became the first black woman to hold this office--but that's not why I ran. I ran to effect real change and instill common-sense conservative leadership. That's exactly what we have done and will continue to do. Before becoming the 2nd in command in Virginia, I beat a 20-year incumbent in 2001 to become the first Republican to win a seat in a majority black district in the Virginia House of Delegates since 1865. In the General Assembly, I focused on getting results for my constituents. Prior to my career in politics, I had the distinct honor of serving as an electrician in the United States Marine Corps. It was here that I learned to be a leader--to improvise, adapt, and overcome. Looking back, my time in the Marines had a significant impact on who I am today, and for that, I'm ever grateful. Looking even further back, when I was just 6 years old, my family and I came to the United States from Jamaica. We arrived in a new land with no money and different accents, but we made it work and got through the struggles - only in America is something like this even possible. Of course, none of this would have been possible without my husband, Terence, and my amazing daughters. Throughout all of this, they have been my rock, and I owe them everything - they have kept me grounded, confident, and optimistic for the future. As you can see, I've lived a full life. There have been highs, lows, and everything in between, but I don't regret a single thing. I maintain, without a shadow of a doubt, that my story is only possible in America. I am the second most powerful person in the former capital of the Confederacy, and I am a black female. I am the epitome of the boundless opportunity and freedom that can only be found in America.But Peter, my story is far from over. I'm running for Governor not only to break records but also to continue spreading my conservative message - to show the world that a black, female, immigrant - and anyone else for that matter - can go from absolutely nothing to the highest levels of American politics. Now, the support I have received for my campaign thus far has been amazing, but the reality is that if we 're going to have a shot at winning this thing, then we must be well-funded. Thank you for your time, and may God Bless the United States of America, Winsome Earle-Sears (R-VA)| * Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk) [ **Look, it’s with a heavy heart that we email you today... **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69763?t=3&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk) [**WE TOLD YOU:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69763?t=4&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk) 64 million Americans rely on Social Security — especially Seniors.

[**WE TOLD YOU:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69763?t=5&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk) Donald Trump is making good on his promise to make billions of dollars in cuts to our Social Security benefits to support his MAGA agenda. [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69763?t=6&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk) [**WE TOLD YOU:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69763?t=7&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk) The only way to PROTECT Social Security once and for all is to DEMAND Congress take action to SAVE IT!!!!

But, the deadline to sign our petition to SAVE Social Security came and went, [**_and we never saw your signature._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69763?t=8&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk) [ **LAST CHANCE FOR YOU: Sign onto our petition before midnight to DEMAND Congress protect Social Security from Trump’s cuts >>** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69763?t=9&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk) | [SIGN ON NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69763?t=10&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk)
---
This issue is too important to ignore, so we’re reactivating our petition temporarily — until 11:59 PM to ensure that every single Democrat in your area has a chance to sign!

Please, we CANNOT let Trump and his Republicans dismantle Social Security any further.

Every second that we ignore this issue, millions of Americans are at risk.
[ **So please, don’t miss the opportunity to sign our petition and DEMAND Congress protect Social Security from Trump’s cuts >>** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69763?t=11&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk)
[SIGN ON NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69763?t=12&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk)
---
Awaiting your signature,

Fight for Reform
| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ _Click here to get fewer emails._](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=13&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk) | [_Click here to unsubscribe._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=14&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk)

|

If you'd like to unsubscribe, **[click here.](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022/?t=16&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk)**
Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court's 2010 _Citizens United v. FEC_ decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections.
| | [DONATE TO FIGHT FOR REFORM NOW →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=17&refcode2=23569_4449941_DaDYgk&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk)
---
Your support is critical to helping us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.
With your support we can harness the power of our grassroots supporters to influence decision makers and put control back in the hands of the people.
| | [DONATE TO FIGHT FOR REFORM NOW →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=18&refcode2=23569_4449941_DaDYgk&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk)
---
We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to unsubscribe, **[click here.](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022/?t=19&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk)**
If you'd like to donate to support our efforts, please **[click here:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=20&refcode2=23569_4449941_DaDYgk&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk)**
| | [DONATE TO FIGHT FOR REFORM NOW →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=21&refcode2=23569_4449941_DaDYgk&akid=23569%2E4449941%2EDaDYgk)
---
| [LIKE US ON FACEBOOK →](https://www.facebook.com/FightForReform)
---
| [FOLLOW US ON TWITTER →](https://twitter.com/For_Reform)
---
From the entire Fight For Reform team, thanks for your support!

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Will you donate to support the California Association of Food Banks today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40349%2E3422442%2Em88jzc)
Peter,
In the midst of a shutdown, the Trump administration is refusing to fund SNAP—leaving millions of Americans worrying about their next meal.
More than 5.5 million Californians rely on SNAP benefits—what we know as CalFresh—to put food on the table for themselves and their families. Without that assistance, which Trump is withholding in November, food pantries are expecting a serious uptick of people in need of a meal.
Here’s the good news: a court on Friday ordered the Trump Administration to at least partially fund this month’s food assistance, but the program could still be billions of dollars short—and Trump could still challenge the ruling.
So today, we’re asking this movement to come together to help Californians who need support right now.
**[Will you make a donation of any amount to the California Association of Food Banks?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251102_1_ak.AWALCs&refcode=em20251102-40349&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40349%2E3422442%2Em88jzc)**
Every dollar helps keep food banks stocked — especially for kids and working families who can’t wait for Washington to get its act together.
Thank you for stepping up when it counts.
— Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251102-40349&amounts=&t=4&refcode2=40349_3422442_m88jzc&akid=40349%2E3422442%2Em88jzc)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40349&t=5&akid=40349%2E3422442%2Em88jzc)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40349)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40349&t=6&akid=40349%2E3422442%2Em88jzc)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597
clean_body: Peter, In the midst of a shutdown, the Trump administration is refusing to fund SNAP—leaving millions of Americans worrying about their next meal. More than 5.5 million Californians rely on SNAP benefits—what we know as CalFresh—to put food on the table for themselves and their families. Without that assistance, which Trump is withholding in November, food pantries are expecting a serious uptick of people in need of a meal. Here’s the good news: a court on Friday ordered the Trump Administration to at least partially fund this month’s food assistance, but the program could still be billions of dollars short—and Trump could still challenge the ruling. So today, we’re asking this movement to come together to help Californians who need support right now. Every dollar helps keep food banks stocked — especially for kids and working families who can’t wait for Washington to get its act together. Thank you for stepping up when it counts. — Team Katie Porter Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

subject: Responsibility, Faith, Courage

Fellow patriot —

You may already know me – some of you know me and my story well.

But I want to take this opportunity to reintroduce myself and **share some exciting news.**

**My name is Mark Lamb** — I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and the proud former Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona.

After much prayer and reflection with my family, I’ve made a huge decision: **I am officially running for Congress in Arizona’s 5th District!**

[ **JOIN MARK LAMB »** ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=acd7190a210c43e7a603ff5f82d77317&_e=LKrwHFUPBgihbN6iNvRiJvLeh1iO7GLDYNOvEOeuA0LX-woKt8UT734wdoge6G0jGmmzb0wKPbTLox8pc3IHk3dSXhkfpehkxLVALMOJqhuFst2yDAeuy-xuKJKIUuvSLEF6v5kzHRKN7QsHObZAihHEHVygC5mpY495ik1d5zFn1QKgAuL51v-laRPP60gEgFCXPyDsYmn1uOnaowtVib6jhpj6y--R1UR0H7F0yG-0wC5YqczW7yP_qytNwHRZ1Y3KeoKb6AZI8ilNqTnZm-G6RVSlt0-k6sxAaJbXLW-jjaAYC0g88jW-sAWAWrK7wz4lxiJEr5PmekR2c6V3KFOLEeou2YyfZq1yinF74-dmvH628fbfhK6Y8JnZwwjBLCZoTvv3EZrl8MTliZOnUZ_8LgjiVQ0TslOkLi-9WWP4nVBTEqgH9jUbzT62oqQdxW9YmXYntMcEjm8xJ0fELh9bo30ZfS7ofsVYXyD-PvRR0Q12xWiGPnHR5ZdIq2Xc6YbUb-I5urq3ctjwI2B6012aPEmWAkooKvwd1EIP53gYPXwRAXz-6WKotYpI1LT5o_-QyEGL2N0y-5IZ48t83pKhrgO2Ii0G0HAgRKM2-MRUNggzwdVmm5_Dw0OalFtPLhs1nCAs6nis4BgFGebw7qvNc47khJ9nACMmXOLfto8%3D)
This isn’t about ambition — _it’s about service._ I’ve seen what happens when leaders lack courage and conviction, and I refuse to sit by while feckless politicians and bureaucrats fail our nation’s families.

**I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right** — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now.

[**So I’m taking this fight, along with these principles, to Congress, and I want YOU, fellow patriot, to be part of our team from Day One that’s going to bring home a win.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=acd7190a210c43e7a603ff5f82d77317&_e=LKrwHFUPBgihbN6iNvRiJvLeh1iO7GLDYNOvEOeuA0LX-woKt8UT734wdoge6G0jGmmzb0wKPbTLox8pc3IHk3dSXhkfpehkxLVALMOJqhuFst2yDAeuy-xuKJKIUuvSLEF6v5kzHRKN7QsHObZAihHEHVygC5mpY495ik1d5zFn1QKgAuL51v-laRPP60gEgFCXPyDsYmn1uOnaowtVib6jhpj6y--R1UR0H7F0yG_0goBtOMWKhV2_mpaUZSfW0i2t-NIjM-WBZV4iMFFXS-AXNDpmKr0otJgQeKAMF0JQWqHKRAvnaOYxpmoJ9bE0uPtePalduO3todSyby6wQ000ZySWHXJB-O5aDgCFoQWBu3feDH1sVOQ0oBIflrd6p-fhJmC3sjH3xct_edqtBQ4BnfRoaFxncAMSpRtD0IXW9PQ0yPx7QhJEPssWaiicchfZL6BkQw2TLDzur74j4SNQcf9k0AlhwQeFT5RrrdvHIDbTsRPLaYWp3sEFU4oWEE_8rdorD72TL3PtL6WakwbHtzzIY97pON_2mV_br0zpCDrR9xCCqEN4nIFgrE8mhbhk6UI_GyG0fCeiIxb7Z2Fy2E9T1wJX1e2SDktzGtjKjmRX9IecapRc9EDjzVGXgQfEwgJKXfAmCpLxSB3TOcuAn-KrgUT6TbyEj_fyyOk%3D)

Before I go any further, I want to thank Congressman Andy Biggs for his years of service to AZ-5 and wish him well in his decision to step down from this seat and run for Governor of Arizona.

Andy has always fought hard for conservative values, **and you can trust that I will do the same.**

**You know me, and you know my record.** As Sheriff, I spent years on the frontlines — battling the fentanyl epidemic, fighting cartel violence spilling over our borders, rescuing children from trafficking rings, and holding gang members and criminals accountable.

**Every day, I put on my badge and carried the responsibility of keeping our communities safe.** I’ve seen families ripped apart by crime and drugs, and I’ve felt that pain personally. I’ve seen firsthand the devastating effects of rising crime and failing leadership.

**I won’t stand by while career politicians in Washington make excuses, play politics, and leave families unprotected.**

Our liberty, our safety, and our freedom are not guaranteed by silence — they are defended through action. I will fight in Congress for the same principles I’ve lived by as Sheriff: **personal responsibility, faith, courage, and an unwavering commitment to the people I serve.**

I will stand up to the woke left, to the weak political establishment, and to anyone who puts politics above the safety of our communities.

_This fight will not be easy._ Washington isn’t used to someone who tells it like it is, someone who’s willing to get their hands dirty and put people over politics. But that’s exactly what I intend to do — for Arizona families, for our law enforcement, and for our Constitution.

I’m ready to step up and bring real leadership to Congress, but I can’t do it alone. [**Will you stand with me and help me launch this campaign with a generous show of support?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=acd7190a210c43e7a603ff5f82d77317&_e=LKrwHFUPBgihbN6iNvRiJvLeh1iO7GLDYNOvEOeuA0LX-woKt8UT734wdoge6G0jGmmzb0wKPbTLox8pc3IHk3dSXhkfpehkxLVALMOJqhuFst2yDAeuy-xuKJKIUuvSLEF6v5kzHRKN7QsHObZAihHEHVygC5mpY495ik1d5zFn1QKgAuL51v-laRPP60gEgFCXPyDsYmn1uOnaowtVib6jhpj6y--R1UR0H7F0yG-S5WVnj1bjUN3qwycIaU-2lLxBPFZ5mFTLf2KAvkbZVCuNNIMfQ9LJNSg75wpmBz6cdwHDsVo4aJaAzr8Yhy1t22YtASjrURH3c9WVb4HareFPDMXfDvrWN7RZo9hVS-H4C21XxH5M-CU9JwgTYW-LC5sp3sOyvpNdG4wmHOCbug-Q7ePipLzFyF9rSxOhoQ0-60UfqDVx7BvY3JOirWMFVJoujB0rvNpmpUghQMzO51dqpUIE_3w34cHVOmaRWKR1EwTf9nH73hhHSptICXjJ2_Vs5EMLpdgECmPbJhOuGsLcdUmnLEDi5N5NCutgmD09t6dajkiGOFZg9_V4wS_TG2-rb_NJ9Qg_PSJsRaOmgquYvRbU2MF15AwPLyMNoVitwkHYm0moLOFn_U-xA74XQWhIptJTi6FEcAfmjYd_HOLGQr0ud0zNIP-pBJRzMhA%3D)

Every contribution — big or small — sends a message: that hard-working families won’t be ignored, that our freedoms matter, and that courage still counts in America.

[**I’m asking everyone reading this email to chip in a launch donation of at least $5 to help us win in AZ-5 and put a fighter in Congress who is not afraid to get their hands dirty.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=acd7190a210c43e7a603ff5f82d77317&_e=LKrwHFUPBgihbN6iNvRiJvLeh1iO7GLDYNOvEOeuA0LX-woKt8UT734wdoge6G0jGmmzb0wKPbTLox8pc3IHk3dSXhkfpehkxLVALMOJqhuFst2yDAeuy-xuKJKIUuvSLEF6v5kzHRKN7QsHObZAihHEHVygC5mpY495ik1d5zFn1QKgAuL51v-laRPP60gEgFCXPyDsYmn1uOnaowtVib6jhpj6y--R1UR0H7F0yG8MuXXJXKWIBWwDFrdmvHP_-i1gVRdFzvdwjD-6Wdxu4OZTKfbR2wxSYzLOL4mQS5qBZ7aeAo8QUDeqTfSC_jVERaG_lQ8ssmdm5h-PkRte4I1tICu3MwIHLZO-v7KF-sM2SCyrTmBiVTcAUVqHvASrsfNhDtDFf0ffl_M7LdRKMXIyOnWdHKSS5OlpvZJXLusJq8L9r9Gds0Yv_nJqJno406UKFRFWfigrY7TT7FxFE4WYRSUdHSI9iCBkc5WND5rVsT4fHKuNwWgm-RyyqoQNwL7QcIRm51f9O6HMXurUHrY1QKL6nmZQtkQR_ev9p8T4LPIt4IPfk_d-Cs5pO-tkWfCeNc5iAEEo_KKIs-GAIg6YZY9o77viH404ZJnYnxPxB4TH0L8kC0VKkN8EmrXYBN0A7JniW4b-n7yvWrQm7sA4JokpI4vXkqfo9erhXVo%3D)

I’m ready, fellow patriot. Are you with me?

clean_body: I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now. | Fellow patriot — You may already know me – some of you know me and my story well. But I want to take this opportunity to reintroduce myself and share some exciting news. My name is Mark Lamb — I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and the proud former Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona. After much prayer and reflection with my family, I’ve made a huge decision: I am officially running for Congress in Arizona’s 5th District! This isn’t about ambition — it’s about service. I’ve seen what happens when leaders lack courage and conviction, and I refuse to sit by while feckless politicians and bureaucrats fail our nation’s families. I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now. Before I go any further, I want to thank Congressman Andy Biggs for his years of service to AZ-5 and wish him well in his decision to step down from this seat and run for Governor of Arizona. Andy has always fought hard for conservative values, and you can trust that I will do the same. You know me, and you know my record. As Sheriff, I spent years on the frontlines — battling the fentanyl epidemic, fighting cartel violence spilling over our borders, rescuing children from trafficking rings, and holding gang members and criminals accountable. Every day, I put on my badge and carried the responsibility of keeping our communities safe. I’ve seen families ripped apart by crime and drugs, and I’ve felt that pain personally. I’ve seen firsthand the devastating effects of rising crime and failing leadership. I won’t stand by while career politicians in Washington make excuses, play politics, and leave families unprotected. Our liberty, our safety, and our freedom are not guaranteed by silence — they are defended through action. I will fight in Congress for the same principles I’ve lived by as Sheriff: personal responsibility, faith, courage, and an unwavering commitment to the people I serve. I will stand up to the woke left, to the weak political establishment, and to anyone who puts politics above the safety of our communities. This fight will not be easy. Washington isn’t used to someone who tells it like it is, someone who’s willing to get their hands dirty and put people over politics. But that’s exactly what I intend to do — for Arizona families, for our law enforcement, and for our Constitution. I’m ready to step up and bring real leadership to Congress, but I can’t do it alone. Every contribution — big or small — sends a message: that hard-working families won’t be ignored, that our freedoms matter, and that courage still counts in America. I’m ready, fellow patriot. Are you with me? For God, Family, and Country, Mark Lamb Republican for Congress, AZ-5 P.S. I want to make it clear that the outpouring of support you’ve shown me and my wife, Janel, in the past factored into our decision to make this run. As Sheriff, I couldn’t have accomplished what I did without my deputies, and I won’t be able to succeed in this fight without you. Thank you! Join Mark Lamb on social media! | | PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Wes Moore
subject: This is a longer email about saying goodbye
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=865%2E1086043%2EV5AeLc)
This is a longer email about saying goodbye, Peter, but if you don’t have time to read through, I would deeply appreciate **[a contribution to power our campaign.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251102-1.hbhnOO&refcode=em-20251102-1&t=4&akid=865%2E1086043%2EV5AeLc)**
After nearly a century of operation, Valley Forge Military Academy — the place where I went to school and grew from an angry, complicated child to a confident young man — will be closing.
When my mother first sent me to the Forge, she saw military school as a last resort in response to a seemingly endless chain of misbehavior, both at home and at school. At age 11, I’d already felt handcuffs on my wrists. **I was not on a path to success.**
There was no overnight miracle when I started school there, but slowly, things changed. I learned about honor, code, and service. I started to take an interest in campus life, academics, and leadership positions — and I rose up the ranks and became a first captain in command of around 800 cadets.
After graduation, I went on to study at Johns Hopkins and Oxford, deployed to Afghanistan with the 82nd Airborne Division, ran one of the largest poverty-fighting organizations in the country, and now, I serve as the 63rd governor of Maryland _and the first Black governor in the history of my state._
What saddens me most isn’t losing a place I once called home. My memories will forever live on with me.
**It saddens me that other young men like me will have one fewer avenue to challenge themselves and build their own pathway to success.**
Peter, at a time where our young men and boys are falling behind and feeling isolated, we have to offer more paths for connection and engagement.
I know Valley Forge Military Academy did that for me, and I’m determined to find ways to do that for young Marylanders today.
That includes the **Maryland Corps and Service Year Option** — the first statewide program in the country to give high school graduates a year of paid, full-time community service on the path to college or a career.
We have to help young Marylanders find the thing that guides them on a pathway to success and that inspires them to serve. **[If you support that mission, I would appreciate a donation to keep me in the fight as Maryland's governor today.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251102-1.hbhnOO&refcode=em-20251102-1&t=5&akid=865%2E1086043%2EV5AeLc)**
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251102-1.hbhnOO&refcode=em-20251102-1&t=6&akid=865%2E1086043%2EV5AeLc)
_Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense._

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251102-1&t=7&refcode2=865_1086043_V5AeLc&akid=865%2E1086043%2EV5AeLc)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=865%2E1086043%2EV5AeLc)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=865%2E1086043%2EV5AeLc)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

| | | | |
