Patriot, we are approaching the end of early voting in New Jersey and Republicans are just a few thousand votes behind Democrats in early voter turnout.
[SPONSOR A DOOR KNOCKER](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8da371d3b08b4002a2eb16d125533c9b&_e=16CxHBujx96HWel-v9wloTmeMrTkTrbry7GXn2JgL0tSlsRv0cQDgKfrNPNwFf05ReNQ8mXeRAq9FDRCtFixWPqksi-LowO3amFYnp4Cby_-w1z4qcxeGShxcJuoEHXXjtSiQYGz5hPbGhfFsSE4Su0kPoSUCFLcq0P4IvB29jA9lbFsWYhnggepZxK4qquLrEidusTS3WTiILLw71eVjGcUr9-K2ziqZdv0rQZ0-jf_S_MAulvZwJueX_2kQLzZ8sVaCcf7vIewkBDwZ2CWsnddzJgLn_K0ETPsH0kWNGZi9c92bFu6iRLixBcVTJwNrbjzEUC8UCP0qRNOXB758o1RBnB3Og1wqn_Pa52NDfnASb7YUSPMxyJ-Hrqq-sH-_7GvWoLU4qTiombaKmxKhg%3D%3D)
My team of grassroots activists is knocking doors across the state driving Republicans to vote early in-person so that we have as many “votes in the bank” as possible before election day. Here are the latest numbers:
🔴Republican In-Person - 122,628🔵Democratic In-Person - 127,543🟡All Others In-Person \- 61,030
Right now, the Democrat early in-person vote lead is 5 TIMES LESS than their margin in 2021, **_[and with only a few days left of early in-person voting, we could win the early in-person vote](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8da371d3b08b4002a2eb16d125533c9b&_e=16CxHBujx96HWel-v9wloTmeMrTkTrbry7GXn2JgL0tSlsRv0cQDgKfrNPNwFf05ReNQ8mXeRAq9FDRCtFixWPqksi-LowO3amFYnp4Cby_-w1z4qcxeGShxcJuoEHXXjtSiQYGz5hPbGhfFsSE4Su0kPoSUCFLcq0P4IvB29jA9lbFsWYhnggepZxK4qquLrEidusTS3WTiILLw71eVjGcUr9-K2ziqZdv0rQZ0-jf_S_MAulvZwJueX_2kQLzZcqTQStxPY5GK8-O5F597tyNX7x2CwIQ59j61jpFesitmdmNZUT2decyVWbUph5ERK07xH0qI5otGSp7fapAlmVz6gXrSwpAQC6X_HLOttEyNs0mSfc4WxMaAX7qAj-eyPfS-yoC0eL0WTd-IAERIgg%3D%3D)_.**
[SPONSOR A DOOR KNOCKER](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8da371d3b08b4002a2eb16d125533c9b&_e=16CxHBujx96HWel-v9wloTmeMrTkTrbry7GXn2JgL0tSlsRv0cQDgKfrNPNwFf05ReNQ8mXeRAq9FDRCtFixWPqksi-LowO3amFYnp4Cby_-w1z4qcxeGShxcJuoEHXXjtSiQYGz5hPbGhfFsSE4Su0kPoSUCFLcq0P4IvB29jA9lbFsWYhnggepZxK4qquLrEidusTS3WTiILLw71eVjGcUr9-K2ziqZdv0rQZ0-jf_S_MAulvZwJueX_2kQLzZDfsGJIRggERASEzke64W4pN-_-YhEGpGSXvOlfQA650tNduUvBg2IMm5GqvTHB76-USbI_80DJiNgcUtdoeKeGroHFFLagqfq5RcOxBfCklD9tiro-9XYXaesY6As0whRDSam7zWoZHSdIptbK_7Uw%3D%3D)
Patriot, there is a lot of hard work ahead of us, but just like President Trump’s victory last year, the payoff is worth the sore feet and tired legs.
Why do we knock on doors? Because the research shows it is the most effective way to get voters to the polls. The equation is simple: the more doors we knock, the more Republican voters cast their ballots.
[SPONSOR A DOOR KNOCKER](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8da371d3b08b4002a2eb16d125533c9b&_e=16CxHBujx96HWel-v9wloTmeMrTkTrbry7GXn2JgL0tSlsRv0cQDgKfrNPNwFf05ReNQ8mXeRAq9FDRCtFixWPqksi-LowO3amFYnp4Cby_-w1z4qcxeGShxcJuoEHXXjtSiQYGz5hPbGhfFsSE4Su0kPoSUCFLcq0P4IvB29jA9lbFsWYhnggepZxK4qquLrEidusTS3WTiILLw71eVjGcUr9-K2ziqZdv0rQZ0-jf_S_MAulvZwJueX_2kQLzZielnbnmezwr8DjX6u1Jmzs5vambo8LVp3jbe2BTgb-Ybog8kkZtZ0x7LUdRoNAckGDn3NdTWvSAbs-JhtobHgkMOM4nXYQt6Dp0CEoUPYs1s_94GH3Jxek8J1G9RkgCWxt68f4Pn-vY8En4VWJFrVg%3D%3D)
**That’s where you come in.**
**We have door knockers in New Jersey right now who are waiting to get the call that a generous supporter has sponsored them and it’s time for them to start knocking.**
**_[If you’re ready to make a direct impact on a toss-up election, there’s no better way to invest your money than sponsoring an EVA NJ door knocker](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8da371d3b08b4002a2eb16d125533c9b&_e=16CxHBujx96HWel-v9wloTmeMrTkTrbry7GXn2JgL0tSlsRv0cQDgKfrNPNwFf05ReNQ8mXeRAq9FDRCtFixWPqksi-LowO3amFYnp4Cby_-w1z4qcxeGShxcJuoEHXXjtSiQYGz5hPbGhfFsSE4Su0kPoSUCFLcq0P4IvB29jA9lbFsWYhnggepZxK4qquLrEidusTS3WTiILLw71eVjGcUr9-K2ziqZdv0rQZ0-jf_S_MAulvZwJueX_2kQLzZnVnQI6fs3wx4mmo1L78zXVy8ZZwcneD4BeVi7T2PyEWwjQyYqgk8tXE5n-fMj0SidSi2wumcTsJ6LaDXrxNxNqSzsjY44D6t2O6vDWB82TfgTihBbvL1PigeMYpsWTmOjzMnwvOPhiDibpBfRosSQA%3D%3D)_.**
****__Thank you, Thank you, THANK YOU,
**Scott Presler** Early Vote Action New Jersey

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from YourCapitalMinds.com, an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. The way I look at it, we aren't just deciding Virginia's future in this election.
_We're setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond._ By embracing a politics that puts Virginians first — not a president, not a party; by drawing on the powerful conversations I've had with thousands of Virginians; and by laying out a common-sense agenda, starting with a plan to make all of our lives more affordable.
Our victory at the ballot box will pave the way for Democrats for years to come.
That's why far-right Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars against me. It's why Donald Trump keeps attacking me. _And it's why meeting our fundraising goals is so important._
But as I learned working cases at CIA and crafting laws at the U.S. Capitol, you're only as good as the team around you.

clean_body: = Hi, Peter, it's Abigail Spanberger, Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia. You're one of my top supporters, so I wanted to be the first to tell you: As of this morning, 1.3 million votes have been cast in our race for Governor. = If you are signed up for ActBlue Express, your contribution to Abigail Spanberger will be processed immediately: = = = = = = The way I look at it, we aren't just deciding Virginia's future in this election. We're setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond. By embracing a politics that puts Virginians first — not a president, not a party; by drawing on the powerful conversations I've had with thousands of Virginians; and by laying out a common-sense agenda, starting with a plan to make all of our lives more affordable. Our victory at the ballot box will pave the way for Democrats for years to come. That's why far-right Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars against me. It's why Donald Trump keeps attacking me. And it's why meeting our fundraising goals is so important. But as I learned working cases at CIA and crafting laws at the U.S. Capitol, you're only as good as the team around you. = = = = = = = I'm honored by the trust you've placed in me, and I hope that you'll continue to support our campaign. Thank you so much, Abigail Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

Media reports indicate that Republicans are getting pressure from all sides, including conservative voters, to extend these tax credits immediately and protect our healthcare. But the clock is ticking. Open enrollment has already begun in state-run ACA Marketplaces, and this has to be fixed before the end of the year. If the ACA credits are extended, Americans can enroll in the marketplace plans with peace of mind that their health insurance plan will remain affordable. If Congress lets the credits expire, people will rightfully be worried their rates could double at the end of the year - and many won't enroll at all. That's a recipe for disaster for all of us. Tens of millions of Americans will be uninsured. Insurers will raise rates on the rest of us. And the people with the most to lose - those with ongoing medical needs and major disease - will pay the highest price. [**We can 't leave millions of Americans behind. We can't let these tax credits expire. But after my recent debate with Abigail Spanberger, I must say it:
If you can't condemn murder, you can't be Governor.
When I confronted my opponent about her ticket-mate Jay Jones' vile calls for violence against a political opponent and his family, she cowered in silence. Not once, not twice, but four times she refused to demand Jones' removal from the ticket.
This is not leadership - it's a slimy political game.
Spanberger's mealy-mouthed answers were nothing but a pathetic attempt to cover her own tracks. When I pressed her to take a real stand, she crumbled.
That's not just a failure of leadership - it's a betrayal of every American who expects their leaders to stand up for what's right. Abigail Spanberger has proven she is wholly unfit for office!
As we used to say in the Marines, "not fit to move to the next rank."
We CANNOT let unhinged radicals like Jay Jones and Abigail Spanberger win in November.

clean_body: - I can't believe I have to send you this message. But after my recent debate with Abigail Spanberger, I must say it: If you can't condemn murder, you can't be Governor. When I confronted my opponent about her ticket-mate Jay Jones' vile calls for violence against a political opponent and his family, she cowered in silence. Not once, not twice, but four times she refused to demand Jones' removal from the ticket. This is not leadership - it's a slimy political game. Spanberger's mealy-mouthed answers were nothing but a pathetic attempt to cover her own tracks. When I pressed her to take a real stand, she crumbled. That's not just a failure of leadership - it's a betrayal of every American who expects their leaders to stand up for what's right. Abigail Spanberger has proven she is wholly unfit for office! As we used to say in the Marines, "not fit to move to the next rank." We CANNOT let unhinged radicals like Jay Jones and Abigail Spanberger win in November. So here's my call to action: keep reminding my opponent of the truth, exposing her craven cowardice to the people of Virginia. We can't afford to elect a governor who is so morally bankrupt that she'll tolerate hate and violence in her own party. We need a governor who will stand up for what's right, no matter the cost. I need your help to make it happen. Earle-SearsLt. Governor of Virginia| . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Tim Kaine
subject: Our strategy is working
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
When Donald Trump took office, I knew we’d need to find new ways to resist — and I asked my Senate team to map out every procedural option available to push back when he crossed the line.
That list became my strategy.
And it’s working.
Even as the government shutdown drags on, we’ve notched three major bipartisan victories to roll back Trump’s reckless tariffs — one ending his trade war with Brazil, another reversing his idiotic taxes on Canadian goods, and a third challenging his broad-based global tariffs.
All three votes sent the same message: Americans are tired of paying the price for Trump’s chaos.
His tariffs have raised costs on working families. His shutdown is leaving hundreds of thousands of public servants without pay. Enough is enough.
These wins prove that even in divided times, even when the government itself is at a standstill, we can still make progress when we focus on results.
If you believe we need more common-sense leadership and fewer political games, will you chip in any amount today to help keep this fight going? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
I’ll keep using every tool at my disposal to protect working families, restore stability, and get this government moving again.
Thanks for being part of this team.
—Tim Kaine

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118528556/580045401/-335710159?amount=15&refcode=email_110225_sherrill&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjFiY2RjNy0zM2I4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QGpkO9FEs7xprbN_YDJ1T7cmhbdbiT800pS0rI-ItxY=) **It’s pretty clear that Donald Trump is afraid of me.** Trump has publicly endorsed my opponent (after Jack shamelessly begged for his support). He’s attacked me by name in multiple, unhinged rants on social media. His administration _illegally leaked my private records to Jack’s campaign ally._ **But Trump is even more afraid of the movement we’ve built together here in New Jersey — because if we win, we will send a powerful message to the nation that the people do not support his destructive and incompetent presidency.** That’s why he’s doing _everything he can_ to stop us from winning this upcoming election, and is rallying the support of his deep-pocketed allies to flood this race with spending against us. **[Donald Trump knows that as governor, I’m going to do everything in my power to fight back against his disastrous agenda. But polling shows a neck-and-neck race, which means we absolutely can’t let Trump’s attacks go unanswered. But Trump is even more afraid of the movement we’ve built together here in New Jersey — because if we win, we will send a powerful message to the nation that the people do not support his destructive and incompetent presidency. That’s why he’s doing everything he can to stop us from winning this upcoming election, and is rallying the support of his deep-pocketed allies to flood this race with spending against us. = | | = What happens here in New Jersey will set the tone for what happens in our nation in 2026, 2028, and beyond. It will show the nation whether we’re passively accepting Trump’s authoritarianism and his attacks on working families — or whether we’re fighting back and ready to lead in a new direction. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split contribution will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Mikie John Hickenlooper is asking for contributions only from sources and in amounts that comply with federal and state law on behalf of the NJDSC: $10,000 from individuals and other federally permissible sources, and $5,000 from multi-candidate PACs. Mikie Sherrill for Governor is not asking for contributions from corporations, labor organizations, or federal contractors. Use of photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe, . | PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO Hickenlooper for Colorado PO Box 300007 Denver, CO 80203 United States

name: All eyes on PA
subject: Will Dems' desperate last stand save this key court on Tuesday?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
The cavalry is arriving
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rBnLl6AriA4t7d3ruF-aT7yQ_ybnSdH6S93sHuocofqNKMAI6diedyW0B4Dct-xONMAEQaL_-sKfV2HVUHhYcePfISNkFoBLqVG_mNQT4RBwbVGxKc95HQaNbYV8bwqeIgUG_0HYfPnlGJFp4tlSWjVgAPxUUYHspzi0YCnoP8z9b-gN-rtzW9G_b8sV9CpdXpU1KHNyqylcBpsOeTUnfxSztL8HSgrf_gwhWEIWBD8=&c=rIB6LoUu1LDBen-7d4E0se_mPHzTmQ5OHWAI1P3VupD7UHz6-pNh1A==&ch=EWmlBXgk-m7mMUkmR2jPhq7KSFwDzlgTPdcxYB_2o48jlXyeUAIT-A==)

| Peter,
For months, besieged Pennsylvania Democrats have been outnumbered, outgunned, and outmaneuvered, in their fight to defend the 3-vote Democratic majority in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
On the line is control of Pennsylvania. If MAGA wins they ban abortion, redraw PA's maps, and rig the 2026 and 2028 elections ensuring Dems never win this key swing state's 19 electoral college votes.
It's been bleak. MAGA has shrunk the Democrats 1,000,000 voter registration lead down to just 56,000 voters, a complex disinformation apparatus has duped thousands of Democratic voters into supporting the MAGA cause, and GOP mail ballot turnout is surging.
But just as all seemed lost, the cavalry began to arrive:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rBnLl6AriA4t7d3ruF-aT7yQ_ybnSdH6S93sHuocofqNKMAI6diedyW0B4Dct-xONMAEQaL_-sKfV2HVUHhYcePfISNkFoBLqVG_mNQT4RBwbVGxKc95HQaNbYV8bwqeIgUG_0HYfPnlGJFp4tlSWjVgAPxUUYHspzi0YCnoP8z9b-gN-rtzW9G_b8sV9CpdXpU1KHNyqylcBpsOeTUnf5jSaHjW00Q-39CXuB2DdWk=&c=rIB6LoUu1LDBen-7d4E0se_mPHzTmQ5OHWAI1P3VupD7UHz6-pNh1A==&ch=EWmlBXgk-m7mMUkmR2jPhq7KSFwDzlgTPdcxYB_2o48jlXyeUAIT-A==)
---
| | | | Obama, DNC Chair Ken Martin, and PA's Democratic Governor Josh Shapiro are urging voters to turn out. Tens of millions in Democratic ad spending is now flooding the airwaves. And over this weekend, thousands of Democratic volunteers poured into Philadelphia to turnout the vote.
The Democratic movement has awoken and the big guns are coming out.
We've broken out of our encirclement. We are no longer alone. Millions of Democrats from across the nation are now participants in our last stand in Pennsylvania. Defeat is no longer a foregone conclusion. For the first time in this election we are now on the offensive.
This will be remembered as a historic comeback, the moment we turned the tide against Trump's third term -- if you've voted, volunteered, or donated, you are participating in history.
[We cannot relent. We must pour everything we have into the breach. Rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5, before midnight to help us expand our breakthrough. Do your part to propel a comeback for the history books.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rBnLl6AriA4t7d3ruF-aT7yQ_ybnSdH6S93sHuocofqNKMAI6diedyW0B4Dct-xONMAEQaL_-sKfV2HVUHhYcePfISNkFoBLqVG_mNQT4RBwbVGxKc95HQaNbYV8bwqeIgUG_0HYfPnlGJFp4tlSWjVgAPxUUYHspzi0YCnoP8z9b-gN-rtzW9G_b8sV9CpdXpU1KHNyqylcBpsOeTUnf_lZS9U5vflXo4ALZmUObtI=&c=rIB6LoUu1LDBen-7d4E0se_mPHzTmQ5OHWAI1P3VupD7UHz6-pNh1A==&ch=EWmlBXgk-m7mMUkmR2jPhq7KSFwDzlgTPdcxYB_2o48jlXyeUAIT-A==)

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: What was Eisenhower's toughest decision?
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
-------------------------

[Bill of Rights Institute]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/4e28edf2e7624649854b86227e8e8fb2-27372f8200624d98903ae400e71ab436/63]

Friend,

At 4:15 a.m. on June 5, 1944, GENERAL DWIGHT D. EISENHOWER faced the
most difficult decision of his life: whether to send 156,000 ALLIED
TROOPS into a FULL-SCALE INVASION of Nazi-occupied France.

The weather was treacherous and the risk enormous - and the
responsibility rested solely on Eisenhower’s shoulders.

After giving the go-ahead, Eisenhower quietly wrote a note taking full
responsibility in case the mission failed:

_“IF ANY BLAME OR FAULT ATTACHES TO THE ATTEMPT, IT IS MINE
ALONE.”_

He also wrote that, in the event of success, he would give full credit
to the soldiers on the ground.

That handwritten message, never released, never needed, shows what
real leadership looks like. Eisenhower wasn’t simply commanding an
army. He was embodying the kind of integrity and humility we rarely
see today.

With the full knowledge that success or failure rested in his hands,
Eisenhower trusted his judgement and made the decision to proceed.

This powerful moment is the centerpiece of our new video lesson:

“GENERAL DWIGHT D. EISENHOWER: D-DAY AND RESPONSIBILITY.”

We believe the best way to prepare young people for complex challenges
is to show them how great Americans faced them before.

WILL YOU CONTRIBUTE TODAY TO HELP US CONTINUE THIS WORK AND GAIN
SPECIAL ACCESS TO OUR "GENERAL DWIGHT D. EISENHOWER: D-DAY AND
RESPONSIBILITY" CLASS?

Your support ensures these powerful historical lessons reach students
nationwide, shaping informed and principled citizens.

The video is free to watch, but as a SPECIAL THANK YOU FOR YOUR
SUPPORT, we’re offering donors access to the free exclusive lesson.

Your contribution helps us equip teachers, administrators, and
homeschoolers across the nation with stories like this. Stories that
use America’s proud history to teach the next generation of
Americans courage, humility, and leadership.

PLEASE TAKE JUST :30S AND DONATE WHATEVER YOU CAN RIGHT NOW. IT IS
ABSOLUTELY CRITICAL THAT EVERY STUDENT IN AMERICA HAS ACCESS TO
MATERIAL LIKE THIS.

HTTPS://SECURE.ANEDOT.COM/BILL-OF-RIGHTS-INSTITUTE/DDAY-AUG2025
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/4e28edf2e7624649854b86227e8e8fb2-27372f8200624d98903ae400e71ab436/63]

AND REMEMBER IF YOU DONATE TODAY, YOU IMMEDIATELY RECEIVE ACCESS TO
THE VIDEO.

Eisenhower’s story shows what it means to lead with integrity, even
when the stakes are life or death. His decision changed history and
his legacy can change how we think about responsibility in our own
lives.

YOUR INVESTMENT IN CIVIC EDUCATION WILL HELP STUDENTS UNDERSTAND THE
IMPORTANCE OF PERSONAL RESPONSIBILITY.

Thank you,

Bill of Rights Institute

CONTRIBUTE NOW >>
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/4e28edf2e7624649854b86227e8e8fb2-27372f8200624d98903ae400e71ab436/63]

name: Mikie Sherrill HQ
subject: We made a tough decision
body:
Peter, we’ll get right to the point.

A recent Emerson poll found this race tied — with tons of undecided voters. It’s not an outlier. We’ve lost count of how many polls have come out in recent weeks showing this race functionally tied.

In a race this close, the last thing we can afford is for people who support Mikie Sherrill to not show up to the polls, or leave their mail-in ballot sitting on their kitchen table.

Peter, we just made a decision to MASSIVELY expand our GOTV program between now and Nov. 4 — counting on money that we don’t yet have, because we’re counting on this grassroots team to come in big for us down the stretch.

We know it’s asking a lot, but Peter, we need all the help we can get in the final days of this race. Can we count on you to split $10 between our team and Roy Cooper to help us fund the biggest GOTV operation in New Jersey history? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_sherrillsplit?amount=10]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between New Jersey Democratic State Committee and Roy Cooper:

Mikie Sherrill HQ

Cooper Victory Fund is asking for contributions only from sources and in amounts that comply with federal and state law on behalf of the NJDSC: $10,000 from individuals and other federally permissible sources, and $5,000 from multi-candidate PACs. Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: All eyes on PA
subject: Will Dems' desperate last stand save this key court on Tuesday?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
The cavalry is arriving
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CKWJ4DnSMSbwpx82LSzLTN6oUQrQraRpjbly5kVzypYpzUPoUSdeN-ub6sb7TK6Ure7jGF-Hk_dskci4tvV6nR2pN3xRHNLtXewG1HpEqnxy_YiU4Tfl2Fwrnnvw-eNYhu6KfxuRJToW_jHX30k_-lwgyMju5UlUZSK-QVZ2eLxfRqw-UFPBtaMzFUKuPHVEuKDqjZC8D5pEuMmvglorn7Zzb793mQFW91GhMo6SvFARquGFSbJkzA==&c=e4POzqA8ArjBcKFjPF_bTjtiTDwuuXRcIXGxca0wr2YhXvWxftMlXA==&ch=nIcdAo6OIpb_8Okg5SYX7wUnfvvX1nsPbYNFE2E3BT6ZOMtrwn1SVg==)

| Peter,
For months, besieged Pennsylvania Democrats have been outnumbered, outgunned, and outmaneuvered, in their fight to defend the 3-vote Democratic majority in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
On the line is control of Pennsylvania. If MAGA wins they ban abortion, redraw PA's maps, and rig the 2026 and 2028 elections ensuring Dems never win this key swing state's 19 electoral college votes.
It's been bleak. MAGA has shrunk the Democrats 1,000,000 voter registration lead down to just 56,000 voters, a complex disinformation apparatus has duped thousands of Democratic voters into supporting the MAGA cause, and GOP mail ballot turnout is surging.
But just as all seemed lost, the cavalry began to arrive:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CKWJ4DnSMSbwpx82LSzLTN6oUQrQraRpjbly5kVzypYpzUPoUSdeN-ub6sb7TK6Ure7jGF-Hk_dskci4tvV6nR2pN3xRHNLtXewG1HpEqnxy_YiU4Tfl2Fwrnnvw-eNYhu6KfxuRJToW_jHX30k_-lwgyMju5UlUZSK-QVZ2eLxfRqw-UFPBtaMzFUKuPHVEuKDqjZC8D5pEuMmvglorn7Zzb793mQFWctS_1DAb1G4v8XK22RxscA==&c=e4POzqA8ArjBcKFjPF_bTjtiTDwuuXRcIXGxca0wr2YhXvWxftMlXA==&ch=nIcdAo6OIpb_8Okg5SYX7wUnfvvX1nsPbYNFE2E3BT6ZOMtrwn1SVg==)
---
| | | | Obama, DNC Chair Ken Martin, and PA's Democratic Governor Josh Shapiro are urging voters to turn out. Tens of millions in Democratic ad spending is now flooding the airwaves. And over this weekend, thousands of Democratic volunteers poured into Philadelphia to turnout the vote.
The Democratic movement has awoken and the big guns are coming out.
We've broken out of our encirclement. We are no longer alone. Millions of Democrats from across the nation are now participants in our last stand in Pennsylvania. Defeat is no longer a foregone conclusion. For the first time in this election we are now on the offensive.
This will be remembered as a historic comeback, the moment we turned the tide against Trump's third term -- if you've voted, volunteered, or donated, you are participating in history. [We cannot relent. We must pour everything we have into the breach. Rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5, before midnight to help us expand our breakthrough. Do your part to propel a comeback for the history books.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CKWJ4DnSMSbwpx82LSzLTN6oUQrQraRpjbly5kVzypYpzUPoUSdeN-ub6sb7TK6Ure7jGF-Hk_dskci4tvV6nR2pN3xRHNLtXewG1HpEqnxy_YiU4Tfl2Fwrnnvw-eNYhu6KfxuRJToW_jHX30k_-lwgyMju5UlUZSK-QVZ2eLxfRqw-UFPBtaMzFUKuPHVEuKDqjZC8D5pEuMmvglorn7Zzb793mQFWTJTJvw4sCkjQsqkK7dlpyQ==&c=e4POzqA8ArjBcKFjPF_bTjtiTDwuuXRcIXGxca0wr2YhXvWxftMlXA==&ch=nIcdAo6OIpb_8Okg5SYX7wUnfvvX1nsPbYNFE2E3BT6ZOMtrwn1SVg==)

name: Mikie Sherrill HQ
subject: We made a tough decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| We’ll get right to the point.

A recent Emerson poll found this race tied — with tons of undecided voters. It’s not an outlier. We’ve lost count of how many polls have come out in recent weeks showing this race functionally tied.

In a race this close, the last thing we can afford is for people who support Mikie Sherrill to not show up to the polls, or leave their mail-in ballot sitting on their kitchen table.

**We just made a decision to MASSIVELY expand our GOTV program between now and Nov. 4 — counting on money that we don’t yet have, because we’re counting on this grassroots team to come in big for us down the stretch.**

[We know it’s asking a lot, but friend, we need all the help we can get in the final days of this race. Can we count on you to split $10 between NJ Victory 25 and the Voter Protection Project to help us fund the biggest GOTV operation in New Jersey history?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95778?t=6&akid=21697%2E878179%2EgTYmi4) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between New Jersey Democratic State Committee - NJVictory2025 and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95779?t=7&akid=21697%2E878179%2EgTYmi4)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95780?t=8&akid=21697%2E878179%2EgTYmi4)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95781?t=9&akid=21697%2E878179%2EgTYmi4)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95782?t=10&akid=21697%2E878179%2EgTYmi4)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95783?t=11&akid=21697%2E878179%2EgTYmi4)
Thank you,

Mikie Sherrill HQ
Voter Protection Project is asking for contributions only from sources and in amounts that comply with federal and state law on behalf of the NJDSC: $10,000 from individuals and other federally permissible sources, and $5,000 from multi-candidate PACs. Mikie Sherrill for Governor is not asking for contributions from corporations, labor organizations, or federal contractors.
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21697%2E878179%2EgTYmi4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21697%2E878179%2EgTYmi4).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21697%2E878179%2EgTYmi4) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=21697%2E878179%2EgTYmi4). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21697%2E878179%2EgTYmi4)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21697%2E878179%2EgTYmi4)

In a [prior article we wrote about the concept of a 21st century Homestead Act](https://substack.com/redirect/fec9cb7b-70a4-4dea-aa66-f338fb464d76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as a way to redevelop depressed urban areas while providing homeownership opportunities for working class and middle class Americans. **Workforce rental housing is simply not working as a means to solve the housing gaps in America.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c84d5a8f-b9f4-44a0-85cf-3cc09cb374a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [Aman Kumar](https://substack.com/redirect/166514b5-6eaa-4cdd-8181-920d4442a2cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/237d0681-a45b-4ec0-a2a2-9d030a037e5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Pledge your support](https://substack..VFUACavZW73RyaJS2mEyum3tcM8eUFrGZjLl_UP7q4c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=177835961)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=177835961&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc3ODM1OTYxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjIxMjEyMzMsImV4cCI6MTc2NDcxMzIzMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.W4grluD6NFyoQCOZdF05dL_ucKOtDJ3LsloJa8AOvSw)
Urban pioneers have transformed undesirable areas into vibrant neighborhoods. This has been a common practice in New York and other cities with warehouse districts. Abandoned factories and office buildings in Tribeca and SoHo have been converted to residential apartments and lofts. These neighborhoods have now become trendy and very expensive and some of the most desirable. **However, thus urbanization is usually a gentrification process that ultimately leads to the removal of those working class families that have lived in neighborhoods pre-transformation.**
**How can it be done different?**
The 21st Century Homestead Act would grant similar opportunities to working class and middle class Americans.
**How Would this Work?**
Every major city in the country has run down blighted areas in various states of disrepair. This property can be taken by eminent domain. Some of these properties may have already been abandoned. Once the land is acquired, these properties could be developed as attached townhouses or several story apartment buildings using prefab houses to keep construction costs down (with mostly assembly of these units).
If the units are developed at affordable prices, these urban pioneer homesteaders would then purchase the unit and the government would then retain title to the land. The Homesteader would pay an annual fee to the government that would be applied to the purchase of the land. After a fixed time (ie. 15 years of payments) the land title would be transferred to the Homesteader.
**What about financing costs?**
If mortgages return to low rates, these sales would be financed with low interest loans. If the rates remain high the government would sell tax free bonds at a lower interest rate than traditional loans. The funds raised would then be used to finance the mortgages on the units.
If done properly for the same monthly after tax costs of a rental unit of a similar size, Homesteaders would become home-owners. A previous area of urban decay would be transformed into a residential neighborhood. With new buildings and buildings with commercial space and schools, Businesses would come to the area to provide services to the new homeowners.
**In the end everybody wins. Homesteaders become home owners. Urban neighborhoods would be revitalized.**
This is the pioneer spirit that America was built on transforming land from low value to a valuable home where the homesteader can raise their family and build equity and transfer to the next generation, building meaningful generational wealth.
| A guest post by| [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)Business Consultant, Political Consultant, Campaign Manager, Construction Consultant and Corporate Attorney. Jonathan served as the Campaign Manager for Dr. Michael Goldstein - CT-04 [Subscribe to Jonathan](https://substack.com/redirect/f39a2fa4-9a55-40b0-b12f-b36a05ac8c60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Voter Action Project Research
subject: Your opinion on permanent mail-in voting?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project / [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Bolts: Connecticut Ballot Measure Could Make Voting More Inclusive [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Bolts_CTMailInBallotInitiative.png]
Folks -- Connecticut recently passed a ballot initiative to expand the use of mail-in voting to all citizens with no excuse, every year. This follows other states, like Maryland, which allow voters to permanently opt in to receive and submit their ballot by mail.
Mail voting -- in use in the United States since the Civil War -- has repeatedly been proven to be a safe, secure, and reliable voting method used by voters of all political parties.
As we move towards the next set of state legislative sessions, we need to know what issues you favor the most. Will you take our one-click survey today?
Are you in favor of having the option to vote by mail permanently?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=110225_2yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=110225_2no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=110225_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=110225_2&amount=20]

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Semper Fi.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely.
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=537e76a4346b4782a0b7cbe7c0e97957&_e=NV9rzRkETqjvKuwcujx1amUdFZDr8YfNjmWGqIJs045KvV54ZY2CmHtlAMdz3kJKlYJUbeI-m4rKol-C-RKbsi__y7dp0J8eaqrWuBPN07A4PYeCMXpacJqrgMX0h6t8i2iqrZ7922PclzcPHCjRERx-dKfIAMLi1XU1XAfgu6wngi0oac3hwXcM5u6kpeL-DpacSaYYmudmMQwSfOI4dMxw357Vj_16MRfru8qrKMZDwIXLOABlw2q7yYccsjLuOhyEomGyf56GwXsoTSnhkMHz5ocWBQsQqq1h7aERAlcms4dHs9ci39AcgyYteT4dVeGQVEbzJBwEoS4A4TL6V0GdQEf1GksQMlex89HjVErHwfM97F1WMb_xV9_3RwaNs7qPlqy32m5Mg3gH5BNVg54ZjJGn_QSHatHEV6BXrLnThAG6DHhWEUb9aC9RejARpJjl0Z_QjXL8bsfoA1CbFS9BsVykWK4I2_PE_gEoR1l85u3b-zyVkyBm3l_lcdFGNm5TwEGncs8HQr1ss76y56OPTTBQIqNDcMdwVohSQd2GdWRufoAfBvELsrMY3DLrCb3GAdgmmXSgIo9csJQ9S6Uw7v5Js023xhW3LAbLMy_d_NAkadmsAkK_qsVo5ZRzZhdNX1XMqc-_9pU10isSLw%3D%3D) Semper Fi. Always faithful.
I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in? [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=537e76a4346b4782a0b7cbe7c0e97957&_e=NV9rzRkETqjvKuwcujx1amUdFZDr8YfNjmWGqIJs045KvV54ZY2CmHtlAMdz3kJKlYJUbeI-m4rKol-C-RKbsi__y7dp0J8eaqrWuBPN07A4PYeCMXpacJqrgMX0h6t8i2iqrZ7922PclzcPHCjRERx-dKfIAMLi1XU1XAfgu6wngi0oac3hwXcM5u6kpeL-DpacSaYYmudmMQwSfOI4dMxw357Vj_16MRfru8qrKMbGFjoc5XYPgdYLDdOCR77g8vpzttTh0KM6xk61G3iFem5zPk7lO_jSmlABLLEL8RcZ-5Vs7EMgKBzyPxcBXowSyqjfq7c7kQvuDwRozVgqnC_2LncrjptWmOmOaOe0pMMqH6ez9_P4ZRHeXDAh4Gr-QdkPEsHf7rj8vY7nejo68pPsZCMNpbuT247gmsRRegsJrSrpcGM_96PuDZaKj7tfqDEuyypDd-OR5CJSkt5bQaTh7K2_YsKlkKootLsfRzmt8D4SO2gV91ErDWFQEgvmk5OG4kq7dIfh_hnEjOJQ9LU9RvTNTygMeC_AdlGBYQsDuViNaK-SfRiPAi9N-1MV_SnhYkAbwSbSZBeCsP4n10ixQ44rh25dmwzW56h6w1tTnGo2vQPS4cBNVrFpH1vuPqP9mBFlPulUFMETXwdXDA%3D%3D) And to that, I say absolutely.
Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I'm not like the others who normally send you these messages:
-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry.
I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America.
And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope.
But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children.
Not on my watch.

clean_body: I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely. Semper Fi. Always faithful. I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in? And to that, I say absolutely. Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I'm not like the others who normally send you these messages: -I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry. I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America. And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope. But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children. Not on my watch. We have a long journey ahead of us, but we will be better off with you on our side. Thank you & God Bless, Winsome Earle-Sears Candidate for Governor of Virginia * I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: David Hogg
subject: Update from Houston
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Something extraordinary happened on the doors yesterday.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251102-1&t=1&akid=2800%2E587540%2ECBMLWW)
Hey Peter, David here with an update from on the ground in Houston.
Yesterday, I was out knocking on doors with State Senator Molly Cook and our endorsed congressional candidate Christian Menefee — and at the very first door we hit, something extraordinary happened that I haven’t stopped thinking about.
A woman opened the door and immediately lit up. “Oh my God, are you Senator Molly Cook?” she asked. Molly smiled and said, “Yes, I am.” Molly was an LWD endorsed candidate last cycle. We invested $310,000 in her race, I knocked doors for her in the Texas heat along with 50 volunteers, and I was right there with her on Election Night, when she won by just 62 votes. This interaction was a really powerful, full circle kind of moment that reminded me why we’re doing this game-changing work and just how much of a positive impact our candidates are having on their communities.
That same woman recognized me too. She came over, hugged me, and told me she couldn’t wait to vote for Christian. And this was the _FIRST_ door we knocked! If you’ve ever canvassed before, you know that there’s nothing better than a great first door to keep your energy high and make you forget about your sore feet!
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251102_1_houston.Gdxe8o&refcode=em20251102-2800&amount=5&t=3&akid=2800%2E587540%2ECBMLWW)
_Kicking off our day of canvassing with Christian, Molly, and incredible volunteers_
**Christian and Molly are leaders we deserve.** And thanks to generous grassroots support from people just like you, Peter, voters in Houston know who they are, and even better, are _excited_ to vote for them!
The work we’re doing together is _working._ The money we’re raising and advice we are giving just helped Christian’s team substantially increase ads on TV when they didn’t think they could. And guess what? People on the doors recognize him now from those ads about suing Trump and standing up for our rights. One voter told him outright: _“You look trustworthy.”_
We are changing the face of power in this country. We’re not just helping these young leaders run, we’re helping them win. But we can’t afford to let up now.
We have just days until this election. Every dollar we raise helps us keep pushing, in Houston, Atlanta, and NYC, where we have opportunities to make real change.
**[Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can today to help us finish strong and elect our slate of young, transformational, progressive leaders on Tuesday?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251102_1_houston.Gdxe8o&refcode=em20251102-2800&amount=5&t=4&akid=2800%2E587540%2ECBMLWW)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251102_1_houston.Gdxe8o&amount=5&refcode=em20251102-2800&t=23&akid=2800%2E587540%2ECBMLWW)**
Thank you for being a part of this, Peter.
David Hogg

P.S. Before we knocked doors, Christian’s son came out to the canvass launch and played football with us. He even introduced himself like his dad: “I’m Christian Menefee and I’m running for Congress.” It was adorable. And honestly, his son was such a good reminder for me of why the future is worth fighting for, Peter. If you support our mission, [**will you start a monthly contribution of $5 now?**](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2774?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251102_1_houston.WICXFj&refcode=em20251102-2800&amount=5&t=24&akid=2800%2E587540%2ECBMLWW)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251102-1&t=25&refcode2=2800_587540_CBMLWW&akid=2800%2E587540%2ECBMLWW)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=2800%2E587540%2ECBMLWW)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=2800%2E587540%2ECBMLWW)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

Hi Advocate for Life, Every day, women across America search online for answers. They are scared, uncertain, and convinced abortion is their only option. That's where **PreBorn!** steps in. Our Network Clinics across the nation provide **free ultrasounds** , **holistic** **compassionate care** , and the **gospel of Jesus Christ** to women in crisis. Because when a mother sees her baby for the first time, when she hears that heartbeat, everything changes. In fact, 81% of women who receive an ultrasound, can see their baby and hear the heartbeat, will choose life for their babies. And your **$28 gift provides one life-saving ultrasound** and gives her the chance to meet her baby and hear of God's love for her. clean_body: Every day, women across America search online for answers. They are scared, uncertain, and convinced abortion is their only option. | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Hi Advocate for Life, Every day, women across America search online for answers. They are scared, uncertain, and convinced abortion is their only option. That's where PreBorn! steps in. Our Network Clinics across the nation provide free ultrasounds , holistic compassionate care , and the gospel of Jesus Christ to women in crisis. Because when a mother sees her baby for the first time, when she hears that heartbeat, everything changes. In fact, 81% of women who receive an ultrasound, can see their baby and hear the heartbeat, will choose life for their babies. And your $28 gift provides one life-saving ultrasound and gives her the chance to meet her baby and hear of God's love for her. As our thank-you, we'll send you PreBorn!'s Calendar -- a celebration of the lives your gift helps save and the futures your faith helps build. Inside, you'll also find a monthly prayer guide to keep you connected to this mission all year long. Supplies are limited so give today to help reach the next mother before she's too late to hear her baby's heartbeat. Thank you for giving hope where it's needed most. Gratefully, The PreBorn! Team

body:
Something has shifted in Pennsylvania. Over the past 48 hours, we've seen a surge of energy that feels like a break in the clouds — a moment of grace in the eleventh hour.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sLzOXlbfYTVYUeqeza5vjmeYxf__d9j3Eu7Y1T5cVX8QPC21LpWyBtP6wDsyzM0uAVoSZF-zHShZVHOGZgRV8GNkzza4YR0Umdda70Wafyj6z2845B-GpZxNabbZ1O9lymhUGZXibIaN9NZAhD-wvdX8QuiTm64DXE5_9ztGA8p8C3WddbWEc5mHze67jGRxLtVt3XJ_JvJe0zryHb8391aVREjx3g0sCKr-mmu0c0APxGnN_3a2eg==&c=ukS7aobUr0RoiMrdq5iJD0MiHedSKOfdY8coRzXr6FKUxCkoF50Ysg==&ch=GeZSi5W__-5DE_5-8iTF98jWTNMtLaRO8eExDT0GxBtum0cuSVlhOA==)
---
| Peter,
Something has shifted in Pennsylvania.
Over the past 48 hours, we've seen a surge of energy that feels like a break in the clouds -- a moment of grace in the eleventh hour.
Volunteers are pouring in. Early vote requests are spiking. And for the first time in this fight, the far-right is blinking.
But hear this clearly:
They are counting on us letting up. They want us to grow comfortable, to believe we have "enough."
That is how they win -- if we take our foot off the gas for even a second.
This momentum is not salvation -- it is opportunity. A narrow, fragile window where the people of this state can still stand in the breach and stop the extremists before they seize the court that decides the fate of the Senate and the 2028 presidency.
We are rising. But we must finish the climb.
Peter, if we press forward with everything we have, this will be remembered as the moment when the people refused to surrender the future. When the tide began to turn against a triumphant MAGA movement.
[Now is the moment to surge, not coast. Rush $10 or more if you are ready to keep pushing strong for a huge win in Pennsylvania this Tuesday.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sLzOXlbfYTVYUeqeza5vjmeYxf__d9j3Eu7Y1T5cVX8QPC21LpWyBtP6wDsyzM0uAVoSZF-zHShZVHOGZgRV8GNkzza4YR0Umdda70Wafyj6z2845B-GpZxNabbZ1O9lymhUGZXibIaN9NZAhD-wvdX8QuiTm64DXE5_9ztGA8p8C3WddbWEc5mHze67jGRxLtVt3XJ_JvJe0zryHb8391aVREjx3g0sj-FKKqKqTsZKCmp4CZYyYA==&c=ukS7aobUr0RoiMrdq5iJD0MiHedSKOfdY8coRzXr6FKUxCkoF50Ysg==&ch=GeZSi5W__-5DE_5-8iTF98jWTNMtLaRO8eExDT0GxBtum0cuSVlhOA==)

name: Haley Stevens
subject: this will take just a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
can you do me a favor?

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1253%2E49239%2EDsU_dV)
| Hi, null! It's Haley.
---
I wanted to personally reach out because I noticed you haven't had the chance to fill out my new priorities survey.
Would you do me a huge favor and take 60 seconds to fill it out now? The tech team did some wizardry and made you a personalized link: **[surveys.signforgood.com/Stevens-On-The-Road-Priorities-Survey/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7888?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=1253%2E49239%2EDsU_dV)**
Listening to regular folks is one of the most important – and fun! – parts of this campaign, so I'd love to hear from you.
Thanks so much, null.
Haley
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: I want to hear from you
| | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7889?t=3&akid=1253%2E49239%2EDsU_dV)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7888?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1253%2E49239%2EDsU_dV)
Hi null, it’s Haley – just thinking back on my _Made in Michigan_ tour!
I had the chance to speak with so many incredible Michiganders, and each conversation reminded me why I’m running for Senate: to fight for the hardworking people who make this state great.
But I can’t talk to everyone in person, and that’s why I’m reaching out: **[Will you take 60 seconds to fill out my November Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7888?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1253%2E49239%2EDsU_dV)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7888?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1253%2E49239%2EDsU_dV)
---
From rising costs to protecting Social Security to defending Michigan’s manufacturing jobs, I’ve heard a lot about what is keeping people up at night. But I genuinely want to know:**What’s on YOUR mind, null?**
[**We’re hoping to get 60 more responses from 18326 before midnight tonight –** can I count on you to take the survey now?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7888?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1253%2E49239%2EDsU_dV)
Grateful you're on this team,

Haley
|

**Peter, Election Day is on TUESDAY!**

That’s only two days away!

Here’s how to make sure your vote is counted:
* Did you send in your mail-in or absentee ballot already? **_[Track your ballot here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118529524/580048428/1664502030?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251102_EN_GOTV_0_1MO_LarryHailshamJr_NA_NA_2Days&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODM0MGI2Ny0zZGI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UrUAdIw_M7vZ0tILkYB42mpTFcLexqjsMkQd6w32ZmY=&emci=ac0ec55f-3db8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=98340b67-3db8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296)_**

* Are you planning to vote in-person? Polls open at 7AM and close at 8PM – **_[find your polling place and review what you can expect!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118529526/580048430/1779585377?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251102_EN_GOTV_0_1MO_LarryHailshamJr_NA_NA_2Days&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODM0MGI2Ny0zZGI4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UrUAdIw_M7vZ0tILkYB42mpTFcLexqjsMkQd6w32ZmY=&emci=ac0ec55f-3db8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=98340b67-3db8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296)_**
* If you have any questions, call the **official PA Bureau of Elections hotline at 1-877-VOTES-PA** or the **PA Dems Voter Assistance Hotline at 1-833-PA-VOTES**

**And remember, if you are in line at the polls before 8PM, STAY IN LINE!**

Peter, make sure your voice is heard on Election Day and help your friends and family out by sharing this information with them!

Larry Hailsham Jr.

# [We Lost the Flag -- and the Feeling That Went With It](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=177757001&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc3NzU3MDAxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjIxMjcyMTIsImV4cCI6MTc2NDcxOTIxMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YyDDK1Jf-pRmBVeGRdcOhhB9C3LG6NXAf5MIR3DUoCM)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5cdccf0a-7065-4b20-84e9-5749887291ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/67463c3a-a27b-47fe-ab60-e0e3a4dfca8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**By Lawrence Winnerman**_
Last night proved what's been true for years now: everything is political. Even sports. Even the World Series. Sure, it was just a game -- but it felt like a proxy war between Canada and the United States--and between two visions of America.**Did you see the passion with which the Jays fans sang** _**O, Canada**_**every damn night?**
[I dare you to watch and not cry a little ](https://substack.com/redirect/45047c66-a3b7-459b-9f69-2f2b29c82d08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)at what Canada has recently found, and at what we have lost. The Dodgers' historic win hasn't diminished the growing patriotism of our northern neighbors; it merely forestalled it for a moment.
That tension -- north versus south, fact versus fantasy, democracy versus the creeping urge to dominate -- runs through everything now. There's no such thing as an apolitical space.
The old etiquette of "don't talk politics, religion, or sex at the table" was always bullshit. Politics decides who _gets_ to sit at that table. It decides who eats, who has medicine, who has a home. And these days, it decides who gets deported in the middle of the night through helicopter ICE raids, or whose kid is targeted by a state legislature for existing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/72858583-5e83-47d4-a4f3-d667d8191946?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Coming for you next.
The wall between culture and politics isn't just crumbling -- it's gone. "I just want to watch the game" has become "shut up and dribble." Every arena of American life -- sports, gaming, film, art, music, even coffee chains -- is a battlefield of worldviews.
Look at the last month's headlines. The **Ryder Cup** wasn't just a golf tournament; it was a test of national identity wrapped in **MAGA cosplay**. Fans hurled beer and bile at Rory McIlroy's wife like they were defending a flag instead of watching a sport. In response, _**he vowed never to compete in America again**_ -- and can you blame him? Golf, the most sedate of games, turned into a grievance rally. Jeering has become liturgy.
* * *
Mad as hell but low on coin? Subscribe for free.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.JgLAooi24sS_Z9U938VNv51pBHq7lbCCsXGvVdofbYo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=177757001)
* * *
Meanwhile, **Jared Kushner and Saudi money circling Electronic Arts** isn't just about profit -- it's about control. EA's worlds -- FIFA, Madden, The Sims -- are cultural ecosystems shaping millions of young minds. When autocrats buy the pipelines of imagination, they don't need to censor outright. They just erase. That Pride kit in FIFA? Gone. Diverse Sims households? Quietly "rethought."
That's how authoritarianism works in 2025: not by banning what it hates, but by buying it outright and then quietly deleting it.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/946501b3-9671-48f1-9da5-65a94e1f8503?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hubba hubba! Sign me up for #TeamTrans!
And it doesn't stop there. The Supreme Court is now the front line of the culture war -- a six-seat fortress of grievance poised to rule on LGBTQ rights, gun laws, and redistricting. These cases aren't about law anymore. They're about reshaping the nation's moral DNA.
The Court has become the final arena where culture and politics merge into something harder and colder: **power without accountability**.
The right understands this perfectly. The left still doesn't.
Republicans long ago turned culture into a weapon -- every school board, every sports league, every library, every corporate DEI policy. **They wrapped fascism in the flag and called it freedom**. Democrats responded with press releases and sternly worded letters (_paging Chuck Schumer, your retirement is ready_).
* * *
Hide your kids, hide your wives. Subscribe now.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.JgLAooi24sS_Z9U938VNv51pBHq7lbCCsXGvVdofbYo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=177757001)
* * *
And now, even the strategists who once knew better are folding. **David Plouffe, James Carville, and David Axelrod** -- men who built modern Democratic messaging -- are publicly urging the party to ditch what they sneer at as "interest-group politics." **Translation** _: throw queer people, trans kids, and anyone inconvenient under the bus to "win back the middle."_
That "middle" doesn't exist. It's a ghost conjured by consultants too afraid to stand for something real. You may not like **Zohran Mamdani** , but you sure as shit know what he stands for--and come Tuesday, he's going to be the Mayor-elect of New York City.
When the party of democracy decides certain people are expendable, it's not strategy -- it's surrender.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/67463c3a-a27b-47fe-ab60-e0e3a4dfca8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
Let's be clear: people are dying because of that cowardice. ICE raids are sweeping up citizens. SNAP benefits are gutted. States are criminalizing healthcare for trans teens while their governors smirk for the cameras. This isn't abstract politics. It's state-sanctioned cruelty. And it's happening because the people who were supposed to fight for decency decided it was too impolite to make noise.
Democrats lost the emotional narrative. We ceded patriotism, symbolism, and moral clarity to a party that burns books and worships billionaires. The GOP made bullying feel like belonging. _They made hatred look like community_.
And too many Democratic leaders still think data points can out-argue demagoguery.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/70ea9e85-37fb-4ee6-a081-0ac8e49808b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
"Your mom."
That has to end. Culture isn't the sideshow -- it's the main event. It's how people feel seen or erased, protected or endangered. The right knows it. That's why they're fighting like their lives depend on it. Because politically, they do.
So what do we do? We stop pretending neutrality is noble. We stop being polite about fascism. We build the new infrastructure ourselves -- in schools, in art, in music, in journalism.
We take back the culture so that we can take back the future.
That's already happening here -- in independent media networks, in Substack newsletters, in podcasts, and in collective voices that refuse to be silenced. The corporate media sold its soul for access and ad revenue.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b6111134-0290-49f1-af64-8be494c2de06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Love for sale! Appetizing young love for sale!
Look at Bari Weiss cashing out _The Free Press_ for millions -- the right understands that culture _is_ the battlespace. They're building their empire right here on Substack while too many progressives are still debating tone.
The only honest future is independent, sustained by people willing to pay for truth.
**If you believe in a voice,**_**fund it.**_****
_**If you believe in democracy, subscribe to it.**_
Because the other side is funding propaganda with billions, and the only counterweight is us -- **loud, unfiltered, unbought**.
This isn't about comfort. It's about survival. **The cultural front** _**is**_**the political front**. Ignore that at your peril, and you'll wake up in a country you don't recognize -- one where your kid's favorite game, your local library, your own body, are someone else's property.
Politics is culture. Culture is politics. That's the deal now. You can keep pretending you're "not political." But while you sit on the couch, there are billionaires, preachers, and strongmen writing the script for what you'll be allowed to see, say, or dream.
**Silence is complicity.**
**People are dying.**
**Fight like hell.**
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/67463c3a-a27b-47fe-ab60-e0e3a4dfca8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

Now, everything from sports to art to gaming is the battlefield for America's soul. | | and | Nov 2 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- By Lawrence Winnerman Last night proved what's been true for years now: everything is political. Even sports. Even the World Series. Sure, it was just a game -- but it felt like a proxy war between Canada and the United States--and between two visions of America.Did you see the passion with which the Jays fans sang O, Canadaevery damn night? what Canada has recently found, and at what we have lost. The Dodgers' historic win hasn't diminished the growing patriotism of our northern neighbors; it merely forestalled it for a moment. That tension -- north versus south, fact versus fantasy, democracy versus the creeping urge to dominate -- runs through everything now. There's no such thing as an apolitical space. The old etiquette of "don't talk politics, religion, or sex at the table" was always bullshit. Politics decides who gets to sit at that table. It decides who eats, who has medicine, who has a home. And these days, it decides who gets deported in the middle of the night through helicopter ICE raids, or whose kid is targeted by a state legislature for existing. | | ---|---|--- Coming for you next. The wall between culture and politics isn't just crumbling -- it's gone. "I just want to watch the game" has become "shut up and dribble." Every arena of American life -- sports, gaming, film, art, music, even coffee chains -- is a battlefield of worldviews. Look at the last month's headlines. The Ryder Cup wasn't just a golf tournament; it was a test of national identity wrapped in MAGA cosplay. Fans hurled beer and bile at Rory McIlroy's wife like they were defending a flag instead of watching a sport. In response, he vowed never to compete in America again -- and can you blame him? Golf, the most sedate of games, turned into a grievance rally. Jeering has become liturgy. Mad as hell but low on coin? Subscribe for free. Meanwhile, Jared Kushner and Saudi money circling Electronic Arts isn't just about profit -- it's about control. EA's worlds -- FIFA, Madden, The Sims -- are cultural ecosystems shaping millions of young minds. When autocrats buy the pipelines of imagination, they don't need to censor outright. They just erase. That Pride kit in FIFA? Gone. Diverse Sims households? Quietly "rethought." That's how authoritarianism works in 2025: not by banning what it hates, but by buying it outright and then quietly deleting it. | | ---|---|--- Hubba hubba! Sign me up for #TeamTrans!
