Join our Post-Election Mass Call to talk about the wins, the losses, and what comes next. | | | Peter, When the polls close on Tuesday, the election may be over — but the work is just beginning. Now that open enrollment has started, millions of Americans across the country are starting to receive notices that their health insurance premiums are increasing, in some cases _doubling!_ Meanwhile, working families continue to go hungry as Trump blocks critical SNAP benefits. **The crisis is here now and millions are losing health care and food aid while the GOP refuses to act.** This movement has always been about people coming together to demand better — and that starts now. **This Wednesday, we’re coming together for a Mass Call to unpack the lessons from 2025 and chart the path to 2026** — a year that will define whether we can build the power we need to stop the far right and win real change for working people. **[Join our Post-Election Mass Call on Wednesday, November 5 (8 pm clean_body: Join our Post-Election Mass Call to talk about the wins, the losses, and what comes next. | | | Peter, When the polls close on Tuesday, the election may be over — but the work is just beginning. Now that open enrollment has started, millions of Americans across the country are starting to receive notices that their health insurance premiums are increasing, in some cases doubling! Meanwhile, working families continue to go hungry as Trump blocks critical SNAP benefits. The crisis is here now and millions are losing health care and food aid while the GOP refuses to act. This movement has always been about people coming together to demand better — and that starts now. This Wednesday, we’re coming together for a Mass Call to unpack the lessons from 2025 and chart the path to 2026 — a year that will define whether we can build the power we need to stop the far right and win real change for working people. Together, we’ll share lessons from the election, and map out how we fight back — from fighting to lower health care costs and defending SNAP, to organizing for working people in 2026. Hope doesn’t come from waiting. It comes from what we do next — together. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . # [District Round‐up 11.02.25](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F11%2F02%2Fdistrict-round-up-11-02-25%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=2434d95ee6cf2a35cf8b369c3b226c06&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
| By **Elizabeth Farnham** on November 2, 2025
---
Dear Neighbor,
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-fa,rnham-for-congress-1](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=1c552fb263e6e8b2df54f0e807f711298c7be5f408999eca18dca416e3298a56&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5326&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=eea933647072af99640e02ad333e30fc&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=069fc5ef9952df9e2aa56678433a26b7)
When I refer to the rise of christofacism in Halloween parades in small towns of Pennsylvania, I am not exaggerating in the least.
[](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4955f15bcff0d0045c42a8ec2d753e857b0ec6913504fae503d3f05de567279c&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5326&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=816e29d1508be15f1d70082514310d9a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url&email_id=069fc5ef9952df9e2aa56678433a26b7)While the Roman Catholic Diocese of Harrisburg has disavowed this Nazi concentration camp symbol from a float created by the St. Joseph's Catholic school, the fact that someone among my neighbors thought it was a good idea in the first place speaks to the evil of their hearts.
This is exactly what happens when the right wing media weaponizes my own faith to convince the American People that the only way to govern is through a religion.
Do better, small towns in Pennsylvania, and dare to welcome into your Halloween parades political candidates who stand for the separation of Church and State.
[#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=9d1c548516cd4e942e97d01094000caaf824be989fe7f57cb9a1da5b8bbfe56f&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5326&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=210993b27359b255cb7c11e57fe0fc62&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=069fc5ef9952df9e2aa56678433a26b7).
FYI -You have to scroll down the link to get to the story.
Harrisburg’s Catholic bishop apologizes for ‘notorious symbol of hate’ on Halloween float - [pennlive.com](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=8d5f168729613d87c9540c1aa2f008fccc11c243afce6773209dbd445b15286b&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5326&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=de180560b98fe225e340ee03a70482c0&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cDovL3Blbm5saXZlLmNvbS8/ZmJjbGlkPUl3WlhoMGJnTmhaVzBDTVRBQVluSnBaQkV4ZWt3MFJWUjRPVzExZDI5QlZrVm5PUUVlUTFrVjc0bHYxTUdReFFUZlBTNndab2MxanQ5eTRDMlEyWGxVVjdCUGlZS2lrTEVLSjFqQ2xIZUF6OHNfYWVtX3RoQ1E4VmhqODVtZnJsZFpPZWI5RGc&email_id=069fc5ef9952df9e2aa56678433a26b7)[https://share.google/WfwY5YNOT9UUh0joN](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=c62c32abe09a237c05427249554297eb4c10ecd5919c3fd93bb5879144b1885e&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5326&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=fabf94af7c96bf735837b66f608db43a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zaGFyZS5nb29nbGUvV2Z3WTVZTk9UOVVVaDBqb04/ZmJjbGlkPUl3WlhoMGJnTmhaVzBDTVRBQVluSnBaQkV4ZWt3MFJWUjRPVzExZDI5QlZrVm5PUUVlWXVIOVZseTF1TnMzOFJVcTZKaGIzeGZmdDZrOFk3SnBHVUNHMTMtRU1SdEJ5U2h1SDVhY0VGYUxCZ1VfYWVtX1YwNEs4azdVai16YzhjWGVuMG4tanc&email_id=069fc5ef9952df9e2aa56678433a26b7)
Photo credit: Reddit
As many of you may already be aware, I am counting the days of this Republican shutdown. Today is Day 33.
We're almost to Election Day, so please get out there and encourage others to retain those judges!
[](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4955f15bcff0d0045c42a8ec2d753e857b0ec6913504fae503d3f05de567279c&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5326&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=816e29d1508be15f1d70082514310d9a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url&email_id=069fc5ef9952df9e2aa56678433a26b7)Otherwise, Pennsylvanians risk losing reproductive rights, fair voting districts, and more!
Just connect with your county Democratic Committees! County Parties - PA Democratic Party [https://share.google/uPVjbhrOXQ1VDGfZr](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=841b4da804a41b51c91ca19146d077f39ea8cda7d3e004f58e2c96268609cbe3&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5326&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=04081493fdc9c655fa9de6c2438c55ca&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zaGFyZS5nb29nbGUvdVBWamJock9YUTFWREdmWnI/ZmJjbGlkPUl3WlhoMGJnTmhaVzBDTVRBQVluSnBaQkV4ZWt3MFJWUjRPVzExZDI5QlZrVm5PUUVlQnhNam43a2ZXSTJMd0xmN0JqOWttYjRwTWZROEUtbmJsTW01SmNNWGdCQVlTeHFzNWcyOC1oQm9wT01fYWVtX1NjSG9fcmZ5RUh3MXduYkhBNHJlYmc&email_id=069fc5ef9952df9e2aa56678433a26b7)
Many thanks to Team Beth Farnham for Congress for picking up trash along Route 30 in New Oxford last Sunday.
[](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4955f15bcff0d0045c42a8ec2d753e857b0ec6913504fae503d3f05de567279c&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5326&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=816e29d1508be15f1d70082514310d9a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url&email_id=069fc5ef9952df9e2aa56678433a26b7)Jack, Sandy, and Barb - you rock!
It was a beautiful day of crushed car parts, plastic cups, cigarette butts, and even a pheasant.
Thank you also Adams County Democratic Committee for hosting it in honor of former team member Jane's late husband, Bruce Tushingham.
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=50fe198e83a780855e1b034a54f86a5faec52718aec3ce19990bd44fbb67b4d3&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5326&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=2cff990f29f5e4c1cf06db92ad79eadf&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=069fc5ef9952df9e2aa56678433a26b7) and Planet Earth.
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=839f9e399720c2ffb5386e64ef135b29a15b6bc25f6646dfa78e239373e4bd7d&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5326&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=cef2809692a758acb8df31b14f9c5a9c&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=069fc5ef9952df9e2aa56678433a26b7) and retain judges Donohue, Dougherty, Wecht, Beck Dubow, and Wojick!If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
Sincerely,
Beth

clean_body: | Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-cros... | or | | | or ---|---|--- | By Elizabeth Farnham on November 2, 2025 Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: When I refer to the rise of christofacism in Halloween parades in small towns of Pennsylvania, I am not exaggerating in the least. the Roman Catholic Diocese of Harrisburg has disavowed this Nazi concentration camp symbol from a float created by the St. Joseph's Catholic school, the fact that someone among my neighbors thought it was a good idea in the first place speaks to the evil of their hearts. This is exactly what happens when the right wing media weaponizes my own faith to convince the American People that the only way to govern is through a religion. Do better, small towns in Pennsylvania, and dare to welcome into your Halloween parades political candidates who stand for the separation of Church and State. . FYI -You have to scroll down the link to get to the story. Harrisburg’s Catholic bishop apologizes for ‘notorious symbol of hate’ on Halloween float - Photo credit: Reddit As many of you may already be aware, I am counting the days of this Republican shutdown. Today is Day 33. We're almost to Election Day, so please get out there and encourage others to retain those judges! , Pennsylvanians risk losing reproductive rights, fair voting districts, and more! Just connect with your county Democratic Committees! County Parties - PA Democratic Party Many thanks to Team Beth Farnham for Congress for picking up trash along Route 30 in New Oxford last Sunday. , Sandy, and Barb - you rock! It was a beautiful day of crushed car parts, plastic cups, cigarette butts, and even a pheasant. Thank you also Adams County Democratic Committee for hosting it in honor of former team member Jane's late husband, Bruce Tushingham. Together, we and Planet Earth. Together, we and retain judges Donohue, Dougherty, Wecht, Beck Dubow, and Wojick!If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism. We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you. Sincerely, Beth | | | | | Beth Farnham for Congress © 2025. or . | | | | Get the Jetpack app Subscribe, bookmark, and get real‐time notifications - all from one app! | | | | ---|--- | | | | Automattic, Inc. 60 29th St. #343, San Francisco, CA 94110 |

body:
#
**BREAKING:** **MAGA Extremist Lisa Demuth
Announces Campaign for Governor**
Peter,
GOP House Leader Lisa Demuth just announced she’s running for governor of Minnesota. Fiercely aligned with Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda, a Lisa Demuth governorship would be disastrous for Minnesota.
**Let’s take a look at who Lisa Demuth really is:**
➡️ She was the chief author of a a bill to ban abortion in Minnesota
➡️ She voted AGAINST school lunches for our students and against funding our public schools
➡️ She’s in favor of gutting Medicaid to give tax breaks to billionaires
**Lisa Demuth is running to take Minnesota backward. Her agenda is one of skyrocketing costs, underfunded schools, and abortion bans.**
**[Will you pitch in $5 right now so we’re able to fight back against Lisa Demuth’s extremism and help re-elect Governor Walz?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251102_2.WPFpc5&amount=5&refcode=em20251102-46&t=1&akid=46%2E34582%2ElRZQzv)**

Thank you,
Team Walz

Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose.
We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more.
**[Now we need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from dragging us backward. Pitch in $5 today to help us win this race and keep moving forward — together.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251102-46&t=21&refcode2=46_34582_lRZQzv&akid=46%2E34582%2ElRZQzv)**

Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

body:
| | | Friend, It’s John James. **I just launched my first ad of the 2026 race, and I want you to see it first.** Democrats in Washington shut down the government to demand a $1.5 trillion bailout that gives free healthcare to illegal immigrants. Their plan helps insurance companies and illegal immigrants while Michigan families struggle to afford their own coverage. In my new ad, [**_“Lock,”_**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=669bb8b4089c4968b462b75d8886ed7f&_e=md4SaZmcEKvd78hLiheWRfsUK0ri6F9Hi3_RwH5ONCjI60DenqNwY3Wv4vayyP_TJb9xOt-7dH51o4G4JfJbjEux3Z3cuoSuqdKre67veHJMEOPuWfz8VZT7_1U1dN-r_MwQ5bO7o9hGQ5KL5D2XRuRL-VnelwBkoU4Lp7HeTpO5tKbBfhAbK1IAvcgDNJEf1uRSov_TEAN0CbLjcMawXd3Jnd-l9m38kA1VpCRCSQ9O3bRGA78GdRiDhABnwD1DBvlGqfbjVdlnx5HwGt9tacb3v0Yutj72j6Jz3DaPJH29dP7Z4AAlatXCGG7rmEvvpV3h8qcUxiRSRkHXqcrDqTEcyuNiwtUGJtuaj1sl9-_crXJl1rzlBIzXr31uHHqQFbxyLlyDUfiv8lLKguxx8FKMvB4s5KZE6ScCDl9Ax2U%3D) I explain why this fight matters: **_“Why do we lock our doors at night? Because we hate the people on the outside? No. Because we love the people on the inside.”_**
---
[ **FIRST LOOK: WATCH THE AD** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=669bb8b4089c4968b462b75d8886ed7f&_e=md4SaZmcEKvd78hLiheWRfsUK0ri6F9Hi3_RwH5ONCjI60DenqNwY3Wv4vayyP_TJb9xOt-7dH51o4G4JfJbjDCS0eiliwq4Cdn3q81Y9QS2bxBVnwB-VuUU_WoXYfOa8mII-U17j0ASIo-SGQiBlC1aS6b6XVyZx9zS77fd1yN3jinZo3ETRQd7bn5MrVar6J3ayFXl5Q6lFg1gBAPScrkGrXofk0_N7V-oh9kNsM_u1jX13ptZKzSZOm-_30Ppxd9b8YWzr9PJidkUxeHMoI8wwHnPxFP-R0N3R73f0olm9r_4IH0qaYONmUU2iY3rp6l4Tx4odkoyddtNrmAg2GIN1MAJtHVucqt8SMaJqlBZS7hEINE4x3ks7Vnar_xacbqMGYQID6QsR0GXN_fBDWOYW66oHkRkjoz_jPxAphg%3D)

We don’t secure our borders out of hatred. We do it out of love for our families, our neighbors, and our country. President Trump was right about the border. He’s right again now. While Democrats hold Washington hostage, I stand with President Trump to secure the border, stop fentanyl and trafficking, and protect American families first. **If you agree it is time to lock out the chaos and defend our people, I need you in this fight.**
---

Team, President Biden's birthday is just around the corner, **and we selected YOU to sign our official DSCC card!**

President Biden's devotion to serving the American people has improved _countless_ lives during his decades of public service. Now is the _perfect opportunity_ to express our gratitude -- but we need YOUR help!

**We need to collect _100,000_ signatures from Democrats across America if we're going to send the card, _but right now we aren't on track!_

****Please, don't let President Biden down:** **[Sign the card right now and send him your best birthday wishes>>](http://go.dscc.org/go/22123?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251102-SignTheCard-BidenBdayRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251102-SignTheCard-BidenBdayRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=21645%2E9716520%2EwF418s)**

It’s a chance to bring good leadership to people who need it at a time of serious crisis for our country.

Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_

My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is virtually tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---

Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. clean_body: I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea.| | | | I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. | | | | My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is virtually tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Fellow American, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!" If you can't afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, "please keep me and my team in your prayers and add your endorsement today:" I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward, Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. 🔴Polls show my race is _TIED_ , Peter❗
---
I have an important update for you, Peter. Poll after poll shows that my race for Governor is a toss-up!

This race is shaping up to be the _CLOSEST_ in the nation in 2025. All eyes are on us to see if we can win and continue logging big wins for Virginians. We've been able to accomplish so much already, but we cannot falter now and let our Commonwealth backslide into failed liberal policies. _We must continue to build a better Virginia!_

My team and I are working around the clock to ensure we win, but we can't do this alone, Peter! **[We’re going to need every conservative in our corner to give us the edge in this TIED race, so today, I’m asking you to donate even just $15 to help me in this must-win race!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c8f279a505d546959cc2f46208f9d9bc&_e=YK0E4RY2Ek23CFBtEjXloOvQwwupPVI4vPqaiEi6QUUFeXcUnB_6WT5Z8fckbLsHZeQH_cW8MR2JWmCkTuPlATNkiO4MwZcI6rpI4uoXr-J6rJ75uJcUEO4ugbu4wkLNCWrCJNaCEPuo0fYJ1Ix-lUBBw8xXLK6NXMWYIwOo7VoI8nGklyzUbnOWBkAflf5jcma-dCmG7JhhmIxYtOSxMARhM5FwKjceWVmU-jvoKDIP7J1m7PcQG1mIYZIo7_MQJ2Kp0jLR2JJFksAoQQ52UpIE-49CUcMoIMYibzFlhiRq9UbvF9egkjmB51fo4VWE0qJ3jbjA37zd9V7bGdqE-Z62AZ7M2xVQctQfUTfTE9e-DpLB33vHam6MHVSRYIMgOq9oEE5gR--L4SgFK_LulRYBmobx49Icf4JE_iaaztduzn-pPA1tp5zyUl1Qv7SDixs-Tz_1GArEbashOeTbNE8tKUJp5om37uSnPY2VCyM192Vu4hdOcC712qdXKeKfeJsX3sLeuPSjJtcnv3Pb90fcdNj4yAkqEuiwf8P4d4TfWa_hXospfgfmrw1O7K4R4_HRSAPrJzEb3vzQXTIvQ7QKk9ajxKvyR011mzxPC0nbGsJ4E_2plE7JZ0gvY83Ky-0XDryVqFtccXui1nNfWuc-APo8RndM2YktjnijrWQ4_ZQCnF5W2nh4K23FzA3vXa9xU0vZfBW2hRL5slL4A-KD6Q3rq_CdXm1itEGjZAPuLw5ssIJrI-Rn2srjuDmFiOIhgmO5bYoJT1pa7a8ovLcrXDdbcvghKmew-Iz2i92thMb2xFI3crZlW6lwtMxAW8Qc7aNmdhku15clpa3BYmt9PUMcELz0lHSmrxy5Q1Pgs3A4fj2iFuwO6h0e-zE6zp31cKv-8k05CN9y2UssTmhCE_TQ3Dxx-aw44NMl-NAhhYdEkl3hFn0h3Myjc5rC)**

Poll after poll shows that my race for Governor is a toss-up! This race is shaping up to be the CLOSEST in the nation in 2025. All eyes are on us to see if we can win and continue logging big wins for Virginians. We've been able to accomplish so much already, but we cannot falter now and let our Commonwealth backslide into failed liberal policies. We must continue to build a better Virginia! My team and I are working around the clock to ensure we win, but we can't do this alone, Peter! Thank you so much and may God bless you! Sincerely, Winsome Earle-Sears Lt. Team,
Thanks to the support of this grassroots team, we’ve proven that progress is possible when you cut through the noise and focus on getting things done.
**That means working across the aisle when we can, standing our ground when we must, and always keeping the people we’re fighting for front and center.**
Now, with Fight Like Hell PAC, I’m taking that approach nationwide ahead of the 2026 midterm elections — recruiting candidates and campaign staff and giving them the tools to win tough battleground campaigns across the country.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: This story sold out in THREE HOURS
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10114895/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvdWZFY2RiWHhDRA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMDI/LbmNsNnZ3U1lsQg/qP2hpZHM9bmNON29JWFJOdGV4R3Fscw/gaQfuxw/s2h5c58024f)
| |
---
| |
---
Dear Patriot, It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention. Because **BRAVE Books** is facing a real Christmas crunch. And as one of our best supporters in our mission to instill conservative values in children using high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment... **[...I thought you’d want to be one of the first to know what’s going on.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) ** **Patriot, BRAVE Books** has introduced _Mouse in the House_ as a Christian alternative to that other secular “Christmas” game where parents hide a stuffed elf around the house to “spy” on the children to make sure they behave well to earn Santa’s gifts. My friends at**BRAVE Books** knew families deserved something better to teach the true meaning of Christmas. So, they created _Mouse in the House_ to help parents emphasize the joy of _giving_ more than _getting_ in this most blessed season. And boy, did parents respond. The first year it was introduced,___Mouse in the House_ sold out in THREE HOURS! Patriot, I know it’s only November, but this year we don’t want to turn any families away because of unexpectedly high demand.
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| **BRAVE Books** is ramping up production big-time and fast. **[And today I’m hoping you’ll contribute to our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign by rushing back your one-time gift in the next 24 hours.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Friend, you’re one of our best supporters and I’m so grateful.
---
| | **BRAVE Books** is ramping up production big-time and fast. [And today I’m hoping you’ll contribute to our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign by rushing back your one-time gift in the next 24 hours. ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Patriot, you’re one of our best supporters and I’m so grateful.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | You understand that **BRAVE Books** is fighting to restore our culture because we can’t just give up and let the radicals erase America’s Judeo-Christian values. >>> Your support has already helped get “See You at the Library” kits to thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens who gathered at over 201 libraries in 46 states (including the Library of Congress!) to take back our libraries. Together, we countered the Left’s radical and ungodly “Drag Queen Story Hours” and filled children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. >>> Your last gift helped us finish filming TWO whole seasons of our historic TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk.” This is the very first television show funded by everyday Americans to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” is our modern day “Mr. Rogers’ Neighborhood” that uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great. >>> And now you are the difference between success and failure with our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign. Just look at what parents have already said about our _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle that comes with a beautiful book and adorable stuffed mouse:
---
_“So thankful for a thoughtful new Christmas tradition for our children. The story is sweet, the explanation of Christmas is poignant, and the mouse is so adorable. Thank you, Brave Books!!!” — Jenae K._ _“I love the Godly service ideas!” – Susan_ _“I love the Mouse in the House. The giving nature of the story reflects the theme of the Christmas season.” – Kat F._
---
**Patriot, parents are hungry for Godly content that helps them counter the wicked culture.** **And your support helps BRAVE Books supply it.** **[Your gift of $35, $50 or even $100 not only helps fund our “ _More Mouse in the House_ _!_ ” campaign... ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Your gift helps **BRAVE Books** complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools. Patriot, nothing we accomplish is possible without you. And that’s why as a thank you for being such a faithful and faith-filled friend, when you contribute $100 or more to our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign... ...we will send one out to you absolutely free. You can keep the _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle for your family, you can gift it to someone you love... ...or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn’t have a Christian role model in their life. [**Friend, what’s most important is that you rush back your best gift of $35, $50, or even $100 in the next 24 hours.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) **BRAVE Books** is working round the clock to get enough _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundles produced and all the orders filled in time. Patriot, THANK YOU for helping. **BRAVE Books** would have no chance of beating Hollywood, giant left-leaning publishers, and big government-funded libraries and schools without you. Thank you for taking a minute to help with our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign. You’re bringing the true meaning of Christmas to families all across America. Thank you and may God bless you and God bless America,
---
| | Sincerely,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
P.S. Patriot, it’s only November and we’re already in a Christmas crunch! Families are clamoring for our _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle to counter the Left’s secular interpretation of this most blessed season. [**Your donation of $35, $50, or even $100 helps us fill all our Mouse in the House orders in time to help parents teach giving not getting this Christmas.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) And as a thank you for your gift of $100 or more we’ll send you your very own _Mouse in the House_ for your family! Thank you! -- Kirk
---
